2697 invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
2698 m_targetsTravCache = {};
2699 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
2700 m_depthOrderCache = {};
2701 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
2702 m_targetsAllCache = {};
2703 }
2704
2705 bool exclusive_adjunct_del(Entity source, Entity relation, Entity target) {
2706 const auto itStore = m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel.find(EntityLookupKey(relation));
2707 if (itStore == m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel.end())
2708 return false;
2709
2710 auto& store = itStore->second;
2711 const auto oldTarget = exclusive_adjunct_target(store, source);
2712 if (oldTarget == EntityBad)
2713 return false;
2714 if (target != EntityBad && oldTarget != target)
2715 return false;
2716
2717 del_exclusive_adjunct_target_source(store, oldTarget, source);
2718 store.srcToTgt[source.id()] = EntityBad;
2719 store.srcToTgtIdx[source.id()] = BadIndex;
2720 GAIA_ASSERT(store.srcToTgtCnt > 0);
2721 --store.srcToTgtCnt;
2722
2723 exclusive_adjunct_untrack_src_relation(source, relation);
2724 if (store.srcToTgtCnt == 0)
2725 m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel.erase(itStore);
2726
2727 touch_rel_version(relation);
2728 invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
2729 m_targetsTravCache = {};
2730 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
2731 m_depthOrderCache = {};
2732 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
2733 m_targetsAllCache = {};
2734
2735 return true;
2736 }
2737
2738 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_exclusive_adjunct_pair(Entity source, Entity object) const {
2739 if (!object.pair())
2740 return false;
2741
2742 const auto srcRelsIt = m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.find(EntityLookupKey(source));
2743 if (srcRelsIt == m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.end())
2744 return false;
2745
2746 const auto relId = object.id();
2747 const auto tgtId = object.gen();
2748
2749 if (relId != All.id()) {
2750 const auto relation = get(relId);
2751 if (!is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation))
2752 return false;
2753
2754 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
2755 if (pStore == nullptr)
2756 return false;
2757
2758 const auto target = exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, source);
2759 if (target == EntityBad)
2760 return false;
2761
2762 return tgtId == All.id() || target.id() == tgtId;
2763 }
2764
2765 if (tgtId == All.id())
2766 return !srcRelsIt->second.empty();
2767
2768 const auto target = get(tgtId);
2769 for (auto relKey: srcRelsIt->second) {
2770 const auto relation = relKey;
2771 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
2772 if (pStore == nullptr)
2773 continue;
2774
2775 if (exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, source) == target)
2776 return true;
2777 }
2778
2779 return false;
2780 }
2781
2782 void del_exclusive_adjunct_source(Entity source) {
2783 const auto it = m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.find(EntityLookupKey(source));
2784 if (it == m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.end())
2785 return;
2786
2787 cnt::darray<Entity> relations;
2788 for (auto relKey: it->second)
2789 relations.push_back(relKey);
2790
2791 for (auto relation: relations) {
2792 touch_rel_version(relation);
2793 invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
2794 (void)exclusive_adjunct_del(source, relation, EntityBad);
2795 }
2796 m_targetsTravCache = {};
2797 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
2798 m_depthOrderCache = {};
2799 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
2800 m_targetsAllCache = {};
2801 }
2802
2803 void del_exclusive_adjunct_relation(Entity relation) {
2804 const auto itStore = m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel.find(EntityLookupKey(relation));
2805 if (itStore == m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel.end())
2806 return;
2807
2808 cnt::darray<Entity> sources;
2809 const auto& srcToTgt = itStore->second.srcToTgt;
2810 GAIA_FOR((uint32_t)srcToTgt.size()) {
2811 if (srcToTgt[i] == EntityBad)
2812 continue;
2813
2814 sources.push_back(get((EntityId)i));
2815 }
2816
2817 touch_rel_version(relation);
2818 invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
2819 for (auto source: sources)
2820 (void)exclusive_adjunct_del(source, relation, EntityBad);
2821 m_targetsTravCache = {};
2822 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
2823 m_depthOrderCache = {};
2824 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
2825 m_targetsAllCache = {};
2826 }
2827
2829 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_exclusive_adjunct_target_cond(Entity target, Pair cond) const {
2830 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
2831 if (exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target) == nullptr)
2832 continue;
2833
2834 if (has(relKey.entity(), cond))
2835 return true;
2836 }
2837
2838 return false;
2839 }
2840
2841 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
2842
2844 void set_serializer(std::nullptr_t) {
2845 // Always use the binary serializer as the default.
2846 m_serializer = ser::make_serializer(m_stream);
2847 }
2848
2851 void set_serializer(ser::serializer serializer) {
2852 GAIA_ASSERT(serializer.valid());
2853 m_serializer = serializer;
2854 }
2855
2858 template <typename TSerializer>
2859 void set_serializer(TSerializer& serializer) {
2860 set_serializer(ser::make_serializer(serializer));
2861 }
2862
2865 ser::serializer get_serializer() const {
2866 return m_serializer;
2867 }
2868
2869 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
2870
2871 struct EntityBuilder final {
2872 friend class World;
2873
2874 World& m_world;
2876 Archetype* m_pArchetypeSrc = nullptr;
2878 Chunk* m_pChunkSrc = nullptr;
2880 uint32_t m_rowSrc = 0;
2882 Archetype* m_pArchetype = nullptr;
2884 EntityNameLookupKey m_targetNameKey;
2886 EntityNameLookupKey m_targetAliasKey;
2888 Entity m_entity;
2890 Entity m_graphEdgeEntity = EntityBad;
2892 uint8_t m_graphEdgeOpCount = 0;
2894 bool m_graphEdgeIsAdd = false;
2895
2896#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
2897 static constexpr uint32_t MAX_TERMS = 32;
2898 static_assert(MAX_TERMS <= ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS);
2899
2900 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, MAX_TERMS> tl_new_comps;
2901 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, MAX_TERMS> tl_del_comps;
2902#endif
2903
2904 EntityBuilder(World& world, Entity entity, EntityContainer& ec):
2905 m_world(world), m_pArchetypeSrc(ec.pArchetype), m_pChunkSrc(ec.pChunk), m_rowSrc(ec.row),
2906 m_pArchetype(ec.pArchetype), m_entity(entity) {
2907 // Make sure entity matches the provided entity container record
2908 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row] == entity);
2909 }
2910
2911 EntityBuilder(World& world, Entity entity): m_world(world), m_entity(entity) {
2912 const auto& ec = world.fetch(entity);
2913 m_pArchetypeSrc = ec.pArchetype;
2914 m_pChunkSrc = ec.pChunk;
2915 m_rowSrc = ec.row;
2916
2917 m_pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
2918 }
2919
2920 EntityBuilder(const EntityBuilder&) = default;
2921 EntityBuilder(EntityBuilder&&) = delete;
2922 EntityBuilder& operator=(const EntityBuilder&) = delete;
2923 EntityBuilder& operator=(EntityBuilder&&) = delete;
2924
2925 ~EntityBuilder() {
2926 commit();
2927 }
2928
2931 void commit() {
2932 // No requests to change the archetype were made
2933 if (m_pArchetype == nullptr) {
2934 reset_graph_edge_tracking();
2935 return;
2936 }
2937
2938 // Change in archetype detected
2939 if (m_pArchetypeSrc != m_pArchetype) {
2940 auto& ec = m_world.fetch(m_entity);
2941 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pArchetype == m_pArchetypeSrc);
2942#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
2943 auto delDiffCtx = tl_del_comps.empty() ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
2944 : m_world.m_observers.prepare_diff(
2945 m_world, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{tl_del_comps},
2946 EntitySpan{&m_entity, 1});
2947 auto addDiffCtx = tl_new_comps.empty() ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
2948 : m_world.m_observers.prepare_diff(
2949 m_world, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{tl_new_comps},
2950 EntitySpan{&m_entity, 1});
2951#endif
2952
2953 // Trigger remove hooks if there are any
2954 trigger_del_hooks(*m_pArchetype);
2955
2956 // Now that we have the final archetype move the entity to it
2957 m_world.move_entity_raw(m_entity, ec, *m_pArchetype);
2958
2959 // Batched builder operations resolve intermediate archetypes without touching the
2960 // graph. Recreate the cached edge only for the single-step case.
2961 if (m_graphEdgeOpCount == 1 && m_graphEdgeEntity != EntityBad) {
2962 if (m_graphEdgeIsAdd)
2963 rebuild_graph_edge(m_pArchetypeSrc, m_pArchetype, m_graphEdgeEntity);
2964 else
2965 rebuild_graph_edge(m_pArchetype, m_pArchetypeSrc, m_graphEdgeEntity);
2966 }
2967
2968 if (m_targetNameKey.str() != nullptr || m_targetAliasKey.str() != nullptr) {
2969 const auto compIdx = ec.pChunk->comp_idx(GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
2970 // No need to update version, entity move did it already.
2971 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut_gen<false>(compIdx, ec.row));
2972 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
2973
2974 // Update the entity name string pointers if necessary
2975 if (m_targetNameKey.str() != nullptr) {
2976 pDesc->name = m_targetNameKey.str();
2977 pDesc->name_len = m_targetNameKey.len();
2978 }
2979
2980 // Update the entity alias string pointers if necessary
2981 if (m_targetAliasKey.str() != nullptr) {
2982 pDesc->alias = m_targetAliasKey.str();
2983 pDesc->alias_len = m_targetAliasKey.len();
2984 }
2985 }
2986
2987 // Trigger add hooks if there are any
2988 trigger_add_hooks(*m_pArchetype);
2989#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
2990 m_world.m_observers.finish_diff(m_world, GAIA_MOV(delDiffCtx));
2991 m_world.m_observers.finish_diff(m_world, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
2992#endif
2993 cleanup_deleted_out_of_line_components();
2994
2995 m_pArchetypeSrc = ec.pArchetype;
2996 m_pChunkSrc = ec.pChunk;
2997 m_rowSrc = ec.row;
2998 }
2999 // Archetype is still the same. Make sure no chunk movement has happened.
3000 else {
3001#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3002 auto& ec = m_world.fetch(m_entity);
3003 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk == m_pChunkSrc);
3004#endif
3005
3006#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3007 auto delDiffCtx = tl_del_comps.empty() ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
3008 : m_world.m_observers.prepare_diff(
3009 m_world, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{tl_del_comps},
3010 EntitySpan{&m_entity, 1});
3011 auto addDiffCtx = tl_new_comps.empty() ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
3012 : m_world.m_observers.prepare_diff(
3013 m_world, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{tl_new_comps},
3014 EntitySpan{&m_entity, 1});
3015#endif
3016
3017 if (m_targetNameKey.str() != nullptr || m_targetAliasKey.str() != nullptr) {
3018 const auto compIdx = m_pChunkSrc->comp_idx(GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3019 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr_mut_gen<true>(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3020 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
3021
3022 // Update the entity name string pointers if necessary
3023 if (m_targetNameKey.str() != nullptr) {
3024 pDesc->name = m_targetNameKey.str();
3025 pDesc->name_len = m_targetNameKey.len();
3026 }
3027
3028 // Update the entity alias string pointers if necessary
3029 if (m_targetAliasKey.str() != nullptr) {
3030 pDesc->alias = m_targetAliasKey.str();
3031 pDesc->alias_len = m_targetAliasKey.len();
3032 }
3033 }
3034
3035#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3036 m_world.m_observers.finish_diff(m_world, GAIA_MOV(delDiffCtx));
3037 m_world.m_observers.finish_diff(m_world, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
3038#endif
3039 cleanup_deleted_out_of_line_components();
3040 }
3041
3042 // Finalize the builder by reseting the archetype pointer
3043 m_pArchetype = nullptr;
3044 m_targetNameKey = {};
3045 m_targetAliasKey = {};
3046 reset_graph_edge_tracking();
3047 }
3048
3056 void name(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) {
3057 name_inter<true>(name, len);
3058 }
3059
3071 void name_raw(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) {
3072 name_inter<false>(name, len);
3073 }
3074
3079 void alias(const char* alias, uint32_t len = 0) {
3080 alias_inter<true>(alias, len);
3081 }
3082
3087 void alias_raw(const char* alias, uint32_t len = 0) {
3088 alias_inter<false>(alias, len);
3089 }
3090
3092 void del_name() {
3093 if (m_entity.pair())
3094 return;
3095
3096 // The following block is essentially the same as this but without the archetype pointer access:
3097 // const auto compIdx = core::get_index(m_pArchetypeSrc->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3098 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(m_pChunkSrc->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3099 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
3100 return;
3101
3102 {
3103 const auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<const EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3104 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
3105 if (pDesc->name == nullptr)
3106 return;
3107 }
3108
3109 // TODO: Trigger the hooks/observers manually here? I do not like essentially calling comp_ptr twice here.
3110 // The second one could be replaced with const cast + emit.
3111 // No need to update version, commit() will do it
3112 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr_mut_gen<false>(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3113 del_name_inter(EntityNameLookupKey(pDesc->name, pDesc->name_len, 0));
3114 m_world.invalidate_scope_path_cache();
3115
3116 pDesc->name = nullptr;
3117 pDesc->name_len = 0;
3118 if (pDesc->alias == nullptr)
3119 del_inter(GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3120
3121 m_targetNameKey = {};
3122 }
3123
3125 void del_alias() {
3126 if (m_entity.pair())
3127 return;
3128
3129 // The following block is essentially the same as this but without the archetype pointer access:
3130 // const auto compIdx = core::get_index(m_pArchetypeSrc->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3131 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(m_pChunkSrc->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3132 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
3133 return;
3134
3135 {
3136 const auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<const EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3137 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
3138 if (pDesc->alias == nullptr)
3139 return;
3140 }
3141
3142 // TODO: Trigger the hooks/observers manually here? I do not like essentially calling comp_ptr twice here.
3143 // The second one could be replaced with const cast + emit.
3144 // No need to update version, commit() will do it
3145 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr_mut_gen<false>(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3146 del_alias_inter(EntityNameLookupKey(pDesc->alias, pDesc->alias_len, 0));
3147
3148 pDesc->alias = nullptr;
3149 pDesc->alias_len = 0;
3150 if (pDesc->name == nullptr)
3151 del_inter(GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3152
3153 m_targetAliasKey = {};
3154 }
3155
3158 EntityBuilder& add(Entity entity) {
3159 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(EntityBuilder::add);
3160 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(m_entity));
3161 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(entity));
3162
3163 add_inter(entity);
3164 return *this;
3165 }
3166
3169 EntityBuilder& add(Pair pair) {
3170 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(EntityBuilder::add);
3171 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(m_entity));
3172 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(pair.first()));
3173 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(pair.second()));
3174
3175 add_inter(pair);
3176 return *this;
3177 }
3178
3182 EntityBuilder& as(Entity entityBase) {
3183 return add(Pair(Is, entityBase));
3184 }
3185
3187 EntityBuilder& prefab() {
3188 return add(Prefab);
3189 }
3190
3195 GAIA_NODISCARD bool as(Entity entity, Entity entityBase) const {
3196 return static_cast<const World&>(m_world).is(entity, entityBase);
3197 }
3198
3200 EntityBuilder& child(Entity parent) {
3201 return add(Pair(ChildOf, parent));
3202 }
3203
3206 template <typename T>
3207 Entity register_component() {
3208 if constexpr (is_pair<T>::value) {
3209 const auto rel = m_world.template reg_comp<typename T::rel>().entity;
3210 const auto tgt = m_world.template reg_comp<typename T::tgt>().entity;
3211 const Entity ent = Pair(rel, tgt);
3212 add_inter(ent);
3213 return ent;
3214 } else {
3215 return m_world.template reg_comp<T>().entity;
3216 }
3217 }
3218
3219 template <typename T>
3220 EntityBuilder& add() {
3221 verify_comp<T>();
3222 add(register_component<T>());
3223 return *this;
3224 }
3225
3228 EntityBuilder& del(Entity entity) {
3229 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(EntityBuilder::del);
3230 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(m_entity));
3231 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(entity));
3232 del_inter(entity);
3233 return *this;
3234 }
3235
3238 EntityBuilder& del(Pair pair) {
3239 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(EntityBuilder::add);
3240 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(m_entity));
3241 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(pair.first()));
3242 GAIA_ASSERT(m_world.valid(pair.second()));
3243 del_inter(pair);
3244 return *this;
3245 }
3246
3247 template <typename T>
3248 EntityBuilder& del() {
3249 verify_comp<T>();
3250 del(register_component<T>());
3251 return *this;
3252 }
3253
3254 private:
3257 void trigger_add_hooks(const Archetype& newArchetype) {
3258#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3259 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (m_world.tearing_down()) {
3260 tl_new_comps.clear();
3261 (void)newArchetype;
3262 return;
3263 }
3264
3265 m_world.lock();
3266
3267 #if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS
3268 // if (hookCnt > 0)
3269 {
3270 // Trigger component hooks first
3271 for (auto entity: tl_new_comps) {
3272 if (!entity.comp())
3273 continue;
3274
3275 const auto& item = m_world.comp_cache().get(entity);
3276 const auto& hooks = ComponentCache::hooks(item);
3277 if (hooks.func_add != nullptr)
3278 hooks.func_add(m_world, item, m_entity);
3279 }
3280 }
3281 #endif
3282
3283 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3284 // Trigger observers second
3285 m_world.m_observers.on_add(m_world, newArchetype, std::span<Entity>{tl_new_comps}, {&m_entity, 1});
3286 #else
3287 (void)newArchetype;
3288 #endif
3289
3290 tl_new_comps.clear();
3291
3292 m_world.unlock();
3293#endif
3294 }
3295
3298 void trigger_del_hooks(const Archetype& newArchetype) {
3299#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3300 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (m_world.tearing_down()) {
3301 tl_del_comps.clear();
3302 (void)newArchetype;
3303 return;
3304 }
3305
3306 m_world.notify_inherited_del_dependents(m_entity, std::span<Entity>{tl_del_comps});
3307 m_world.lock();
3308
3309 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3310 // Trigger observers first
3311 m_world.m_observers.on_del(m_world, newArchetype, std::span<Entity>{tl_del_comps}, {&m_entity, 1});
3312 #else
3313 (void)newArchetype;
3314 #endif
3315
3316 #if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS
3317 // if (hookCnt > 0)
3318 {
3319 // Trigger component hooks second
3320 for (auto entity: tl_del_comps) {
3321 if (!entity.comp())
3322 continue;
3323
3324 const auto& item = m_world.comp_cache().get(entity);
3325 const auto& hooks = ComponentCache::hooks(item);
3326 if (hooks.func_del != nullptr)
3327 hooks.func_del(m_world, item, m_entity);
3328 }
3329 }
3330 #endif
3331
3332 m_world.unlock();
3333#endif
3334 }
3335
3336 void cleanup_deleted_out_of_line_components() {
3337 for (auto entity: tl_del_comps) {
3338 if (entity.pair() || !m_world.is_out_of_line_component(entity) ||
3339 m_world.is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(entity))
3340 continue;
3341
3342 const auto it = m_world.m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
3343 if (it != m_world.m_sparseComponentsByComp.end())
3344 it->second.func_del(it->second.pStore, m_entity);
3345 }
3346
3347 tl_del_comps.clear();
3348 }
3349
3350 bool handle_add_entity(Entity entity) {
3351 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS> targets;
3352
3353 const auto& ecMain = m_world.fetch(entity);
3354 if (entity.pair())
3355 m_world.invalidate_scope_path_cache();
3356
3357 // Handle entity combinations that can't be together
3358 if ((ecMain.flags & EntityContainerFlags::HasCantCombine) != 0) {
3359 m_world.targets(entity, CantCombine, [&targets](Entity target) {
3360 targets.push_back(target);
3361 });
3362 for (auto e: targets) {
3363 if (m_pArchetype->has(e)) {
3364#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3365 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to add an entity which can't be combined with the source");
3366 print_archetype_entities(m_world, *m_pArchetype, entity, true);
3367#endif
3368 return false;
3369 }
3370 }
3371 }
3372
3373 // Handle exclusivity
3374 if (entity.pair()) {
3375 // Check if (rel, tgt)'s rel part is exclusive
3376 const auto& ecRel = m_world.m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
3377 if ((ecRel.flags & EntityContainerFlags::IsExclusive) != 0) {
3378 auto rel = Entity(
3379 entity.id(), ecRel.data.gen, (bool)ecRel.data.ent, (bool)ecRel.data.pair,
3380 (EntityKind)ecRel.data.kind);
3381 auto tgt = m_world.try_get(entity.gen());
3382 if (tgt == EntityBad)
3383 return false;
3384
3385 // Make sure to remove the (rel, tgt0) so only the new (rel, tgt1) remains.
3386 // However, before that we need to make sure there only exists one target at most.
3387 targets.clear();
3388 m_world.targets_if(m_entity, rel, [&targets](Entity target) {
3389 targets.push_back(target);
3390 // Stop the moment we have more than 1 target. This kind of scenario is not supported
3391 // and can happen only if Exclusive is added after multiple relationships already exist.
3392 return targets.size() < 2;
3393 });
3394
3395 const auto targetsCnt = targets.size();
3396 if (targetsCnt > 1) {
3397#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3398 GAIA_ASSERT2(
3399 false, "Trying to add a pair with exclusive relationship but there are multiple targets present. "
3400 "Make sure to add the Exclusive property before any relationships with it are created.");
3401 print_archetype_entities(m_world, *m_pArchetype, entity, true);
3402#endif
3403 return false;
3404 }
3405
3406 // Remove the previous relationship if possible.
3407 // We avoid self-removal.
3408 const auto tgtNew = *targets.begin();
3409 if (targetsCnt == 1 && tgt != tgtNew) {
3410 // Exclusive relationship replaces the previous one.
3411 // We need to check if the old one can be removed.
3412 // This is what del_inter does on the inside.
3413 // It first checks if entity can be deleted and calls handle_del afterwards.
3414 if (!can_del(entity)) {
3415#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3416 GAIA_ASSERT2(
3417 false, "Trying to replace an exclusive relationship but the entity which is getting removed has "
3418 "dependencies.");
3419 print_archetype_entities(m_world, *m_pArchetype, entity, true);
3420#endif
3421 return false;
3422 }
3423
3424 handle_del(ecs::Pair(rel, tgtNew));
3425 }
3426 }
3427 }
3428
3429 // Handle requirements
3430 {
3431 targets.clear();
3432 m_world.targets(entity, Requires, [&targets](Entity target) {
3433 targets.push_back(target);
3434 });
3435
3436 for (auto e: targets) {
3437 auto* pArchetype = m_pArchetype;
3438 handle_add<false>(e);
3439 if (m_pArchetype != pArchetype)
3440 handle_add_entity(e);
3441 }
3442 }
3443
3444 return true;
3445 }
3446
3447 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_Requires_tgt(Entity entity) const {
3448 // Don't allow to delete entity if something in the archetype requires it
3449 auto ids = m_pArchetype->ids_view();
3450 for (auto e: ids) {
3451 if (m_world.has(e, Pair(Requires, entity)))
3452 return true;
3453 }
3454
3455 return false;
3456 }
3457
3458 static void set_flag(EntityContainerFlagsType& flags, EntityContainerFlags flag, bool enable) {
3459 if (enable)
3460 flags |= flag;
3461 else
3462 flags &= ~flag;
3463 }
3464
3465 void set_flag(Entity entity, EntityContainerFlags flag, bool enable) {
3466 auto& ec = m_world.fetch(entity);
3467 set_flag(ec.flags, flag, enable);
3468 }
3469
3470 void try_set_flags(Entity entity, bool enable) {
3471 auto& ecMain = m_world.fetch(m_entity);
3472 try_set_CantCombine(ecMain, entity, enable);
3473
3474 auto& ec = m_world.fetch(entity);
3475 try_set_Is(ec, entity, enable);
3476 try_set_IsExclusive(ecMain, entity, enable);
3477 if (enable)
3478 try_set_sticky_component_traits(ecMain, entity);
3479 try_set_IsSingleton(ecMain, entity, enable);
3480 try_set_OnDelete(ecMain, entity, enable);
3481 try_set_OnDeleteTarget(entity, enable);
3482 }
3483
3484 void try_set_Is(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool enable) {
3485 if (!entity.pair() || entity.id() != Is.id())
3486 return;
3487
3488 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::HasAliasOf, enable);
3489 }
3490
3491 void try_set_CantCombine(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool enable) {
3492 if (!entity.pair() || entity.id() != CantCombine.id())
3493 return;
3494
3495 GAIA_ASSERT(entity != m_entity);
3496
3497 // Setting the flag can be done right away.
3498 // One bit can only contain information about one pair but there
3499 // can be any amount of CanCombine pairs formed with an entity.
3500 // Therefore, when resetting the flag, we first need to check if there
3501 // are any other targets with this flag set and only reset the flag
3502 // if there is only one present.
3503 if (enable)
3504 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::HasCantCombine, true);
3505 else if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::HasCantCombine) != 0) {
3506 uint32_t targets = 0;
3507 m_world.targets(m_entity, CantCombine, [&targets]([[maybe_unused]] Entity entity) {
3508 ++targets;
3509 });
3510 if (targets == 1)
3511 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::HasCantCombine, false);
3512 }
3513 }
3514
3515 void try_set_IsExclusive(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool enable) {
3516 if (entity.pair() || entity.id() != Exclusive.id())
3517 return;
3518
3519 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::IsExclusive, enable);
3520 }
3521
3522 void try_set_sticky_component_traits(EntityContainer& ecMain, Entity entity) {
3523 if (entity.pair())
3524 return;
3525
3526 if (entity.id() == DontFragment.id()) {
3527 m_world.set_component_dont_fragment(m_entity, ecMain);
3528 return;
3529 }
3530
3531 if (entity.id() == Sparse.id())
3532 m_world.set_component_sparse_storage(m_entity);
3533 }
3534
3535 void try_set_OnDeleteTarget(Entity entity, bool enable) {
3536 if (!entity.pair())
3537 return;
3538
3539 const auto rel = m_world.try_get(entity.id());
3540 const auto tgt = m_world.try_get(entity.gen());
3541 if (rel == EntityBad || tgt == EntityBad)
3542 return;
3543
3544 // Adding a pair to an entity with OnDeleteTarget relationship.
3545 // We need to update the target entity's flags.
3546 if (m_world.has(rel, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete)))
3547 set_flag(tgt, EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Delete, enable);
3548 else if (m_world.has(rel, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Remove)))
3549 set_flag(tgt, EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Remove, enable);
3550 else if (m_world.has(rel, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Error)))
3551 set_flag(tgt, EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Error, enable);
3552 }
3553
3554 void try_set_OnDelete(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool enable) {
3555 if (entity == Pair(OnDelete, Delete))
3556 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Delete, enable);
3557 else if (entity == Pair(OnDelete, Remove))
3558 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Remove, enable);
3559 else if (entity == Pair(OnDelete, Error))
3560 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Error, enable);
3561 }
3562
3563 void try_set_IsSingleton(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool enable) {
3564 const bool isSingleton = enable && m_entity == entity;
3565 set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::IsSingleton, isSingleton);
3566 }
3567
3568 void handle_DependsOn(Entity entity, bool enable) {
3569 (void)entity;
3570 (void)enable;
3571 // auto& ec = m_world.fetch(entity);
3572 // if (enable) {
3573 // // Calculate the depth in the dependency tree
3574 // uint32_t depth = 1;
3575
3576 // auto e = entity;
3577 // if (m_world.valid(e)) {
3578 // while (true) {
3579 // auto tgt = m_world.target(e, DependsOn);
3580 // if (tgt == EntityBad)
3581 // break;
3582
3583 // ++depth;
3584 // e = tgt;
3585 // }
3586 // }
3587 // ec.depthDependsOn = (uint8_t)depth;
3588
3589 // // Update depth for all entities depending on this one
3590 // auto q = m_world.uquery();
3591 // q.all(ecs::Pair(DependsOn, m_entity)) //
3592 // .each([&](Entity dependingEntity) {
3593 // auto& ecDependingEntity = m_world.fetch(dependingEntity);
3594 // ecDependingEntity.depthDependsOn += (uint8_t)depth;
3595 // });
3596 // } else {
3597 // // Update depth for all entities depending on this one
3598 // auto q = m_world.uquery();
3599 // q.all(ecs::Pair(DependsOn, m_entity)) //
3600 // .each([&](Entity dependingEntity) {
3601 // auto& ecDependingEntity = m_world.fetch(dependingEntity);
3602 // ecDependingEntity.depthDependsOn -= ec.depthDependsOn;
3603 // });
3604
3605 // // Reset the depth
3606 // ec.depthDependsOn = 0;
3607 // }
3608 }
3609
3610 template <bool IsBootstrap>
3611 bool handle_add(Entity entity) {
3612 const bool isDontFragmentPair =
3613 entity.pair() && m_world.is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(m_world.get(entity.id()));
3614#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3615 if (!isDontFragmentPair)
3616 World::verify_add(m_world, *m_pArchetype, m_entity, entity);
3617#endif
3618
3619 // Don't add the same entity twice
3620 if (isDontFragmentPair ? m_world.has(m_entity, entity) : m_pArchetype->has(entity))
3621 return false;
3622
3623 if (entity.pair()) {
3624 auto relation = m_world.get(entity.id());
3625 m_world.touch_rel_version(relation);
3626 m_world.invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
3627 m_world.m_targetsTravCache = {};
3628 m_world.m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
3629 m_world.m_depthOrderCache = {};
3630 m_world.m_sourcesAllCache = {};
3631 m_world.m_targetsAllCache = {};
3632 }
3633
3634 try_set_flags(entity, true);
3635
3636 // Update the Is relationship base counter if necessary
3637 if (entity.pair() && entity.id() == Is.id()) {
3638 auto e = m_world.try_get(entity.gen());
3639 if (e == EntityBad)
3640 return false;
3641
3642 EntityLookupKey entityKey(m_entity);
3643 EntityLookupKey eKey(e);
3644
3645 // m_entity -> {..., e}
3646 auto& entity_to_e = m_world.m_entityToAsTargets[entityKey];
3647 entity_to_e.insert(eKey);
3648 m_world.m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache = {};
3649 // e -> {..., m_entity}
3650 auto& e_to_entity = m_world.m_entityToAsRelations[eKey];
3651 e_to_entity.insert(entityKey);
3652 m_world.m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache = {};
3653
3654 // Make sure the relation entity is registered as archetype so queries can find it
3655 // auto& ec = m_world.fetch(tgt);
3656 // m_world.add_entity_archetype_pair(m_entity, ec.pArchetype);
3657
3658 // Cached queries might need to be invalidated.
3659 m_world.invalidate_queries_for_entity({Is, e});
3660 }
3661
3662 if (isDontFragmentPair) {
3663 const auto relation = m_world.try_get(entity.id());
3664 const auto target = m_world.try_get(entity.gen());
3665 if (relation == EntityBad || target == EntityBad)
3666 return false;
3667
3668 m_world.exclusive_adjunct_set(m_entity, relation, target);
3669 } else {
3670 m_pArchetype = m_world.foc_archetype_add_no_graph(m_pArchetype, entity);
3671 note_graph_edge(entity, true);
3672 }
3673
3674 if constexpr (!IsBootstrap) {
3675 handle_DependsOn(entity, true);
3676
3677#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3678 tl_new_comps.push_back(entity);
3679#endif
3680 }
3681
3682 return true;
3683 }
3684
3685 void handle_del(Entity entity) {
3686 if (entity.pair() && !m_world.valid(entity)) {
3687 if (m_pArchetype->has(entity)) {
3688 const auto relation = m_world.try_get(entity.id());
3689 if (relation != EntityBad) {
3690 m_world.touch_rel_version(relation);
3691 m_world.invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
3692 m_world.m_targetsTravCache = {};
3693 m_world.m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
3694 m_world.m_depthOrderCache = {};
3695 m_world.m_sourcesAllCache = {};
3696 m_world.m_targetsAllCache = {};
3697 }
3698
3699 if (entity.id() == Is.id())
3700 m_world.unlink_stale_is_relations_by_target_id(m_entity, entity.gen());
3701
3702 m_pArchetype = m_world.foc_archetype_del_no_graph(m_pArchetype, entity);
3703 note_graph_edge(entity, false);
3704 }
3705 return;
3706 }
3707
3708 const bool isDontFragmentPair =
3709 entity.pair() && m_world.is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(m_world.get(entity.id()));
3710 if (entity.pair())
3711 m_world.invalidate_scope_path_cache();
3712
3713#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3714 if (!isDontFragmentPair)
3715 World::verify_del(m_world, *m_pArchetype, m_entity, entity);
3716#endif
3717
3718 // Don't delete what has not beed added
3719 if (!(isDontFragmentPair ? m_world.has(m_entity, entity) : m_pArchetype->has(entity)))
3720 return;
3721
3722 if (entity.pair()) {
3723 auto relation = m_world.get(entity.id());
3724 m_world.touch_rel_version(relation);
3725 m_world.invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
3726 m_world.m_targetsTravCache = {};
3727 m_world.m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
3728 m_world.m_depthOrderCache = {};
3729 m_world.m_sourcesAllCache = {};
3730 m_world.m_targetsAllCache = {};
3731 }
3732
3733 try_set_flags(entity, false);
3734 handle_DependsOn(entity, false);
3735
3736 // Update the Is relationship base counter if necessary
3737 if (entity.pair() && entity.id() == Is.id()) {
3738 auto e = m_world.try_get(entity.gen());
3739 if (e != EntityBad) {
3740 m_world.unlink_live_is_relation(m_entity, e);
3741 }
3742 }
3743
3744 if (isDontFragmentPair) {
3745 const auto relation = m_world.try_get(entity.id());
3746 const auto target = m_world.try_get(entity.gen());
3747 if (relation != EntityBad && target != EntityBad)
3748 (void)m_world.exclusive_adjunct_del(m_entity, relation, target);
3749 } else {
3750 m_pArchetype = m_world.foc_archetype_del_no_graph(m_pArchetype, entity);
3751 note_graph_edge(entity, false);
3752 }
3753
3754#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
3755 tl_del_comps.push_back(entity);
3756#endif
3757 }
3758
3759 void add_inter(Entity entity) {
3760 GAIA_ASSERT(!is_wildcard(entity));
3761
3762 if (entity.pair()) {
3763 // Make sure the entity container record exists if it is a pair
3764 m_world.assign_pair(entity, *m_world.m_pEntityArchetype);
3765 }
3766
3767 if (!handle_add_entity(entity))
3768 return;
3769
3770 handle_add<false>(entity);
3771 }
3772
3773 void note_graph_edge(Entity entity, bool isAdd) {
3774 ++m_graphEdgeOpCount;
3775 m_graphEdgeEntity = entity;
3776 m_graphEdgeIsAdd = isAdd;
3777 }
3778
3779 void reset_graph_edge_tracking() {
3780 m_graphEdgeEntity = EntityBad;
3781 m_graphEdgeOpCount = 0;
3782 m_graphEdgeIsAdd = false;
3783 }
3784
3787 static void rebuild_graph_edge(Archetype* pArchetypeLeft, Archetype* pArchetypeRight, Entity entity) {
3788 pArchetypeLeft->del_graph_edge_right_local(entity);
3789 pArchetypeRight->del_graph_edge_left_local(entity);
3790 pArchetypeLeft->build_graph_edges(pArchetypeRight, entity);
3791 }
3792
3793 void add_inter_init(Entity entity) {
3794 GAIA_ASSERT(!is_wildcard(entity));
3795
3796 if (entity.pair()) {
3797 // Make sure the entity container record exists if it is a pair
3798 m_world.assign_pair(entity, *m_world.m_pEntityArchetype);
3799 }
3800
3801 if (!handle_add_entity(entity))
3802 return;
3803
3804 handle_add<true>(entity);
3805 }
3806
3807 GAIA_NODISCARD bool can_del(Entity entity) const noexcept {
3808 if (has_Requires_tgt(entity))
3809 return false;
3810
3811 return true;
3812 }
3813
3814 GAIA_NODISCARD bool is_sticky_component_trait(Entity entity) const noexcept {
3815 if (entity.pair() || !m_entity.comp())
3816 return false;
3817
3818 return entity.id() == DontFragment.id() || entity.id() == Sparse.id();
3819 }
3820
3821 bool del_inter(Entity entity) {
3822 if (is_sticky_component_trait(entity))
3823 return true;
3824
3825 if (!can_del(entity))
3826 return false;
3827
3828 handle_del(entity);
3829 return true;
3830 }
3831
3832 void del_name_inter(EntityNameLookupKey key) {
3833 const auto it = m_world.m_nameToEntity.find(key);
3834 // If the assert is hit it means the pointer to the name string was invalidated or became dangling.
3835 // That should not be possible for strings managed internally so the only other option is user-managed
3836 // strings are broken.
3837 GAIA_ASSERT(it != m_world.m_nameToEntity.end());
3838 if (it != m_world.m_nameToEntity.end()) {
3839 // Release memory allocated for the string if we own it
3840 if (it->first.owned())
3841 mem::mem_free((void*)key.str());
3842
3843 m_world.m_nameToEntity.erase(it);
3844 }
3845 }
3846
3847 void del_alias_inter(EntityNameLookupKey key) {
3848 const auto it = m_world.m_aliasToEntity.find(key);
3849 // If the assert is hit it means the pointer to the name string was invalidated or became dangling.
3850 // That should not be possible for strings managed internally so the only other option is user-managed
3851 // strings are broken.
3852 GAIA_ASSERT(it != m_world.m_aliasToEntity.end());
3853 if (it != m_world.m_aliasToEntity.end()) {
3854 // Release memory allocated for the string if we own it
3855 if (it->first.owned())
3856 mem::mem_free((void*)key.str());
3857
3858 m_world.m_aliasToEntity.erase(it);
3859 }
3860 }
3861
3862 template <bool IsOwned>
3863 void name_inter(const char* name, uint32_t len) {
3865 GAIA_ASSERT(!m_entity.pair());
3866 if (m_entity.pair())
3867 return;
3868
3869 // When nullptr is passed for the name it means the user wants to delete the current one
3870 if (name == nullptr) {
3871 GAIA_ASSERT(len == 0);
3872 del_name();
3873 return;
3874 }
3875
3876 GAIA_ASSERT(len < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
3877
3878 // Make sure the name does not contain a dot because this character is reserved for
3879 // hierarchical lookups, e.g. "parent.child.subchild".
3880 GAIA_FOR(len) {
3881 const bool hasInvalidCharacter = name[i] == '.';
3882 GAIA_ASSERT(!hasInvalidCharacter && "Character '.' can't be used in entity names");
3883 if (hasInvalidCharacter)
3884 return;
3885 }
3886
3887 EntityNameLookupKey key(
3888 name, len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(name, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len, IsOwned);
3889
3890 // Make sure the name is unique. Ignore setting the same name twice on the same entity.
3891 // If it is not, there is nothing to do.
3892 auto it = m_world.m_nameToEntity.find(key);
3893 if (it == m_world.m_nameToEntity.end()) {
3894 // If we already had some name, remove the pair from the map first.
3895 if (m_targetNameKey.str() != nullptr) {
3896 del_name_inter(m_targetNameKey);
3897 } else {
3898 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(m_pArchetypeSrc->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3899 if (compIdx != BadIndex) {
3900 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr_mut(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3901 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
3902 if (pDesc->name != nullptr) {
3903 del_name_inter(EntityNameLookupKey(pDesc->name, pDesc->name_len, 0));
3904 pDesc->name = nullptr;
3905 }
3906 } else {
3907 // Make sure EntityDesc is added to the entity.
3908 add_inter(GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3909 }
3910 }
3911
3912 // Insert the new pair
3913 it = m_world.m_nameToEntity.emplace(key, m_entity).first;
3914 } else {
3915#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3916 if (it->second != m_entity && World::s_enableUniqueNameDuplicateAssert)
3917 GAIA_ASSERT(false && "Trying to set non-unique name for an entity");
3918#endif
3919
3920 // Attempts to set the same name again, or not a unique name, will be dropped.
3921 return;
3922 }
3923
3924 if constexpr (IsOwned) {
3925 // Allocate enough storage for the name
3926 char* entityStr = (char*)mem::mem_alloc(key.len() + 1);
3927 memcpy((void*)entityStr, (const void*)name, key.len());
3928 entityStr[key.len()] = 0;
3929
3930 m_targetNameKey = EntityNameLookupKey(entityStr, key.len(), 1, {key.hash()});
3931
3932 // Update the map so it points to the newly allocated string.
3933 // We replace the pointer we provided in try_emplace with an internally allocated string.
3934 auto p = robin_hood::pair(std::make_pair(m_targetNameKey, m_entity));
3935 it->swap(p);
3936 } else {
3937 m_targetNameKey = key;
3938
3939 // We tell the map the string is non-owned.
3940 auto p = robin_hood::pair(std::make_pair(key, m_entity));
3941 it->swap(p);
3942 }
3943
3944 m_world.invalidate_scope_path_cache();
3945 }
3946
3947 template <bool IsOwned>
3948 void alias_inter(const char* alias, uint32_t len) {
3950 GAIA_ASSERT(!m_entity.pair());
3951 if (m_entity.pair())
3952 return;
3953
3954 // When nullptr is passed for the alias it means the user wants to delete the current one
3955 if (alias == nullptr) {
3956 GAIA_ASSERT(len == 0);
3957 del_alias();
3958 return;
3959 }
3960
3961 GAIA_ASSERT(len < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
3962
3963 // Make sure the name does not contain a dot because this character is reserved for
3964 // hierarchical lookups, e.g. "parent.child.subchild".
3965 GAIA_FOR(len) {
3966 const bool hasInvalidCharacter = alias[i] == '.';
3967 GAIA_ASSERT(!hasInvalidCharacter && "Character '.' can't be used in entity aliases");
3968 if (hasInvalidCharacter)
3969 return;
3970 }
3971
3972 EntityNameLookupKey key(
3973 alias, len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(alias, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len, IsOwned);
3974
3975 auto it = m_world.m_aliasToEntity.find(key);
3976 if (it == m_world.m_aliasToEntity.end()) {
3977 // If we already had some alias, remove the pair from the map first.
3978 if (m_targetAliasKey.str() != nullptr) {
3979 del_alias_inter(m_targetAliasKey);
3980 } else {
3981 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(m_pArchetypeSrc->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3982 if (compIdx != BadIndex) {
3983 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(m_pChunkSrc->comp_ptr_mut(compIdx, m_rowSrc));
3984 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
3985 if (pDesc->alias != nullptr) {
3986 del_alias_inter(EntityNameLookupKey(pDesc->alias, pDesc->alias_len, 0));
3987 pDesc->alias = nullptr;
3988 }
3989 } else {
3990 // Make sure EntityDesc is added to the entity.
3991 add_inter(GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
3992 }
3993 }
3994
3995 it = m_world.m_aliasToEntity.emplace(key, m_entity).first;
3996 } else {
3997#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
3998 if (it->second != m_entity && World::s_enableUniqueNameDuplicateAssert)
3999 GAIA_ASSERT(false && "Trying to set non-unique alias for an entity");
4000#endif
4001
4002 // Attempts to set the same alias again, or not a unique alias, will be dropped.
4003 return;
4004 }
4005
4006 if constexpr (IsOwned) {
4007 // Allocate enough storage for the alias
4008 char* aliasStr = (char*)mem::mem_alloc(key.len() + 1);
4009 memcpy((void*)aliasStr, (const void*)alias, key.len());
4010 aliasStr[key.len()] = 0;
4011
4012 m_targetAliasKey = EntityNameLookupKey(aliasStr, key.len(), 1, {key.hash()});
4013
4014 // Update the map so it points to the newly allocated string.
4015 // We replace the pointer we provided in try_emplace with an internally allocated string.
4016 auto p = robin_hood::pair(std::make_pair(m_targetAliasKey, m_entity));
4017 it->swap(p);
4018 } else {
4019 m_targetAliasKey = key;
4020
4021 // We tell the map the string is non-owned.
4022 auto p = robin_hood::pair(std::make_pair(key, m_entity));
4023 it->swap(p);
4024 }
4025 }
4026 };
4027
4028 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4029
4032 GAIA_NODISCARD ComponentCache& comp_cache_mut() {
4033 return m_compCache;
4034 }
4035
4038 GAIA_NODISCARD const ComponentCache& comp_cache() const {
4039 return m_compCache;
4040 }
4041
4042 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4043
4048 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity symbol(const char* symbol, uint32_t len = 0) const {
4049 if (symbol == nullptr || symbol[0] == 0)
4050 return EntityBad;
4051
4052 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().symbol(symbol, len);
4053 return pItem != nullptr ? pItem->entity : EntityBad;
4054 }
4055
4059 GAIA_NODISCARD util::str_view symbol(Entity component) const {
4060 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find(component);
4061 return pItem != nullptr ? comp_cache().symbol_name(*pItem) : util::str_view{};
4062 }
4063
4068 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity path(const char* path, uint32_t len = 0) const {
4069 if (path == nullptr || path[0] == 0)
4070 return EntityBad;
4071
4072 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().path(path, len);
4073 return pItem != nullptr ? pItem->entity : EntityBad;
4074 }
4075
4079 GAIA_NODISCARD util::str_view path(Entity component) const {
4080 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find(component);
4081 return pItem != nullptr ? comp_cache().path_name(*pItem) : util::str_view{};
4082 }
4083
4089 bool path(Entity component, const char* path, uint32_t len = 0) {
4090 auto* pItem = comp_cache_mut().find(component);
4091 return pItem != nullptr ? comp_cache_mut().path(*pItem, path, len) : false;
4092 }
4093
4098 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity alias(const char* alias, uint32_t len = 0) const {
4099 if (alias == nullptr || alias[0] == 0)
4100 return EntityBad;
4101
4102 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(alias, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
4103 GAIA_ASSERT(l < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
4104 const auto it = m_aliasToEntity.find(EntityNameLookupKey(alias, l, 0));
4105 return it != m_aliasToEntity.end() ? it->second : EntityBad;
4106 }
4107
4111 GAIA_NODISCARD util::str_view alias(Entity entity) const {
4112 if (entity.pair())
4113 return {};
4114
4115 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
4116 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
4117 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
4118 return {};
4119
4120 const auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<const EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr(compIdx, ec.row));
4121 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
4122 return {pDesc->alias, pDesc->alias_len};
4123 }
4124
4130 bool alias(Entity entity, const char* alias, uint32_t len = 0) {
4131 if (!valid(entity) || entity.pair())
4132 return false;
4133
4134 const auto before = this->alias(entity);
4135 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).alias(alias, len);
4136 const auto after = this->alias(entity);
4137 if (alias == nullptr)
4138 return !before.empty() && after.empty();
4139
4140 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(alias, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
4141 return after == util::str_view(alias, l);
4142 }
4143
4149 bool alias_raw(Entity entity, const char* alias, uint32_t len = 0) {
4150 if (!valid(entity) || entity.pair())
4151 return false;
4152
4153 const auto before = this->alias(entity);
4154 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).alias_raw(alias, len);
4155 const auto after = this->alias(entity);
4156 if (alias == nullptr)
4157 return !before.empty() && after.empty();
4158
4159 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(alias, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
4160 return after == util::str_view(alias, l);
4161 }
4162
4167 GAIA_NODISCARD util::str_view display_name(Entity entity) const {
4168 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find(entity);
4169 if (pItem == nullptr)
4170 return {};
4171
4172 const auto aliasValue = alias(entity);
4173 if (!aliasValue.empty())
4174 return aliasValue;
4175
4176 const auto pathValue = path(entity);
4177 if (!pathValue.empty()) {
4178 const auto symbolEntity = symbol(pathValue.data(), pathValue.size());
4179 if (symbolEntity == EntityBad || symbolEntity == entity)
4180 return pathValue;
4181 }
4182
4183 return symbol(entity);
4184 }
4185
4186 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4187
4188 private:
4189 void invalidate_scope_path_cache() const {
4190 m_componentScopePathCache.clear();
4191 m_componentScopePathCacheEntity = EntityBad;
4192 m_componentScopePathCacheValid = false;
4193 }
4194
4199 GAIA_NODISCARD bool build_scope_path(Entity scope, util::str& out) const {
4200 out.clear();
4201 if (!valid(scope) || scope.pair())
4202 return false;
4203
4204 cnt::darray_ext<util::str_view, 16> segments;
4205 auto curr = scope;
4206 while (curr != EntityBad) {
4207 const auto currName = name(curr);
4208 if (currName.empty()) {
4209 out.clear();
4210 return false;
4211 }
4212
4213 segments.push_back(currName);
4214 curr = target(curr, ChildOf);
4215 }
4216
4217 if (segments.empty())
4218 return false;
4219
4220 uint32_t totalLen = 0;
4221 for (auto segment: segments)
4222 totalLen += segment.size();
4223 totalLen += (uint32_t)segments.size() - 1;
4224
4225 out.reserve(totalLen);
4226 for (uint32_t i = (uint32_t)segments.size(); i > 0; --i) {
4227 if (!out.empty())
4228 out.append('.');
4229 out.append(segments[i - 1]);
4230 }
4231
4232 return true;
4233 }
4234
4238 GAIA_NODISCARD bool current_scope_path(util::str& out) const {
4239 if (m_componentScope == EntityBad) {
4240 invalidate_scope_path_cache();
4241 out.clear();
4242 return false;
4243 }
4244
4245 if (m_componentScopePathCacheValid && m_componentScopePathCacheEntity == m_componentScope) {
4246 out.assign(m_componentScopePathCache.view());
4247 return true;
4248 }
4249
4250 if (!build_scope_path(m_componentScope, out)) {
4251 invalidate_scope_path_cache();
4252 return false;
4253 }
4254
4255 m_componentScopePathCache.assign(out.view());
4256 m_componentScopePathCacheEntity = m_componentScope;
4257 m_componentScopePathCacheValid = true;
4258 return true;
4259 }
4260
4261 template <typename Func>
4262 bool find_component_in_scope_chain_inter(Entity scopeEntity, const char* name, uint32_t len, Func&& func) const {
4263 if (scopeEntity == EntityBad)
4264 return false;
4265
4266 util::str scopePath;
4267 if (!build_scope_path(scopeEntity, scopePath))
4268 return false;
4269
4270 util::str scopedName;
4271 scopedName.reserve(scopePath.size() + 1 + len);
4272
4273 while (!scopePath.empty()) {
4274 scopedName.clear();
4275 scopedName.append(scopePath.view());
4276 scopedName.append('.');
4277 scopedName.append(name, len);
4278
4279 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.path(scopedName.data(), (uint32_t)scopedName.size()); pItem != nullptr) {
4280 if (func(*pItem))
4281 return true;
4282 }
4283
4284 const auto parentSepIdx = scopePath.view().find_last_of('.');
4285 if (parentSepIdx == BadIndex)
4286 break;
4287
4288 scopePath.assign(util::str_view(scopePath.data(), parentSepIdx));
4289 }
4290
4291 return false;
4292 }
4293
4301 GAIA_NODISCARD const ComponentCacheItem* resolve_component_name_inter(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
4302 GAIA_ASSERT(name != nullptr);
4303
4304 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(name, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
4305 GAIA_ASSERT(l < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
4306 const bool isPath = memchr(name, '.', l) != nullptr;
4307 const bool isSymbol = memchr(name, ':', l) != nullptr;
4308
4309 if (isPath) {
4310 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.path(name, l); pItem != nullptr)
4311 return pItem;
4312 }
4313
4314 if (!isPath && !isSymbol) {
4315 const auto* pFound = (const ComponentCacheItem*)nullptr;
4316 const auto findAndStore = [&](const ComponentCacheItem& item) {
4317 pFound = &item;
4318 return true;
4319 };
4320 if (find_component_in_scope_chain_inter(m_componentScope, name, l, findAndStore))
4321 return pFound;
4322
4323 for (const auto scopeEntity: m_componentLookupPath) {
4324 if (scopeEntity == m_componentScope)
4325 continue;
4326 if (find_component_in_scope_chain_inter(scopeEntity, name, l, findAndStore))
4327 return pFound;
4328 }
4329 }
4330
4331 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.symbol(name, l); pItem != nullptr)
4332 return pItem;
4333
4334 if (!isPath) {
4335 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.path(name, l); pItem != nullptr)
4336 return pItem;
4337 if (!isSymbol) {
4338 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.short_symbol(name, l); pItem != nullptr)
4339 return pItem;
4340 }
4341 }
4342
4343 const auto aliasEntity = alias(name, l);
4344 return aliasEntity != EntityBad ? m_compCache.find(aliasEntity) : nullptr;
4345 }
4346
4347 public:
4348 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4349
4353 GAIA_NODISCARD bool valid(Entity entity) const {
4354 return entity.pair() //
4355 ? valid_pair(entity)
4356 : valid_entity(entity);
4357 }
4358
4359 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4360
4364 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity get(EntityId id) const {
4365 // Cleanup, observer propagation, and wildcard expansion can briefly encounter stale ids.
4366 // Treat those as absent instead of crashing the world.
4367 if (!valid_entity_id(id))
4368 return EntityBad;
4369
4370 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[id];
4371 return Entity(id, ec.data.gen, (bool)ec.data.ent, (bool)ec.data.pair, (EntityKind)ec.data.kind);
4372 }
4373
4375 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity try_get(EntityId id) const {
4376 return valid_entity_id(id) ? get(id) : EntityBad;
4377 }
4378
4382 template <typename T>
4383 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity get() const {
4384 return comp_cache().get<T>().entity;
4385 }
4386
4390 template <typename T>
4391 GAIA_NODISCARD const ComponentCacheItem& reg_comp() {
4392#if GAIA_ECS_AUTO_COMPONENT_REGISTRATION
4393 return add<T>();
4394#else
4395 return comp_cache().template get<T>();
4396#endif
4397 }
4398
4399 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4400
4405 EntityBuilder build(Entity entity) {
4406 return EntityBuilder(*this, entity);
4407 }
4408
4412 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity add(EntityKind kind = EntityKind::EK_Gen) {
4413 return add(*m_pEntityArchetype, true, false, kind);
4414 }
4415
4419 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity prefab(EntityKind kind = EntityKind::EK_Gen) {
4420 const auto entity = add(kind);
4421 add(entity, Prefab);
4422 return entity;
4423 }
4424
4428 template <typename Func = TFunc_Void_With_Entity>
4429 void add_n(uint32_t count, Func func = func_void_with_entity) {
4430 add_entity_n(*m_pEntityArchetype, count, func);
4431 }
4432
4438 template <typename Func = TFunc_Void_With_Entity>
4439 void add_n(Entity entity, uint32_t count, Func func = func_void_with_entity) {
4440 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
4441
4442 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pArchetype != nullptr);
4443 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk != nullptr);
4444
4445 add_entity_n(*ec.pArchetype, count, func);
4446 }
4447
4451 template <typename T>
4452 GAIA_NODISCARD const ComponentCacheItem& add() {
4453 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value, "Pairs can't be registered as components");
4454
4455 using CT = component_type_t<T>;
4456 using FT = typename CT::TypeFull;
4457 constexpr auto kind = CT::Kind;
4458
4459 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find<FT>();
4460 if (pItem != nullptr)
4461 return *pItem;
4462
4463 const auto entity = add(*m_pCompArchetype, false, false, kind);
4464 util::str scopePath;
4465 (void)current_scope_path(scopePath);
4466
4467 const auto& item = comp_cache_mut().add<FT>(entity, scopePath.view());
4468 sset<Component>(item.entity) = item.comp;
4469 // Register the default component symbol through the normal entity naming path.
4470 name_raw(item.entity, item.name.str(), item.name.len());
4471#if GAIA_ECS_AUTO_COMPONENT_SCHEMA
4472 auto_populate_component_schema<FT>(comp_cache_mut().get(item.entity));
4473#endif
4474
4475 return item;
4476 }
4477
4488 GAIA_NODISCARD const ComponentCacheItem&
4489 add(const char* name, uint32_t size, DataStorageType storageType, uint32_t alig = 1, uint32_t soa = 0,
4490 const uint8_t* pSoaSizes = nullptr, ComponentLookupHash hashLookup = {},
4491 EntityKind kind = EntityKind::EK_Gen) {
4492 GAIA_ASSERT(name != nullptr);
4493
4494 const auto len = (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(name, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
4495 GAIA_ASSERT(len > 0 && len < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
4496
4497 if (const auto* pItem = comp_cache().symbol(name, len); pItem != nullptr)
4498 return *pItem;
4499
4500 const auto entity = add(*m_pCompArchetype, false, false, kind);
4501 util::str scopePath;
4502 (void)current_scope_path(scopePath);
4503 const auto& item = comp_cache_mut().add(
4504 entity, name, len, size, storageType, alig, soa, pSoaSizes, hashLookup, scopePath.view());
4505 {
4506 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[item.entity.id()];
4507 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pArchetype->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(Component));
4508 GAIA_ASSERT(compIdx != BadIndex);
4509 auto* pComp = reinterpret_cast<Component*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut(compIdx, ec.row));
4510 *pComp = item.comp;
4511 }
4512 // Register the default component symbol through the normal entity naming path.
4513 name_raw(item.entity, item.name.str(), item.name.len());
4514 if (item.comp.storage_type() == DataStorageType::Sparse)
4515 add(item.entity, Sparse);
4516 return item;
4517 }
4518
4523 void add(Entity entity, Entity object) {
4524#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
4525 if (!object.pair()) {
4526 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find(object);
4527 if (pItem != nullptr && pItem->entity == object && is_out_of_line_component(object))
4528 GAIA_ASSERT2(
4529 false, "Out-of-line runtime components require an explicit typed value when added by entity id");
4530 }
4531#endif
4532 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).add(object);
4533 }
4534
4540 void add(Entity entity, Pair pair) {
4541 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).add(pair);
4542 }
4543
4549 template <typename T>
4550 void add(Entity entity) {
4551 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
4552 const auto& item = add<FT>();
4553 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
4554 if (is_out_of_line_component(item.entity)) {
4555 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(item.entity)) {
4556 (void)sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(item.entity).add(entity);
4557 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).add<T>();
4558 return;
4559 }
4560#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4561 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff(
4562 *this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&item.entity, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
4563#endif
4564 (void)sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(item.entity).add(entity);
4565 notify_add_single(entity, item.entity);
4566#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4567 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
4568#endif
4569 return;
4570 }
4571 }
4572
4573 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).add<T>();
4574 }
4575
4583 template <typename T>
4584 void add(Entity entity, Entity object, T&& value) {
4585 static_assert(core::is_raw_v<T>);
4586
4587 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull>()) {
4588 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
4589 if (can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(object)) {
4590 auto& data = sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(object).add(entity);
4591 data = GAIA_FWD(value);
4592
4593 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(object)) {
4594#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4595 auto addDiffCtx =
4596 m_observers.prepare_diff(*this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&object, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
4597#endif
4598 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
4599 eb.add_inter_init(object);
4600 eb.commit();
4601 notify_add_single(entity, object);
4602#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4603 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
4604#endif
4605 return;
4606 }
4607#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4608 auto addDiffCtx =
4609 m_observers.prepare_diff(*this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&object, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
4610#endif
4611 notify_add_single(entity, object);
4612#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4613 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
4614#endif
4615 return;
4616 }
4617 }
4618
4619 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
4620 eb.add_inter_init(object);
4621 eb.commit();
4622
4623 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
4624 // Make sure the idx is 0 for unique entities
4625 const auto idx = uint16_t(ec.row * (1U - (uint32_t)object.kind()));
4626 ComponentSetter{*this, ec.pChunk, entity, idx}.sset(object, GAIA_FWD(value));
4627 notify_add_single(entity, object);
4628 }
4629
4636 template <typename T, typename U = typename actual_type_t<T>::Type>
4637 void add(Entity entity, U&& value) {
4638 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
4639 if constexpr (!is_pair<FT>::value && supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
4640 const auto& item = add<FT>();
4641 if (is_out_of_line_component(item.entity)) {
4642 auto& data = sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(item.entity).add(entity);
4643 data = GAIA_FWD(value);
4644
4645 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(item.entity)) {
4646 EntityBuilder builder(*this, entity);
4647 builder.add(item.entity);
4648 builder.commit();
4649 return;
4650 }
4651#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4652 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff(
4653 *this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&item.entity, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
4654#endif
4655 notify_add_single(entity, item.entity);
4656#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4657 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
4658#endif
4659 return;
4660 }
4661 }
4662
4663 EntityBuilder builder(*this, entity);
4664 auto object = builder.register_component<T>();
4665 builder.add(object);
4666 builder.commit();
4667
4668 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
4669 // Make sure the idx is 0 for unique entities
4670 const auto idx = uint16_t(ec.row * (1U - (uint32_t)object.kind()));
4671 ComponentSetter{*this, ec.pChunk, entity, idx}.sset<T>(GAIA_FWD(value));
4672 }
4673
4676 GAIA_NODISCARD bool override(Entity entity, Entity object) {
4677 return override_inter(entity, object);
4678 }
4679
4682 GAIA_NODISCARD bool override(Entity entity, Pair pair) {
4683 return override_inter(entity, (Entity)pair);
4684 }
4685
4688 template <typename T>
4689 GAIA_NODISCARD bool override(Entity entity) {
4690 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
4691 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
4692 const auto& item = add<FT>();
4693
4694 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
4695 if (is_out_of_line_component(item.entity)) {
4696 if (has_direct(entity, item.entity))
4697 return false;
4698
4699 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, item.entity);
4700 if (inheritedOwner == EntityBad)
4701 return false;
4702
4703 auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<FT>(item.entity);
4704 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
4705 auto& data = sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(item.entity).add(entity);
4706 data = pStore->get(inheritedOwner);
4707
4708 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(item.entity)) {
4709 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
4710 eb.add_inter_init(item.entity);
4711 eb.commit();
4712 }
4713 return true;
4714 }
4715 }
4716
4717 return override_inter(entity, item.entity);
4718 }
4719
4722 template <typename T>
4723 GAIA_NODISCARD bool override(Entity entity, Entity object) {
4724 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
4725 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
4726
4727 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
4728 if (can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(object)) {
4729 if (has_direct(entity, object))
4730 return false;
4731
4732 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, object);
4733 if (inheritedOwner == EntityBad)
4734 return false;
4735
4736 auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<FT>(object);
4737 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
4738 auto& data = sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(object).add(entity);
4739 data = pStore->get(inheritedOwner);
4740
4741 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(object)) {
4742 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
4743 eb.add_inter_init(object);
4744 eb.commit();
4745 }
4746 return true;
4747 }
4748 }
4749
4750 return override_inter(entity, object);
4751 }
4752
4753 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4754
4759 void clear(Entity entity) {
4760 GAIA_ASSERT(!entity.pair());
4761 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
4762
4763 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
4764
4765 // Remove back to front because it's better for the archetype graph
4766 auto ids = eb.m_pArchetype->ids_view();
4767 for (uint32_t i = (uint32_t)ids.size() - 1; i != (uint32_t)-1; --i)
4768 eb.del(ids[i]);
4769
4770 eb.commit();
4771 }
4772
4773 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
4774
4782 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity copy(Entity srcEntity) {
4783 GAIA_ASSERT(!srcEntity.pair());
4784 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(srcEntity));
4785
4786 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[srcEntity.id()];
4787 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pArchetype != nullptr);
4788 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk != nullptr);
4789
4790 auto* pDstArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
4791 Entity dstEntity;
4792
4793 // Names have to be unique so if we see that EntityDesc is present during copy
4794 // we navigate towards a version of the archetype without the EntityDesc.
4795 if (pDstArchetype->has<EntityDesc>()) {
4796 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
4797
4798 dstEntity = add(*pDstArchetype, srcEntity.entity(), srcEntity.pair(), srcEntity.kind());
4799 auto& ecDst = m_recs.entities[dstEntity.id()];
4800 Chunk::copy_foreign_entity_data(ec.pChunk, ec.row, ecDst.pChunk, ecDst.row);
4801 } else {
4802 // No description associated with the entity, direct copy is possible
4803 dstEntity = add(*pDstArchetype, srcEntity.entity(), srcEntity.pair(), srcEntity.kind());
4804 Chunk::copy_entity_data(srcEntity, dstEntity, m_recs);
4805 }
4806
4807 copy_sparse_entity_data(srcEntity, dstEntity, [](Entity) {
4808 return true;
4809 });
4810
4811 return dstEntity;
4812 }
4813
4823 template <typename Func = TFunc_Void_With_Entity>
4824 void copy_n(Entity entity, uint32_t count, Func func = func_void_with_entity) {
4825 copy_n_inter(entity, count, func, EntitySpan{});
4826 }
4827
4828#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4836 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity copy_ext(Entity srcEntity) {
4837 GAIA_ASSERT(!srcEntity.pair());
4838 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(srcEntity));
4839
4840 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[srcEntity.id()];
4841 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pArchetype != nullptr);
4842 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk != nullptr);
4843
4844 auto* pDstArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
4845 // Names have to be unique so if we see that EntityDesc is present during copy
4846 // we navigate towards a version of the archetype without the EntityDesc.
4847 const bool hasEntityDesc = pDstArchetype->has<EntityDesc>();
4848 if (hasEntityDesc)
4849 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
4850
4851 const auto archetypeIdCount = (uint32_t)pDstArchetype->ids_view().size();
4852 const auto sparseIdCount = copied_sparse_id_count(srcEntity, [](Entity) {
4853 return true;
4854 });
4855 const auto addedIdCount = archetypeIdCount + sparseIdCount;
4856 auto* pAddedIds = addedIdCount != 0U ? (Entity*)alloca(sizeof(Entity) * addedIdCount) : nullptr;
4857 write_archetype_ids(*pDstArchetype, pAddedIds);
4858 write_copied_sparse_ids(
4859 srcEntity,
4860 [](Entity) {
4861 return true;
4862 },
4863 pAddedIds + archetypeIdCount);
4864 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4865 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff_add_new(*this, EntitySpan{pAddedIds, addedIdCount});
4866 #endif
4867
4868 Entity dstEntity;
4869 if (hasEntityDesc) {
4870 dstEntity = add(*pDstArchetype, srcEntity.entity(), srcEntity.pair(), srcEntity.kind());
4871 auto& ecDst = m_recs.entities[dstEntity.id()];
4872 Chunk::copy_foreign_entity_data(ec.pChunk, ec.row, ecDst.pChunk, ecDst.row);
4873 } else {
4874 // No description associated with the entity, direct copy is possible
4875 dstEntity = add(*pDstArchetype, srcEntity.entity(), srcEntity.pair(), srcEntity.kind());
4876 Chunk::copy_entity_data(srcEntity, dstEntity, m_recs);
4877 }
4878
4879 (void)copy_sparse_entity_data(srcEntity, dstEntity, [](Entity) {
4880 return true;
4881 });
4882 m_observers.append_diff_targets(*this, addDiffCtx, EntitySpan{&dstEntity, 1});
4883
4884 m_observers.on_add(*this, *pDstArchetype, EntitySpan{pAddedIds, addedIdCount}, EntitySpan{&dstEntity, 1});
4885 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4886 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
4887 #endif
4888
4889 return dstEntity;
4890 }
4891
4901 template <typename Func = TFunc_Void_With_Entity>
4902 void copy_ext_n(Entity entity, uint32_t count, Func func = func_void_with_entity) {
4903 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
4904 auto* pDstArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
4905 if (pDstArchetype->has<EntityDesc>())
4906 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
4907
4908 const auto archetypeIdCount = (uint32_t)pDstArchetype->ids_view().size();
4909 const auto sparseIdCount = copied_sparse_id_count(entity, [](Entity) {
4910 return true;
4911 });
4912 const auto addedIdCount = archetypeIdCount + sparseIdCount;
4913 auto* pAddedIds = addedIdCount != 0U ? (Entity*)alloca(sizeof(Entity) * addedIdCount) : nullptr;
4914 write_archetype_ids(*pDstArchetype, pAddedIds);
4915 write_copied_sparse_ids(
4916 entity,
4917 [](Entity) {
4918 return true;
4919 },
4920 pAddedIds + archetypeIdCount);
4921 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4922 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff_add_new(*this, EntitySpan{pAddedIds, addedIdCount});
4923 #endif
4924 copy_n_inter(
4925 entity, count, func, EntitySpan{pAddedIds, addedIdCount}, EntityBad
4926 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4927 ,
4928 &addDiffCtx
4929 #endif
4930 );
4931 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
4932 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
4933 #endif
4934 }
4935#endif
4936
4937 private:
4938 struct CopyIterGroupState {
4939 Archetype* pArchetype = nullptr;
4940 Chunk* pChunk = nullptr;
4941 uint16_t startRow = 0;
4942 uint16_t count = 0;
4943 };
4944
4945 struct PrefabInstantiatePlanNode {
4946 Entity prefab = EntityBad;
4947 uint32_t parentIdx = BadIndex;
4948 Archetype* pDstArchetype = nullptr;
4949 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> copiedSparseIds;
4950 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> addedIds;
4951 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> addHookIds;
4952 };
4953
4954 template <typename Func>
4955 void invoke_copy_batch_callback(
4956 Func& func, Archetype* pDstArchetype, Chunk* pDstChunk, uint32_t originalChunkSize, uint32_t toCreate) {
4957 if constexpr (std::is_invocable_v<Func, CopyIter&>) {
4958 CopyIter it;
4959 it.set_world(this);
4960 it.set_archetype(pDstArchetype);
4961 it.set_chunk(pDstChunk);
4962 it.set_range((uint16_t)originalChunkSize, (uint16_t)toCreate);
4963 func(it);
4964 } else {
4965 auto entities = pDstChunk->entity_view();
4966 GAIA_FOR2(originalChunkSize, pDstChunk->size()) func(entities[i]);
4967 }
4968 }
4969
4970 template <typename Func>
4971 void flush_copy_iter_group(Func& func, CopyIterGroupState& group) {
4972 if (group.count == 0)
4973 return;
4974
4975 CopyIter it;
4976 it.set_world(this);
4977 it.set_archetype(group.pArchetype);
4978 it.set_chunk(group.pChunk);
4979 it.set_range(group.startRow, group.count);
4980 func(it);
4981 group.count = 0;
4982 }
4983
4984 template <typename Func>
4985 void push_copy_iter_group(Func& func, CopyIterGroupState& group, Entity instance) {
4986 const auto& ec = fetch(instance);
4987
4988 if (group.count != 0 && ec.pArchetype == group.pArchetype && ec.pChunk == group.pChunk &&
4989 ec.row == uint16_t(group.startRow + group.count)) {
4990 ++group.count;
4991 return;
4992 }
4993
4994 flush_copy_iter_group(func, group);
4995 group.pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
4996 group.pChunk = ec.pChunk;
4997 group.startRow = ec.row;
4998 group.count = 1;
4999 }
5000
5001 void prepare_parent_batch(Entity parentEntity) {
5002 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(parentEntity));
5003
5004 const auto parentPair = Pair(Parent, parentEntity);
5005 assign_pair(parentPair, *m_pEntityArchetype);
5006
5007 touch_rel_version(Parent);
5008 invalidate_queries_for_rel(Parent);
5009 m_targetsTravCache = {};
5010 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
5011 m_depthOrderCache = {};
5012 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
5013 m_targetsAllCache = {};
5014
5015 auto& ecParent = fetch(parentEntity);
5016 EntityBuilder::set_flag(ecParent.flags, EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Delete, true);
5017 }
5018
5019 void parent_batch(
5020 Entity parentEntity, Archetype& archetype, Chunk& chunk, uint32_t originalChunkSize, uint32_t toCreate) {
5021 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(parentEntity));
5022
5023 if (toCreate == 0)
5024 return;
5025
5026 auto entities = chunk.entity_view();
5027#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5028 const Entity parentPair = Pair(Parent, parentEntity);
5029 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff(
5030 *this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&parentPair, 1},
5031 EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5032#endif
5033 GAIA_FOR2_(originalChunkSize, originalChunkSize + toCreate, rowIdx) {
5034 exclusive_adjunct_set(entities[rowIdx], Parent, parentEntity);
5035 }
5036
5037#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5038 m_observers.on_add(
5039 *this, archetype, EntitySpan{&parentPair, 1}, EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5040 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
5041#endif
5042 }
5043
5044 void parent_direct(Entity entity, Entity parentEntity) {
5045 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
5046 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(parentEntity));
5047
5048 prepare_parent_batch(parentEntity);
5049#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5050 const Entity parentPair = Pair(Parent, parentEntity);
5051 auto addDiffCtx =
5052 m_observers.prepare_diff(*this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&parentPair, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
5053#endif
5054 exclusive_adjunct_set(entity, Parent, parentEntity);
5055
5056#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5057 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
5058 m_observers.on_add(*this, *ec.pArchetype, EntitySpan{&parentPair, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
5059 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
5060#endif
5061 }
5062
5063 void notify_add_single(Entity entity, Entity object) {
5064#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5065 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (tearing_down())
5066 return;
5067
5068 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
5069
5070 lock();
5071
5072 #if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS
5073 if (object.comp()) {
5074 const auto& item = comp_cache().get(object);
5075 const auto& hooks = ComponentCache::hooks(item);
5076 if (hooks.func_add != nullptr)
5077 hooks.func_add(*this, item, entity);
5078 }
5079 #endif
5080
5081 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5082 m_observers.on_add(*this, *ec.pArchetype, EntitySpan{&object, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
5083 #endif
5084
5085 unlock();
5086#else
5087 (void)entity;
5088 (void)object;
5089#endif
5090 }
5091
5092 void notify_del_single(Entity entity, Entity object) {
5093#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5094 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (tearing_down())
5095 return;
5096
5097 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
5098
5099 lock();
5100
5101 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5102 m_observers.on_del(*this, *ec.pArchetype, EntitySpan{&object, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
5103 #endif
5104
5105 #if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS
5106 if (object.comp()) {
5107 const auto& item = comp_cache().get(object);
5108 const auto& hooks = ComponentCache::hooks(item);
5109 if (hooks.func_del != nullptr)
5110 hooks.func_del(*this, item, entity);
5111 }
5112 #endif
5113
5114 unlock();
5115#else
5116 (void)entity;
5117 (void)object;
5118#endif
5119 }
5120
5121 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_semantic_match_without_source(
5122 Entity entity, Entity object, Entity excludedSource, cnt::set<EntityLookupKey>& visited) const {
5123 const auto inserted = visited.insert(EntityLookupKey(entity));
5124 if (!inserted.second)
5125 return false;
5126
5127 if (entity != excludedSource && has_direct(entity, object))
5128 return true;
5129
5130 const auto it = m_entityToAsTargets.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
5131 if (it == m_entityToAsTargets.end())
5132 return false;
5133
5134 for (const auto baseKey: it->second) {
5135 if (has_semantic_match_without_source(baseKey.entity(), object, excludedSource, visited))
5136 return true;
5137 }
5138
5139 return false;
5140 }
5141
5142 void notify_inherited_del_dependents(Entity source, Entity object) {
5143#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5144 const auto& descendants = as_relations_trav_cache(source);
5145 for (const auto descendant: descendants) {
5146 if (descendant == source)
5147 continue;
5148 if (has_direct(descendant, object) || !has(descendant, object))
5149 continue;
5150
5151 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> visited;
5152 if (has_semantic_match_without_source(descendant, object, source, visited))
5153 continue;
5154
5155 notify_del_single(descendant, object);
5156 }
5157#else
5158 (void)source;
5159 (void)object;
5160#endif
5161 }
5162
5163 void notify_inherited_del_dependents(Entity source, EntitySpan removedObjects) {
5164 for (const auto object: removedObjects)
5165 notify_inherited_del_dependents(source, object);
5166 }
5167
5168 template <typename Func>
5169 void copy_n_inter(
5170 Entity entity, uint32_t count, Func& func, EntitySpan addedIds, Entity parentInstance = EntityBad
5171#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5172 ,
5173 ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx* pAddDiffCtx = nullptr
5174#endif
5175 ) {
5176 GAIA_ASSERT(!entity.pair());
5177 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
5178 GAIA_ASSERT(parentInstance == EntityBad || valid(parentInstance));
5179
5180 if (count == 0U)
5181 return;
5182
5183#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5184 const bool useLocalAddDiff = !addedIds.empty() && pAddDiffCtx == nullptr;
5185 ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx addDiffCtx{};
5186 if (useLocalAddDiff)
5187 addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff_add_new(*this, EntitySpan{addedIds});
5188#endif
5189
5190 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
5191
5192 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk != nullptr);
5193 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pArchetype != nullptr);
5194
5195 auto* pSrcChunk = ec.pChunk;
5196 auto* pDstArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
5197 const auto hasEntityDesc = pDstArchetype->has<EntityDesc>();
5198 if (hasEntityDesc)
5199 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
5200
5201 if (parentInstance != EntityBad)
5202 prepare_parent_batch(parentInstance);
5203
5204 // Entities array might get reallocated after m_recs.entities.alloc
5205 // so instead of fetching the container again we simply cache the row
5206 // of our source entity.
5207 const auto srcRow = ec.row;
5208
5209 EntityContainerCtx ctx{true, false, EntityKind::EK_Gen};
5210
5211 uint32_t left = count;
5212 do {
5213 auto* pDstChunk = pDstArchetype->foc_free_chunk();
5214 const uint32_t originalChunkSize = pDstChunk->size();
5215 const uint32_t freeSlotsInChunk = pDstChunk->capacity() - originalChunkSize;
5216 const uint32_t toCreate = core::get_min(freeSlotsInChunk, left);
5217
5218 GAIA_FOR(toCreate) {
5219 const auto entityNew = m_recs.entities.alloc(&ctx);
5220 auto& ecNew = m_recs.entities[entityNew.id()];
5221 store_entity(ecNew, entityNew, pDstArchetype, pDstChunk);
5222
5223#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
5224 GAIA_ASSERT(ecNew.pChunk == pDstChunk);
5225 auto entityExpected = pDstChunk->entity_view()[ecNew.row];
5226 GAIA_ASSERT(entityExpected == entityNew);
5227#endif
5228
5229 if (hasEntityDesc) {
5230 Chunk::copy_foreign_entity_data(pSrcChunk, srcRow, pDstChunk, ecNew.row);
5231 }
5232
5233 copy_sparse_entity_data(entity, entityNew, [](Entity) {
5234 return true;
5235 });
5236 }
5237
5238 pDstArchetype->try_update_free_chunk_idx();
5239
5240 if (!hasEntityDesc) {
5241 pDstChunk->call_gen_ctors(originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5242
5243 {
5244 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::copy_n_entity_data);
5245 Chunk::copy_entity_data_n_same_chunk(pSrcChunk, srcRow, pDstChunk, originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5246 }
5247 }
5248
5249 pDstChunk->update_versions();
5250
5251#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5252 if (!addedIds.empty()) {
5253 auto entities = pDstChunk->entity_view();
5254 if (pAddDiffCtx != nullptr)
5255 m_observers.append_diff_targets(
5256 *this, *pAddDiffCtx, EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5257 else if (useLocalAddDiff)
5258 m_observers.append_diff_targets(
5259 *this, addDiffCtx, EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5260 m_observers.on_add(
5261 *this, *pDstArchetype, addedIds, EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5262 }
5263#endif
5264
5265 if (parentInstance != EntityBad)
5266 parent_batch(parentInstance, *pDstArchetype, *pDstChunk, originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5267
5268 invoke_copy_batch_callback(func, pDstArchetype, pDstChunk, originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5269
5270 left -= toCreate;
5271 } while (left > 0);
5272#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5273 if (useLocalAddDiff)
5274 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
5275#endif
5276 }
5277
5278 GAIA_NODISCARD bool id_uses_inherit_policy(Entity id) const {
5279 return !is_wildcard(id) && valid(id) && target(id, OnInstantiate) == Inherit;
5280 }
5281
5282 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity inherited_id_owner(Entity entity, Entity id) const {
5283 if (!id_uses_inherit_policy(id))
5284 return EntityBad;
5285
5286 const auto& targets = as_targets_trav_cache(entity);
5287 for (const auto target: targets) {
5288 if (has_inter(target, id, false))
5289 return target;
5290 }
5291
5292 return EntityBad;
5293 }
5294
5295 GAIA_NODISCARD bool instantiate_copies_id(Entity id) const {
5296 const auto policy = target(id, OnInstantiate);
5297 if (policy == EntityBad || policy == Override)
5298 return true;
5299 if (policy == DontInherit || policy == Inherit)
5300 return false;
5301 return true;
5302 }
5303
5304 template <typename T>
5305 void gather_sorted_prefab_children(Entity prefabEntity, T& outChildren) {
5306 sources(Parent, prefabEntity, [&](Entity childPrefab) {
5307 if (!has_direct(childPrefab, Prefab))
5308 return;
5309 outChildren.push_back(childPrefab);
5310 });
5311
5312 core::sort(outChildren, [](Entity left, Entity right) {
5313 return left.id() < right.id();
5314 });
5315 }
5316
