5317 template <typename Func>
5318 uint32_t
5319 copy_sparse_entity_data(Entity srcEntity, Entity dstEntity, Func&& shouldCopy, Entity* pCopiedIds = nullptr) {
5320 uint32_t copiedCnt = 0;
5321 for (auto& [compKey, store]: m_sparseComponentsByComp) {
5322 const auto comp = compKey.entity();
5323 if (!store.func_has(store.pStore, srcEntity) || !shouldCopy(comp))
5324 continue;
5325
5326 GAIA_ASSERT(store.func_copy_entity != nullptr);
5327 if (!store.func_copy_entity(store.pStore, dstEntity, srcEntity))
5328 continue;
5329
5330 if (pCopiedIds != nullptr)
5331 pCopiedIds[copiedCnt] = comp;
5332 ++copiedCnt;
5333 }
5334
5335 return copiedCnt;
5336 }
5337
5338 uint32_t copy_sparse_entity_data(
5339 Entity srcEntity, Entity dstEntity, EntitySpan copiedSparseIds, Entity* pCopiedIds = nullptr) {
5340 uint32_t copiedCnt = 0;
5341 for (const auto comp: copiedSparseIds) {
5342 auto it = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(comp));
5343 GAIA_ASSERT(it != m_sparseComponentsByComp.end());
5344
5345 auto& store = it->second;
5346 if (!store.func_has(store.pStore, srcEntity))
5347 continue;
5348
5349 GAIA_ASSERT(store.func_copy_entity != nullptr);
5350 if (!store.func_copy_entity(store.pStore, dstEntity, srcEntity))
5351 continue;
5352
5353 if (pCopiedIds != nullptr)
5354 pCopiedIds[copiedCnt] = comp;
5355 ++copiedCnt;
5356 }
5357
5358 return copiedCnt;
5359 }
5360
5361 void write_archetype_ids(const Archetype& dstArchetype, Entity* pDst) const {
5362 for (const auto id: dstArchetype.ids_view())
5363 *pDst++ = id;
5364 }
5365
5366 template <typename Func>
5367 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t copied_sparse_id_count(Entity srcEntity, Func&& shouldCopySparse) const {
5368 uint32_t count = 0;
5369 for (const auto& [compKey, store]: m_sparseComponentsByComp) {
5370 const auto comp = compKey.entity();
5371 if (!store.func_has(store.pStore, srcEntity) || !shouldCopySparse(comp) ||
5372 !is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(comp))
5373 continue;
5374 ++count;
5375 }
5376
5377 return count;
5378 }
5379
5380 template <typename Func>
5381 void write_copied_sparse_ids(Entity srcEntity, Func&& shouldCopySparse, Entity* pDst) const {
5382 for (const auto& [compKey, store]: m_sparseComponentsByComp) {
5383 const auto comp = compKey.entity();
5384 if (!store.func_has(store.pStore, srcEntity) || !shouldCopySparse(comp) ||
5385 !is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(comp))
5386 continue;
5387 *pDst++ = comp;
5388 }
5389 }
5390
5391 GAIA_NODISCARD bool override_inter(Entity entity, Entity object) {
5392 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
5393 GAIA_ASSERT(object.pair() || valid(object));
5394
5395 if (has_direct(entity, object))
5396 return false;
5397
5398 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, object);
5399 if (inheritedOwner == EntityBad)
5400 return false;
5401
5402 if (!object.pair()) {
5403 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find(object);
5404 if (pItem != nullptr && pItem->entity == object) {
5405 if (is_out_of_line_component(object)) {
5406 const auto itSparseStore = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(object));
5407 if (itSparseStore == m_sparseComponentsByComp.end())
5408 return false;
5409
5410 GAIA_ASSERT(itSparseStore->second.func_copy_entity != nullptr);
5411 if (!itSparseStore->second.func_copy_entity(itSparseStore->second.pStore, entity, inheritedOwner))
5412 return false;
5413
5414 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(object)) {
5415 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
5416 eb.add_inter_init(object);
5417 eb.commit();
5418 }
5419 return true;
5420 }
5421
5422 if (pItem->comp.size() != 0U) {
5423 add(entity, object);
5424
5425 const auto& ecDst = fetch(entity);
5426 const auto& ecSrc = fetch(inheritedOwner);
5427 const auto compIdxDst = ecDst.pChunk->comp_idx(object);
5428 const auto compIdxSrc = ecSrc.pChunk->comp_idx(object);
5429 GAIA_ASSERT(compIdxDst != BadIndex && compIdxSrc != BadIndex);
5430
5431 const auto idxDst = uint16_t(ecDst.row * (1U - (uint32_t)object.kind()));
5432 const auto idxSrc = uint16_t(ecSrc.row * (1U - (uint32_t)object.kind()));
5433 void* pDst = ecDst.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut(compIdxDst);
5434 const void* pSrc = ecSrc.pChunk->comp_ptr(compIdxSrc);
5435 pItem->copy(pDst, pSrc, idxDst, idxSrc, ecDst.pChunk->capacity(), ecSrc.pChunk->capacity());
5436 return true;
5437 }
5438 }
5439 }
5440
5441 add(entity, object);
5442 return true;
5443 }
5444
5445 GAIA_NODISCARD bool copy_owned_id_from_entity(Entity srcEntity, Entity dstEntity, Entity object) {
5446 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(srcEntity));
5447 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(dstEntity));
5448 GAIA_ASSERT(object.pair() || valid(object));
5449
5450 if (has_direct(dstEntity, object))
5451 return false;
5452
5453 if (!object.pair()) {
5454 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().find(object);
5455 if (pItem != nullptr && pItem->entity == object) {
5456 if (is_out_of_line_component(object)) {
5457 const auto itSparseStore = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(object));
5458 if (itSparseStore == m_sparseComponentsByComp.end())
5459 return false;
5460
5461 GAIA_ASSERT(itSparseStore->second.func_copy_entity != nullptr);
5462 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(object)) {
5463 if (!itSparseStore->second.func_copy_entity(itSparseStore->second.pStore, dstEntity, srcEntity))
5464 return false;
5465
5466 EntityBuilder eb(*this, dstEntity);
5467 eb.add_inter_init(object);
5468 eb.commit();
5469 notify_add_single(dstEntity, object);
5470 return true;
5471 }
5472#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5473 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff(
5474 *this, ObserverEvent::OnAdd, EntitySpan{&object, 1}, EntitySpan{&dstEntity, 1});
5475#endif
5476 if (!itSparseStore->second.func_copy_entity(itSparseStore->second.pStore, dstEntity, srcEntity))
5477 return false;
5478 notify_add_single(dstEntity, object);
5479#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5480 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
5481#endif
5482 return true;
5483 }
5484
5485 if (pItem->comp.size() != 0U) {
5486 EntityBuilder eb(*this, dstEntity);
5487 eb.add_inter_init(object);
5488 eb.commit();
5489
5490 const auto& ecDst = fetch(dstEntity);
5491 const auto& ecSrc = fetch(srcEntity);
5492 const auto compIdxDst = ecDst.pChunk->comp_idx(object);
5493 const auto compIdxSrc = ecSrc.pChunk->comp_idx(object);
5494 GAIA_ASSERT(compIdxDst != BadIndex && compIdxSrc != BadIndex);
5495
5496 const auto idxDst = uint16_t(ecDst.row * (1U - (uint32_t)object.kind()));
5497 const auto idxSrc = uint16_t(ecSrc.row * (1U - (uint32_t)object.kind()));
5498 void* pDst = ecDst.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut(compIdxDst);
5499 const void* pSrc = ecSrc.pChunk->comp_ptr(compIdxSrc);
5500 pItem->copy(pDst, pSrc, idxDst, idxSrc, ecDst.pChunk->capacity(), ecSrc.pChunk->capacity());
5501 notify_add_single(dstEntity, object);
5502 return true;
5503 }
5504 }
5505 }
5506
5507 add(dstEntity, object);
5508 return true;
5509 }
5510
5511 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* instantiate_prefab_dst_archetype(Entity prefabEntity) {
5512 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
5513 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
5514 GAIA_ASSERT(has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab));
5515
5516 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (!has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab))
5517 return fetch(prefabEntity).pArchetype;
5518
5519 auto& ecSrc = m_recs.entities[prefabEntity.id()];
5520 GAIA_ASSERT(ecSrc.pArchetype != nullptr);
5521
5522 auto* pDstArchetype = ecSrc.pArchetype;
5523 if (pDstArchetype->has<EntityDesc>())
5524 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
5525 if (pDstArchetype->has(Prefab))
5526 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, Prefab);
5527
5528 for (const auto id: ecSrc.pArchetype->ids_view()) {
5529 if (id.pair() && id.id() == Is.id()) {
5530 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, id);
5531 continue;
5532 }
5533
5534 if (!instantiate_copies_id(id))
5535 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, id);
5536 }
5537
5538 const auto isPair = Pair(Is, prefabEntity);
5539 assign_pair(isPair, *m_pEntityArchetype);
5540 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_add(pDstArchetype, isPair);
5541
5542 return pDstArchetype;
5543 }
5544
5545 template <typename T>
5546 void collect_prefab_copied_sparse_ids(Entity prefabEntity, T& outCopiedSparseIds) {
5547 outCopiedSparseIds.clear();
5548 if (m_sparseComponentsByComp.empty())
5549 return;
5550
5551 for (const auto& [compKey, store]: m_sparseComponentsByComp) {
5552 const auto comp = compKey.entity();
5553 if (!store.func_has(store.pStore, prefabEntity) || !instantiate_copies_id(comp) ||
5554 !is_out_of_line_component(comp))
5555 continue;
5556 outCopiedSparseIds.push_back(comp);
5557 }
5558 }
5559
5560 template <typename T>
5561 void collect_prefab_added_ids(Archetype* pDstArchetype, EntitySpan copiedSparseIds, T& outAddedIds) {
5562 outAddedIds.clear();
5563 for (const auto id: pDstArchetype->ids_view())
5564 outAddedIds.push_back(id);
5565
5566 for (const auto comp: copiedSparseIds) {
5567 if (is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(comp))
5568 outAddedIds.push_back(comp);
5569 }
5570 }
5571
5572 template <typename T>
5573 void collect_prefab_add_hook_ids(EntitySpan addedIds, T& outHookIds) {
5574 outHookIds.clear();
5575 for (const auto id: addedIds) {
5576 if (!id.comp())
5577 continue;
5578
5579 const auto& item = comp_cache().get(id);
5580 if (ComponentCache::hooks(item).func_add != nullptr)
5581 outHookIds.push_back(id);
5582 }
5583 }
5584
5585 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity instantiate_prefab_node_inter(
5586 Entity prefabEntity, Archetype* pDstArchetype, Entity parentInstance, EntitySpan copiedSparseIds,
5587 EntitySpan addedIds, EntitySpan addHookIds) {
5588 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
5589 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
5590 GAIA_ASSERT(has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab));
5591 GAIA_ASSERT(pDstArchetype != nullptr);
5592#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5593 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff_add_new(*this, EntitySpan{addedIds});
5594#endif
5595
5596 auto& ecSrc = m_recs.entities[prefabEntity.id()];
5597 GAIA_ASSERT(ecSrc.pArchetype != nullptr);
5598 GAIA_ASSERT(ecSrc.pChunk != nullptr);
5599
5600 EntityContainerCtx ctx{true, false, prefabEntity.kind()};
5601 const auto instance = m_recs.entities.alloc(&ctx);
5602 auto& ecDst = m_recs.entities[instance.id()];
5603 auto* pDstChunk = pDstArchetype->foc_free_chunk();
5604 store_entity(ecDst, instance, pDstArchetype, pDstChunk);
5605 pDstArchetype->try_update_free_chunk_idx();
5606 Chunk::copy_foreign_entity_data(ecSrc.pChunk, ecSrc.row, pDstChunk, ecDst.row);
5607 pDstChunk->update_versions();
5608
5609 ecDst.flags |= EntityContainerFlags::HasAliasOf;
5610
5611 // Keep payload copy and observer/add-id reporting separate:
5612 // fragmenting sparse payloads must still be copied here even though their id is
5613 // already present in the destination archetype and therefore absent from addedIds tail.
5614 (void)copy_sparse_entity_data(prefabEntity, instance, copiedSparseIds);
5615#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5616 m_observers.append_diff_targets(*this, addDiffCtx, EntitySpan{&instance, 1});
5617#endif
5618
5619 touch_rel_version(Is);
5620 invalidate_queries_for_rel(Is);
5621 m_targetsTravCache = {};
5622 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
5623 m_depthOrderCache = {};
5624 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
5625 m_targetsAllCache = {};
5626
5627 const auto instanceKey = EntityLookupKey(instance);
5628 const auto prefabKey = EntityLookupKey(prefabEntity);
5629 m_entityToAsTargets[instanceKey].insert(prefabKey);
5630 m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache = {};
5631 m_entityToAsRelations[prefabKey].insert(instanceKey);
5632 m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache = {};
5633 invalidate_queries_for_entity({Is, prefabEntity});
5634
5635#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5636 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (tearing_down()) {
5637 (void)pDstArchetype;
5638 (void)addedIds;
5639 } else {
5640 lock();
5641
5642 #if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS
5643 for (const auto id: addHookIds) {
5644 const auto& item = comp_cache().get(id);
5645 const auto& hooks = ComponentCache::hooks(item);
5646 GAIA_ASSERT(hooks.func_add != nullptr);
5647 hooks.func_add(*this, item, instance);
5648 }
5649 #endif
5650
5651 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5652 m_observers.on_add(*this, *pDstArchetype, addedIds, EntitySpan{&instance, 1});
5653 #endif
5654
5655 unlock();
5656 }
5657#endif
5658
5659#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5660 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
5661#endif
5662
5663 if (parentInstance != EntityBad)
5664 parent_direct(instance, parentInstance);
5665
5666 return instance;
5667 }
5668
5669 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity instantiate_prefab_node_inter(Entity prefabEntity, Entity parentInstance) {
5670 auto* pDstArchetype = instantiate_prefab_dst_archetype(prefabEntity);
5671 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> copiedSparseIds;
5672 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> addedIds;
5673 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> addHookIds;
5674 collect_prefab_copied_sparse_ids(prefabEntity, copiedSparseIds);
5675 collect_prefab_added_ids(pDstArchetype, EntitySpan{copiedSparseIds}, addedIds);
5676 collect_prefab_add_hook_ids(EntitySpan{addedIds}, addHookIds);
5677 return instantiate_prefab_node_inter(
5678 prefabEntity, pDstArchetype, parentInstance, EntitySpan{copiedSparseIds}, EntitySpan{addedIds},
5679 EntitySpan{addHookIds});
5680 }
5681
5682 template <typename Func>
5683 void instantiate_prefab_n_inter(
5684 const PrefabInstantiatePlanNode& node, Entity parentInstance, uint32_t count, Func& func) {
5685 GAIA_ASSERT(node.prefab != EntityBad);
5686 GAIA_ASSERT(node.pDstArchetype != nullptr);
5687
5688 if (count == 0U)
5689 return;
5690#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5691 auto addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff_add_new(*this, EntitySpan{node.addedIds});
5692#endif
5693
5694 auto& ecSrc = m_recs.entities[node.prefab.id()];
5695 GAIA_ASSERT(ecSrc.pChunk != nullptr);
5696
5697 if (parentInstance != EntityBad)
5698 prepare_parent_batch(parentInstance);
5699
5700 const auto srcRow = ecSrc.row;
5701 auto* pSrcChunk = ecSrc.pChunk;
5702 auto* pDstArchetype = node.pDstArchetype;
5703 const auto prefabKey = EntityLookupKey(node.prefab);
5704 EntityContainerCtx ctx{true, false, node.prefab.kind()};
5705
5706 uint32_t left = count;
5707 do {
5708 auto* pDstChunk = pDstArchetype->foc_free_chunk();
5709 const uint32_t originalChunkSize = pDstChunk->size();
5710 const uint32_t freeSlotsInChunk = pDstChunk->capacity() - originalChunkSize;
5711 const uint32_t toCreate = core::get_min(freeSlotsInChunk, left);
5712
5713 GAIA_FOR_(toCreate, rowOffset) {
5714 const auto instance = m_recs.entities.alloc(&ctx);
5715 auto& ecDst = m_recs.entities[instance.id()];
5716 store_entity(ecDst, instance, pDstArchetype, pDstChunk);
5717 ecDst.flags |= EntityContainerFlags::HasAliasOf;
5718
5719 (void)copy_sparse_entity_data(node.prefab, instance, EntitySpan{node.copiedSparseIds});
5720 }
5721
5722 pDstArchetype->try_update_free_chunk_idx();
5723 Chunk::copy_foreign_entity_data_n(pSrcChunk, srcRow, pDstChunk, originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5724 pDstChunk->update_versions();
5725
5726 touch_rel_version(Is);
5727 invalidate_queries_for_rel(Is);
5728 m_targetsTravCache = {};
5729 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
5730 m_depthOrderCache = {};
5731 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
5732 m_targetsAllCache = {};
5733
5734 auto entities = pDstChunk->entity_view();
5735 auto& asRelations = m_entityToAsRelations[prefabKey];
5736 GAIA_FOR2_(originalChunkSize, originalChunkSize + toCreate, rowIdx) {
5737 const auto instance = entities[rowIdx];
5738 m_entityToAsTargets[EntityLookupKey(instance)].insert(prefabKey);
5739 asRelations.insert(EntityLookupKey(instance));
5740 }
5741 m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache = {};
5742 m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache = {};
5743 invalidate_queries_for_entity({Is, node.prefab});
5744
5745#if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS || GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5746 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (tearing_down()) {
5747 (void)entities;
5748 (void)originalChunkSize;
5749 (void)toCreate;
5750 } else {
5751 lock();
5752
5753 #if GAIA_ENABLE_ADD_DEL_HOOKS
5754 for (const auto id: node.addHookIds) {
5755 const auto& item = comp_cache().get(id);
5756 const auto& hooks = ComponentCache::hooks(item);
5757 GAIA_ASSERT(hooks.func_add != nullptr);
5758
5759 GAIA_FOR2_(originalChunkSize, originalChunkSize + toCreate, rowIdx) {
5760 hooks.func_add(*this, item, entities[rowIdx]);
5761 }
5762 }
5763 #endif
5764
5765 #if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5766 m_observers.append_diff_targets(
5767 *this, addDiffCtx, EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5768 m_observers.on_add(
5769 *this, *pDstArchetype, EntitySpan{node.addedIds},
5770 EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate});
5771 #endif
5772
5773 unlock();
5774 }
5775#endif
5776
5777 if (parentInstance != EntityBad)
5778 parent_batch(parentInstance, *pDstArchetype, *pDstChunk, originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5779
5780 invoke_copy_batch_callback(func, pDstArchetype, pDstChunk, originalChunkSize, toCreate);
5781
5782 left -= toCreate;
5783 } while (left > 0);
5784#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
5785 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
5786#endif
5787 }
5788
5789 template <typename T>
5790 void build_prefab_instantiate_plan(Entity prefabEntity, uint32_t parentIdx, T& plan) {
5791 PrefabInstantiatePlanNode node{};
5792 node.prefab = prefabEntity;
5793 node.parentIdx = parentIdx;
5794 node.pDstArchetype = instantiate_prefab_dst_archetype(prefabEntity);
5795 collect_prefab_copied_sparse_ids(prefabEntity, node.copiedSparseIds);
5796 collect_prefab_added_ids(node.pDstArchetype, EntitySpan{node.copiedSparseIds}, node.addedIds);
5797 collect_prefab_add_hook_ids(EntitySpan{node.addedIds}, node.addHookIds);
5798
5799 const auto nodeIdx = (uint32_t)plan.size();
5800 plan.push_back(GAIA_MOV(node));
5801
5802 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> prefabChildren;
5803 gather_sorted_prefab_children(prefabEntity, prefabChildren);
5804
5805 for (const auto childPrefab: prefabChildren)
5806 build_prefab_instantiate_plan(childPrefab, nodeIdx, plan);
5807 }
5808
5809 GAIA_NODISCARD bool instance_has_prefab_child(Entity parentInstance, Entity childPrefab) const {
5810 bool found = false;
5811 sources(Parent, parentInstance, [&](Entity child) {
5812 if (found)
5813 return;
5814 if (has_direct(child, Pair(Is, childPrefab)))
5815 found = true;
5816 });
5817 return found;
5818 }
5819
5820 uint32_t sync_prefab_instance(
5821 Entity prefabEntity, Entity instance, const PrefabInstantiatePlanNode& node, EntitySpan prefabChildren) {
5822 uint32_t changes = 0;
5823
5824 const auto isPair = Pair(Is, prefabEntity);
5825 for (const auto id: node.pDstArchetype->ids_view()) {
5826 if (id == isPair || has_direct(instance, id))
5827 continue;
5828 if (copy_owned_id_from_entity(prefabEntity, instance, id))
5829 ++changes;
5830 }
5831
5832 for (const auto comp: node.copiedSparseIds) {
5833 if (has_direct(instance, comp))
5834 continue;
5835 if (copy_owned_id_from_entity(prefabEntity, instance, comp))
5836 ++changes;
5837 }
5838
5839 for (const auto childPrefab: prefabChildren) {
5840 if (instance_has_prefab_child(instance, childPrefab))
5841 continue;
5842 (void)instantiate(childPrefab, instance);
5843 ++changes;
5844 }
5845
5846 return changes;
5847 }
5848
5849 uint32_t sync_prefab_inter(Entity prefabEntity, cnt::set<EntityLookupKey>& visited) {
5850 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
5851 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
5852
5853 if (!has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab))
5854 return 0;
5855
5856 const auto ins = visited.insert(EntityLookupKey(prefabEntity));
5857 if (!ins.second)
5858 return 0;
5859
5860 PrefabInstantiatePlanNode node{};
5861 node.prefab = prefabEntity;
5862 node.pDstArchetype = instantiate_prefab_dst_archetype(prefabEntity);
5863 collect_prefab_copied_sparse_ids(prefabEntity, node.copiedSparseIds);
5864 collect_prefab_added_ids(node.pDstArchetype, EntitySpan{node.copiedSparseIds}, node.addedIds);
5865 collect_prefab_add_hook_ids(EntitySpan{node.addedIds}, node.addHookIds);
5866
5867 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> prefabChildren;
5868 gather_sorted_prefab_children(prefabEntity, prefabChildren);
5869
5870 uint32_t changes = 0;
5871 const auto& descendants = as_relations_trav_cache(prefabEntity);
5872 for (const auto entity: descendants) {
5873 if (has_direct(entity, Prefab))
5874 continue;
5875 changes += sync_prefab_instance(prefabEntity, entity, node, EntitySpan{prefabChildren});
5876 }
5877
5878 for (const auto childPrefab: prefabChildren)
5879 changes += sync_prefab_inter(childPrefab, visited);
5880
5881 return changes;
5882 }
5883
5885 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity instantiate_inter(Entity prefabEntity, Entity parentInstance) {
5886 const auto instance = instantiate_prefab_node_inter(prefabEntity, parentInstance);
5887
5888 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> prefabChildren;
5889 gather_sorted_prefab_children(prefabEntity, prefabChildren);
5890
5891 for (const auto childPrefab: prefabChildren)
5892 (void)instantiate_inter(childPrefab, instance);
5893
5894 return instance;
5895 }
5896
5897 public:
5901 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity instantiate(Entity prefabEntity) {
5902 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
5903 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
5904
5905 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (!has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab))
5906 return copy(prefabEntity);
5907
5908 return instantiate_inter(prefabEntity, EntityBad);
5909 }
5910
5915 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity instantiate(Entity prefabEntity, Entity parentInstance) {
5916 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
5917 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
5918 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(parentInstance));
5919
5920 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (!has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab)) {
5921 const auto instance = copy(prefabEntity);
5922 parent_direct(instance, parentInstance);
5923 return instance;
5924 }
5925
5926 return instantiate_inter(prefabEntity, parentInstance);
5927 }
5928
5941 template <typename Func = TFunc_Void_With_Entity>
5942 void instantiate_n(Entity prefabEntity, uint32_t count, Func func = func_void_with_entity) {
5943 instantiate_n(prefabEntity, EntityBad, count, func);
5944 }
5945
5947 void instantiate_n(Entity prefabEntity, Entity parentInstance, uint32_t count) {
5948 instantiate_n(prefabEntity, parentInstance, count, func_void_with_entity);
5949 }
5950
5953 template <typename Func>
5954 void instantiate_n(Entity prefabEntity, Entity parentInstance, uint32_t count, Func func) {
5955 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
5956 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
5957 GAIA_ASSERT(parentInstance == EntityBad || valid(parentInstance));
5958
5959 if (count == 0U)
5960 return;
5961
5962 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (!has_direct(prefabEntity, Prefab)) {
5963 if (parentInstance == EntityBad) {
5964 copy_n(prefabEntity, count, func);
5965 return;
5966 }
5967
5968 copy_n_inter(prefabEntity, count, func, EntitySpan{}, parentInstance);
5969 return;
5970 }
5971
5972 cnt::darray_ext<PrefabInstantiatePlanNode, 16> plan;
5973 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> spawned;
5974
5975 if constexpr (std::is_invocable_v<Func, CopyIter&>) {
5976 build_prefab_instantiate_plan(prefabEntity, BadIndex, plan);
5977 if (plan.size() == 1) {
5978 instantiate_prefab_n_inter(plan[0], parentInstance, count, func);
5979 return;
5980 }
5981
5982 CopyIterGroupState group;
5983 cnt::darray<Entity> roots;
5984 roots.reserve(count);
5985 auto collectRoot = [&](Entity instance) {
5986 roots.push_back(instance);
5987 };
5988 instantiate_prefab_n_inter(plan[0], parentInstance, count, collectRoot);
5989
5990 spawned.resize((uint32_t)plan.size());
5991
5992 GAIA_FOR_(count, rootIdx) {
5993 spawned[0] = roots[rootIdx];
5994 GAIA_FOR2_(1, (uint32_t)plan.size(), planIdx) {
5995 const auto parent = spawned[plan[planIdx].parentIdx];
5996 spawned[planIdx] = instantiate_prefab_node_inter(
5997 plan[planIdx].prefab, plan[planIdx].pDstArchetype, parent, EntitySpan{plan[planIdx].copiedSparseIds},
5998 EntitySpan{plan[planIdx].addedIds}, EntitySpan{plan[planIdx].addHookIds});
5999 }
6000
6001 push_copy_iter_group(func, group, roots[rootIdx]);
6002 }
6003
6004 flush_copy_iter_group(func, group);
6005 } else {
6006 build_prefab_instantiate_plan(prefabEntity, BadIndex, plan);
6007 if (plan.size() == 1) {
6008 instantiate_prefab_n_inter(plan[0], parentInstance, count, func);
6009 return;
6010 }
6011
6012 cnt::darray<Entity> roots;
6013 roots.reserve(count);
6014 auto collectRoot = [&](Entity instance) {
6015 roots.push_back(instance);
6016 };
6017 instantiate_prefab_n_inter(plan[0], parentInstance, count, collectRoot);
6018
6019 spawned.resize((uint32_t)plan.size());
6020
6021 GAIA_FOR_(count, rootIdx) {
6022 spawned[0] = roots[rootIdx];
6023 GAIA_FOR2_(1, (uint32_t)plan.size(), planIdx) {
6024 const auto parent = spawned[plan[planIdx].parentIdx];
6025 spawned[planIdx] = instantiate_prefab_node_inter(
6026 plan[planIdx].prefab, plan[planIdx].pDstArchetype, parent, EntitySpan{plan[planIdx].copiedSparseIds},
6027 EntitySpan{plan[planIdx].addedIds}, EntitySpan{plan[planIdx].addHookIds});
6028 }
6029
6030 func(roots[rootIdx]);
6031 }
6032 }
6033 }
6034
6038 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t sync(Entity prefabEntity) {
6039 GAIA_ASSERT(!prefabEntity.pair());
6040 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(prefabEntity));
6041
6042 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> visited;
6043 return sync_prefab_inter(prefabEntity, visited);
6044 }
6045
6046 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6047
6050 void del(Entity entity) {
6051 if (!entity.pair()) {
6052 // Delete all relationships associated with this entity (if any)
6053 del_inter(Pair(entity, All));
6054 del_inter(Pair(All, entity));
6055 }
6056
6057 del_inter(entity);
6058 }
6059
6064 void del(Entity entity, Entity object) {
6065 if (!object.pair()) {
6066 const auto itSparseStore = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(object));
6067 if (itSparseStore != m_sparseComponentsByComp.end()) {
6068 if (!is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(object)) {
6069 {
6070 EntityBuilder eb(*this, entity);
6071 eb.del(object);
6072 }
6073 itSparseStore->second.func_del(itSparseStore->second.pStore, entity);
6074 return;
6075 }
6076#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
6077 auto delDiffCtx =
6078 m_observers.prepare_diff(*this, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{&object, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
6079#endif
6080 notify_inherited_del_dependents(entity, object);
6081 notify_del_single(entity, object);
6082 itSparseStore->second.func_del(itSparseStore->second.pStore, entity);
6083#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
6084 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(delDiffCtx));
6085#endif
6086 return;
6087 }
6088 }
6089 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).del(object);
6090 }
6091
6097 void del(Entity entity, Pair pair) {
6098 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).del(pair);
6099 }
6100
6106 template <typename T>
6107 void del(Entity entity) {
6108 using CT = component_type_t<T>;
6109 using FT = typename CT::TypeFull;
6110
6111 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6112 if (const auto* pItem = comp_cache().template find<FT>();
6113 pItem != nullptr && is_out_of_line_component(pItem->entity)) {
6114 if (sparse_component_store<FT>(pItem->entity) != nullptr)
6115 del(entity, pItem->entity);
6116 return;
6117 }
6118 }
6119
6120 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).del<FT>();
6121 }
6122
6123 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6124
6126 void as(Entity entity, Entity entityBase) {
6127 // Form the relationship
6128 add(entity, Pair(Is, entityBase));
6129 }
6130
6135 GAIA_NODISCARD bool is(Entity entity, Entity entityBase) const {
6136 return is_inter<false>(entity, entityBase);
6137 }
6138
6145 GAIA_NODISCARD bool in(Entity entity, Entity entityBase) const {
6146 return is_inter<true>(entity, entityBase);
6147 }
6148
6149 GAIA_NODISCARD bool is_base(Entity target) const {
6150 GAIA_ASSERT(valid_entity(target));
6151
6152 // Pairs are not supported
6153 if (target.pair())
6154 return false;
6155
6156 const auto it = m_entityToAsRelations.find(EntityLookupKey(target));
6157 return it != m_entityToAsRelations.end();
6158 }
6159
6160 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6161
6163 void child(Entity entity, Entity parent) {
6164 add(entity, Pair(ChildOf, parent));
6165 }
6166
6171 GAIA_NODISCARD bool child(Entity entity, Entity parent) const {
6172 return has(entity, Pair(ChildOf, parent));
6173 }
6174
6176 void parent(Entity entity, Entity parentEntity) {
6177 add(entity, Pair(Parent, parentEntity));
6178 }
6179
6184 GAIA_NODISCARD bool parent(Entity entity, Entity parentEntity) const {
6185 return has(entity, Pair(Parent, parentEntity));
6186 }
6187
6188 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6189
6196 template <
6197 typename T
6198#if GAIA_ENABLE_HOOKS
6199 ,
6200 bool TriggerSetEffects
6201#endif
6202 >
6203 void modify(Entity entity) {
6204 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
6205
6206 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<T>()) {
6207 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().template find<T>();
6208 if (pItem != nullptr && is_out_of_line_component(pItem->entity)) {
6209 auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull>(pItem->entity);
6210 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
6211 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore->has(entity));
6212
6213 ::gaia::ecs::update_version(m_worldVersion);
6214
6215#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
6216 if constexpr (TriggerSetEffects)
6217 world_notify_on_set_entity(*this, pItem->entity, entity);
6218#endif
6219 return;
6220 }
6221 }
6222
6223 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6224 ec.pChunk->template modify<
6225 T
6226#if GAIA_ENABLE_HOOKS
6227 ,
6228 TriggerSetEffects
6229#endif
6230 >();
6231
6232#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
6233 if constexpr (TriggerSetEffects) {
6234 Entity term = EntityBad;
6235 if constexpr (is_pair<T>::value) {
6236 const auto rel = comp_cache().template get<typename T::rel>().entity;
6237 const auto tgt = comp_cache().template get<typename T::tgt>().entity;
6238 term = (Entity)Pair(rel, tgt);
6239 } else
6240 term = comp_cache().template get<T>().entity;
6241
6242 world_notify_on_set(*this, term, *ec.pChunk, ec.row, (uint16_t)(ec.row + 1));
6243 }
6244#endif
6245 }
6246
6254 template <
6255 typename T
6256#if GAIA_ENABLE_HOOKS
6257 ,
6258 bool TriggerSetEffects
6259#endif
6260 >
6261 void modify(Entity entity, Entity object) {
6262 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
6263 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(object));
6264
6265 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6266 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6267 if (can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(object)) {
6268 auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<FT>(object);
6269 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
6270 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore->has(entity));
6271
6272 ::gaia::ecs::update_version(m_worldVersion);
6273
6274#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
6275 if constexpr (TriggerSetEffects)
6276 world_notify_on_set_entity(*this, object, entity);
6277#endif
6278 return;
6279 }
6280 }
6281
6282 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6283 const auto compIdx = ec.pChunk->comp_idx(object);
6284 GAIA_ASSERT(compIdx != ComponentIndexBad);
6285
6286 if constexpr (TriggerSetEffects)
6287 ec.pChunk->finish_write(compIdx, ec.row, (uint16_t)(ec.row + 1));
6288 else
6289 ec.pChunk->update_world_version(compIdx);
6290 }
6291
6292 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6293
6299 GAIA_NODISCARD ComponentSetter acc_mut(Entity entity) {
6300 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
6301
6302 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6303 return ComponentSetter{*this, ec.pChunk, entity, ec.row};
6304 }
6305
6316 template <typename T>
6317 GAIA_NODISCARD auto set(Entity entity) {
6318 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
6319 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6320 using ValueType = typename actual_type_t<T>::Type;
6321 const auto& item = add<FT>();
6322 return SetWriteProxyTyped<T, ValueType>{*this, entity, item.entity, get<T>(entity)};
6323 }
6324
6336 template <typename T>
6337 GAIA_NODISCARD auto set(Entity entity, Entity object) {
6338 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
6339 return SetWriteProxyObject<typename actual_type_t<T>::Type>{*this, entity, object, get<T>(entity, object)};
6340 }
6341
6349 template <typename T>
6350 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) sset(Entity entity) {
6351 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
6352 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6353 const auto& item = add<FT>();
6354 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6355 if (is_out_of_line_component(item.entity))
6356 return sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(item.entity).mut(entity);
6357 }
6358 return acc_mut(entity).smut<T>();
6359 }
6360
6363 template <typename T>
6364 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) sset(Entity entity, Entity object) {
6365 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
6366 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6367 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6368 if (can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(object))
6369 return sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(object).mut(entity);
6370 }
6371 return acc_mut(entity).smut<T>(object);
6372 }
6373
6374 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6375
6383 template <typename T>
6384 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) mut(Entity entity) {
6385 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
6386 return sset<T>(entity);
6387 }
6388
6391 template <typename T>
6392 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) mut(Entity entity, Entity object) {
6393 static_assert(!is_pair<T>::value);
6394 return sset<T>(entity, object);
6395 }
6396
6397 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6398
6404 ComponentGetter acc(Entity entity) const {
6405 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
6406
6407 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6408 return ComponentGetter{*this, ec.pChunk, entity, ec.row};
6409 }
6410
6418 template <typename T>
6419 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) get(Entity entity) const {
6420 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6421 const auto compEntity = [&]() {
6422 if constexpr (is_pair<FT>::value) {
6423 const auto rel = comp_cache().template get<typename FT::rel>().entity;
6424 const auto tgt = comp_cache().template get<typename FT::tgt>().entity;
6425 return (Entity)Pair(rel, tgt);
6426 } else {
6427 return comp_cache().template get<FT>().entity;
6428 }
6429 }();
6430 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6431 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().template find<FT>();
6432 if (pItem != nullptr && is_out_of_line_component(pItem->entity)) {
6433 const auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<FT>(pItem->entity);
6434 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
6435 if (pStore->has(entity))
6436 return pStore->get(entity);
6437
6438 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, compEntity);
6439 GAIA_ASSERT(inheritedOwner != EntityBad);
6440 return pStore->get(inheritedOwner);
6441 }
6442 }
6443
6444 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6445 if (ec.pArchetype->has(compEntity))
6446 return acc(entity).template get<T>();
6447
6448 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, compEntity);
6449 GAIA_ASSERT(inheritedOwner != EntityBad);
6450 return acc(inheritedOwner).template get<T>();
6451 }
6452
6454 template <typename T>
6455 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) get(Entity entity, Entity object) const {
6456 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6457 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6458 if (can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(object)) {
6459 const auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<FT>(object);
6460 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
6461 if (pStore->has(entity))
6462 return pStore->get(entity);
6463
6464 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, object);
6465 GAIA_ASSERT(inheritedOwner != EntityBad);
6466 return pStore->get(inheritedOwner);
6467 }
6468 }
6469
6470 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6471 if (ec.pArchetype->has(object))
6472 return acc(entity).template get<T>(object);
6473
6474 const auto inheritedOwner = inherited_id_owner(entity, object);
6475 GAIA_ASSERT(inheritedOwner != EntityBad);
6476 return acc(inheritedOwner).template get<T>(object);
6477 }
6478
6479 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6480
6484 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has(Entity entity) const {
6485 // Pair
6486 if (entity.pair()) {
6487 if (entity == Pair(All, All))
6488 return true;
6489
6490 if (is_wildcard(entity)) {
6491 if (!m_entityToArchetypeMap.contains(EntityLookupKey(entity)))
6492 return false;
6493
6494 // If the pair is found, both entities forming it need to be found as well
6495 GAIA_ASSERT(has(get(entity.id())) && has(get(entity.gen())));
6496
6497 return true;
6498 }
6499
6500 const auto it = m_recs.pairs.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
6501 if (it == m_recs.pairs.end())
6502 return false;
6503
6504 const auto& ec = it->second;
6505 if (is_req_del(ec))
6506 return false;
6507
6508#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
6509 // If the pair is found, both entities forming it need to be found as well
6510 GAIA_ASSERT(has(get(entity.id())) && has(get(entity.gen())));
6511
6512 // Index of the entity must fit inside the chunk
6513 auto* pChunk = ec.pChunk;
6514 GAIA_ASSERT(pChunk != nullptr && ec.row < pChunk->size());
6515#endif
6516
6517 return true;
6518 }
6519
6520 // Regular entity
6521 {
6522 // Entity ID has to fit inside the entity array
6523 if (entity.id() >= m_recs.entities.size() || !m_recs.entities.has(entity.id()))
6524 return false;
6525
6526 // Index of the entity must fit inside the chunk
6527 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6528 if (is_req_del(ec))
6529 return false;
6530
6531 auto* pChunk = ec.pChunk;
6532 return pChunk != nullptr && ec.row < pChunk->size();
6533 }
6534 }
6535
6539 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has(Pair pair) const {
6540 return has((Entity)pair);
6541 }
6542
6549 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has(Entity entity, Entity object) const {
6550 return has_inter(entity, object, true);
6551 }
6552
6557 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_direct(Entity entity, Entity object) const {
6558 return has_inter(entity, object, false);
6559 }
6560
6562 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_direct(Entity entity, Pair pair) const {
6563 return has_inter(entity, (Entity)pair, false);
6564 }
6565
6566 private:
6567 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has_inter(Entity entity, Entity object, bool allowSemanticIs) const {
6568 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
6569 if (is_req_del(ec))
6570 return false;
6571
6572 if (object.pair() && has_exclusive_adjunct_pair(entity, object))
6573 return true;
6574 if (!object.pair()) {
6575 const auto itSparseStore = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(object));
6576 if (itSparseStore != m_sparseComponentsByComp.end())
6577 return itSparseStore->second.func_has(itSparseStore->second.pStore, entity) ||
6578 (allowSemanticIs && inherited_id_owner(entity, object) != EntityBad);
6579 }
6580
6581 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
6582
6583 if (object.pair()) {
6584 if (allowSemanticIs && object.id() == Is.id() && !is_wildcard(object.gen())) {
6585 const auto target = get(object.gen());
6586 return valid(target) && is(entity, target);
6587 }
6588
6589 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
6590 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
6591 return false;
6592
6593 EntityId rel = object.id();
6594 EntityId tgt = object.gen();
6595
6596 // (*,*)
6597 if (rel == All.id() && tgt == All.id())
6598 return true;
6599
6600 // (X,*)
6601 if (rel != All.id() && tgt == All.id()) {
6602 auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
6603 for (auto id: ids) {
6604 if (!id.pair())
6605 continue;
6606 if (id.id() == rel)
6607 return true;
6608 }
6609
6610 return false;
6611 }
6612
6613 // (*,X)
6614 if (rel == All.id() && tgt != All.id()) {
6615 auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
6616 for (auto id: ids) {
6617 if (!id.pair())
6618 continue;
6619 if (id.gen() == tgt)
6620 return true;
6621 }
6622
6623 return false;
6624 }
6625 }
6626
6627 if (pArchetype->has(object))
6628 return true;
6629
6630 return allowSemanticIs && inherited_id_owner(entity, object) != EntityBad;
6631 }
6632
6633 public:
6637 GAIA_NODISCARD std::span<const Entity> lookup_path() const {
6638 return {m_componentLookupPath.data(), m_componentLookupPath.size()};
6639 }
6640
6644 void lookup_path(std::span<const Entity> scopes) {
6645 m_componentLookupPath.clear();
6646 m_componentLookupPath.reserve((uint32_t)scopes.size());
6647 for (const auto scopeEntity: scopes) {
6648 GAIA_ASSERT(scopeEntity != EntityBad && valid(scopeEntity) && !scopeEntity.pair());
6649 if (scopeEntity == EntityBad || !valid(scopeEntity) || scopeEntity.pair())
6650 continue;
6651
6652 m_componentLookupPath.push_back(scopeEntity);
6653 }
6654 }
6655
6658 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity scope() const {
6659 return m_componentScope;
6660 }
6661
6666 Entity scope(Entity scope) {
6667 GAIA_ASSERT(scope == EntityBad || (valid(scope) && !scope.pair()));
6668 const auto prev = m_componentScope;
6669 if (scope == EntityBad || (valid(scope) && !scope.pair())) {
6670 m_componentScope = scope;
6671 invalidate_scope_path_cache();
6672 }
6673 return prev;
6674 }
6675
6681 template <typename Func>
6682 void scope(Entity scopeEntity, Func&& func) {
6683 struct ComponentScopeRestore final {
6684 World& world;
6685 Entity prevScope;
6686 ~ComponentScopeRestore() {
6687 world.scope(prevScope);
6688 }
6689 };
6690
6691 ComponentScopeRestore restore{*this, scope(scopeEntity)};
6692 func();
6693 }
6694
6701 Entity module(const char* path, uint32_t len = 0) {
6702 if (path == nullptr || path[0] == 0)
6703 return EntityBad;
6704
6705 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(path, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
6706 if (l == 0 || l >= ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength)
6707 return EntityBad;
6708 if (path[l - 1] == '.')
6709 return EntityBad;
6710
6711 Entity parent = EntityBad;
6712 uint32_t partBeg = 0;
6713 while (partBeg < l) {
6714 uint32_t partEnd = partBeg;
6715 while (partEnd < l && path[partEnd] != '.')
6716 ++partEnd;
6717 if (partEnd == partBeg)
6718 return EntityBad;
6719
6720 const auto partLen = partEnd - partBeg;
6721 const auto key = EntityNameLookupKey(path + partBeg, partLen, 0);
6722 const auto it = m_nameToEntity.find(key);
6723 Entity curr = EntityBad;
6724
6725 if (it != m_nameToEntity.end()) {
6726 curr = it->second;
6727 if (parent != EntityBad && !static_cast<const World&>(*this).child(curr, parent)) {
6728 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Module path collides with an existing entity name outside the requested scope");
6729 return EntityBad;
6730 }
6731 } else {
6732 curr = add();
6733 name(curr, path + partBeg, partLen);
6734 if (parent != EntityBad)
6735 child(curr, parent);
6736 }
6737
6738 parent = curr;
6739 partBeg = partEnd + 1;
6740 }
6741
6742 return parent;
6743 }
6744
6751 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has(Entity entity, Pair pair) const {
6752 return has(entity, (Entity)pair);
6753 }
6754
6761 template <typename T>
6762 GAIA_NODISCARD bool has(Entity entity) const {
6763 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
6764
6765 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
6766 const auto compEntity = [&]() {
6767 if constexpr (is_pair<FT>::value) {
6768 const auto* pRel = comp_cache().template find<typename FT::rel>();
6769 const auto* pTgt = comp_cache().template find<typename FT::tgt>();
6770 if (pRel == nullptr || pTgt == nullptr)
6771 return EntityBad;
6772
6773 const auto rel = pRel->entity;
6774 const auto tgt = pTgt->entity;
6775 return (Entity)Pair(rel, tgt);
6776 } else {
6777 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().template find<FT>();
6778 return pItem != nullptr ? pItem->entity : EntityBad;
6779 }
6780 }();
6781 if (compEntity == EntityBad)
6782 return false;
6783
6784 if constexpr (supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
6785 const auto* pItem = comp_cache().template find<FT>();
6786 if (pItem != nullptr && is_out_of_line_component(pItem->entity)) {
6787 const auto* pStore = sparse_component_store<FT>(pItem->entity);
6788 return pStore != nullptr && (pStore->has(entity) || inherited_id_owner(entity, compEntity) != EntityBad);
6789 }
6790 }
6791
6792 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6793 if (is_req_del(ec))
6794 return false;
6795
6796 return ec.pArchetype->has(compEntity) || inherited_id_owner(entity, compEntity) != EntityBad;
6797 }
6798
6799 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6800
6810 void name(Entity entity, const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) {
6811 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).name(name, len);
6812 }
6813
6827 void name_raw(Entity entity, const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) {
6828 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).name_raw(name, len);
6829 }
6830
6835 GAIA_NODISCARD util::str_view name(Entity entity) const {
6836 if (entity.pair())
6837 return {};
6838
6839 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
6840 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
6841 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
6842 return {};
6843
6844 const auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<const EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr(compIdx, ec.row));
6845 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
6846 return {pDesc->name, pDesc->name_len};
6847 }
6848
6853 GAIA_NODISCARD util::str_view name(EntityId entityId) const {
6854 auto entity = get(entityId);
6855 return name(entity);
6856 }
6857
6858 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
6859
6867 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity resolve(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
6868 if (name == nullptr || name[0] == 0)
6869 return EntityBad;
6870
6871 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(name, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
6872 GAIA_ASSERT(l < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
6873
6874 if (memchr(name, '.', l) != nullptr) {
6875 const auto entity = get_entity_inter(name, l);
6876 if (entity != EntityBad)
6877 return entity;
6878 }
6879
6880 return get_inter(name, l);
6881 }
6882
6888 void resolve(cnt::darray<Entity>& out, const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
6889 out.clear();
6890 if (name == nullptr || name[0] == 0)
6891 return;
6892
6893 const auto l = len == 0 ? (uint32_t)GAIA_STRLEN(name, ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength) : len;
6894 GAIA_ASSERT(l < ComponentCacheItem::MaxNameLength);
6895
6896 auto push_unique = [&](Entity entity) {
6897 if (entity == EntityBad)
6898 return;
6899 for (const auto existing: out) {
6900 if (existing == entity)
6901 return;
6902 }
6903 out.push_back(entity);
6904 };
6905
6906 push_unique(get_entity_inter(name, l));
6907
6908 if (memchr(name, '.', l) == nullptr && memchr(name, ':', l) == nullptr) {
6909 const auto pushLookupHit = [&](const ComponentCacheItem& item) {
6910 push_unique(item.entity);
6911 return false;
6912 };
6913
6914 (void)find_component_in_scope_chain_inter(m_componentScope, name, l, pushLookupHit);
6915 for (const auto scopeEntity: m_componentLookupPath) {
6916 if (scopeEntity == m_componentScope)
6917 continue;
6918
6919 (void)find_component_in_scope_chain_inter(scopeEntity, name, l, pushLookupHit);
6920 }
6921 }
6922
6923 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.symbol(name, l); pItem != nullptr)
6924 push_unique(pItem->entity);
6925
6926 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.path(name, l); pItem != nullptr) {
6927 push_unique(pItem->entity);
6928 } else {
6929 const auto needle = util::str_view(name, l);
6930 m_compCache.for_each_item([&](const ComponentCacheItem& item) {
6931 if (item.path.view() == needle)
6932 push_unique(item.entity);
6933 });
6934 }
6935
6936 if (out.empty() && memchr(name, '.', l) == nullptr && memchr(name, ':', l) == nullptr) {
6937 if (const auto* pItem = m_compCache.short_symbol(name, l); pItem != nullptr)
6938 push_unique(pItem->entity);
6939 }
6940
6941 push_unique(alias(name, l));
6942 }
6943
6949 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity get(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
6950 return resolve(name, len);
6951 }
6952
6953 private:
6954 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity find_named_entity_inter(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
6955 if (name == nullptr || name[0] == 0)
6956 return EntityBad;
6957
6958 const auto key = EntityNameLookupKey(name, len, 0);
6959 const auto it = m_nameToEntity.find(key);
6960 return it != m_nameToEntity.end() ? it->second : EntityBad;
6961 }
6962
6963 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity get_entity_inter(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
6964 if (name == nullptr || name[0] == 0)
6965 return EntityBad;
6966
6967 if (len == 0) {
6968 while (name[len] != '\0')
6969 ++len;
6970 }
6971
6972 Entity parent = EntityBad;
6973 Entity child = EntityBad;
6974 uint32_t posDot = 0;
6975 std::span<const char> str(name, len);
6976
6977 posDot = core::get_index(str, '.');
6978 if (posDot == BadIndex)
6979 return find_named_entity_inter(str.data(), (uint32_t)str.size());
6980
6981 if (posDot == 0)
6982 return EntityBad;
6983
6984 parent = find_named_entity_inter(str.data(), posDot);
6985 if (parent == EntityBad)
6986 return EntityBad;
6987
6988 str = str.subspan(posDot + 1);
6989 while (!str.empty()) {
6990 posDot = core::get_index(str, '.');
6991
6992 if (posDot == BadIndex) {
6993 child = find_named_entity_inter(str.data(), (uint32_t)str.size());
6994 if (child == EntityBad || !this->child(child, parent))
6995 return EntityBad;
6996
6997 return child;
6998 }
6999
7000 if (posDot == 0)
7001 return EntityBad;
7002
7003 child = find_named_entity_inter(str.data(), posDot);
7004 if (child == EntityBad || !this->child(child, parent))
7005 return EntityBad;
7006
7007 parent = child;
7008 str = str.subspan(posDot + 1);
7009 }
7010
7011 return parent;
7012 }
7013
7014 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity get_inter(const char* name, uint32_t len = 0) const {
7015 if (name == nullptr || name[0] == 0)
7016 return EntityBad;
7017
7018 auto key = EntityNameLookupKey(name, len, 0);
7019 const auto l = key.len();
7020
7021 if ((m_componentScope != EntityBad || !m_componentLookupPath.empty()) && memchr(name, '.', l) == nullptr &&
7022 memchr(name, ':', l) == nullptr) {
7023 const auto* pScopedItem = resolve_component_name_inter(name, l);
7024 if (pScopedItem != nullptr) {
7025 const auto it = m_nameToEntity.find(key);
7026 if (it == m_nameToEntity.end())
7027 return pScopedItem->entity;
7028
7029 if (m_compCache.find(it->second) != nullptr)
7030 return pScopedItem->entity;
7031 }
7032 }
7033
7034 const auto it = m_nameToEntity.find(key);
7035 if (it != m_nameToEntity.end())
7036 return it->second;
7037
7038 // Name not found. This might be a component so check the component cache
7039 const auto* pItem = resolve_component_name_inter(name, l);
7040 if (pItem != nullptr)
7041 return pItem->entity;
7042
7043 const auto aliasEntity = alias(name, l);
7044 if (aliasEntity != EntityBad)
7045 return aliasEntity;
7046
7047 // No entity with the given name exists. Return a bad entity
7048 return EntityBad;
7049 }
7050
7051 public:
7052 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
7053
7057 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::set<EntityLookupKey>* relations(Entity target) const {
7058 const auto it = m_tgtToRel.find(EntityLookupKey(target));
7059 if (it == m_tgtToRel.end())
7060 return nullptr;
7061
7062 return &it->second;
7063 }
7064
7070 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity relation(Entity entity, Entity target) const {
7071 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
7072 if (!valid(target))
7073 return EntityBad;
7074
7075 const auto itAdjunctRels = m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
7076 if (itAdjunctRels != m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.end()) {
7077 for (auto relKey: itAdjunctRels->second) {
7078 const auto relation = relKey;
7079 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7080 if (pStore == nullptr)
7081 continue;
7082
7083 if (exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, entity) == target)
7084 return relation;
7085 }
7086 }
7087
7088 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
7089 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7090
7091 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
7092 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7093 return EntityBad;
7094
7095 const auto indices = pArchetype->pair_tgt_indices(target);
7096 if (indices.empty())
7097 return EntityBad;
7098
7099 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7100 const auto e = ids[indices[0]];
7101 const auto& ecRel = m_recs.entities[e.id()];
7102 return *ecRel.pEntity;
7103 }
7104
7110 template <typename Func>
7111 void relations(Entity entity, Entity target, Func func) const {
7112 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
7113 if (!valid(target))
7114 return;
7115
7116 const auto itAdjunctRels = m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
7117 if (itAdjunctRels != m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.end()) {
7118 for (auto relKey: itAdjunctRels->second) {
7119 const auto relation = relKey;
7120 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7121 if (pStore == nullptr)
7122 continue;
7123
7124 if (exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, entity) == target)
7125 func(relation);
7126 }
7127 }
7128
7129 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
7130 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7131
7132 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
7133 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7134 return;
7135
7136 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7137 for (auto idsIdx: pArchetype->pair_tgt_indices(target)) {
7138 const auto e = ids[idsIdx];
7139
7140 const auto& ecRel = m_recs.entities[e.id()];
7141 auto relation = *ecRel.pEntity;
7142 func(relation);
7143 }
7144 }
7145
7152 template <typename Func>
7153 void relations_if(Entity entity, Entity target, Func func) const {
7154 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
7155 if (!valid(target))
7156 return;
7157
7158 const auto itAdjunctRels = m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
7159 if (itAdjunctRels != m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.end()) {
7160 for (auto relKey: itAdjunctRels->second) {
7161 const auto relation = relKey;
7162 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7163 if (pStore == nullptr)
7164 continue;
7165
7166 if (exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, entity) == target) {
7167 if (!func(relation))
7168 return;
7169 }
7170 }
7171 }
7172
7173 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
7174 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7175
7176 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
7177 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7178 return;
7179
7180 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7181 for (auto idsIdx: pArchetype->pair_tgt_indices(target)) {
7182 const auto e = ids[idsIdx];
7183
7184 const auto& ecRel = m_recs.entities[e.id()];
7185 auto relation = *ecRel.pEntity;
7186 if (!func(relation))
7187 return;
7188 }
7189 }
7190
7193 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::darray<Entity>& as_relations_trav_cache(Entity target) const {
7194 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(target);
7195 const auto itCache = m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache.find(key);
7196 if (itCache != m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache.end())
7197 return itCache->second;
7198
7199 auto& cache = m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache[key];
7200 const auto it = m_entityToAsRelations.find(key);
7201 if (it == m_entityToAsRelations.end())
7202 return cache;
7203
7205 cnt::darray_ext<EntityLookupKey, 32> stack;
7206 stack.reserve((uint32_t)it->second.size());
7207 for (auto relation: it->second)
7208 stack.push_back(relation);
7209
7210 while (!stack.empty()) {
7211 const auto relationKey = stack.back();
7212 stack.pop_back();
7213
7214 const auto relation = relationKey.entity();
7215 cache.push_back(relation);
7216
7217 const auto itChild = m_entityToAsRelations.find(relationKey);
7218 if (itChild == m_entityToAsRelations.end())
7219 continue;
7220
7221 for (auto childRelation: itChild->second)
7222 stack.push_back(childRelation);
7223 }
7224
7225 return cache;
7226 }
7227
7230 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::darray<Entity>& as_targets_trav_cache(Entity relation) const {
7231 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(relation);
7232 const auto itCache = m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache.find(key);
7233 if (itCache != m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache.end())
7234 return itCache->second;
7235
7236 auto& cache = m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache[key];
7237 const auto it = m_entityToAsTargets.find(key);
7238 if (it == m_entityToAsTargets.end())
7239 return cache;
7240
7242 cnt::darray_ext<EntityLookupKey, 16> stack;
7243 stack.reserve((uint32_t)it->second.size());
7244 for (auto target: it->second)
7245 stack.push_back(target);
7246
7247 while (!stack.empty()) {
7248 const auto targetKey = stack.back();
7249 stack.pop_back();
7250
7251 const auto target = targetKey.entity();
7252 cache.push_back(target);
7253
7254 const auto itChild = m_entityToAsTargets.find(targetKey);
7255 if (itChild == m_entityToAsTargets.end())
7256 continue;
7257
7258 for (auto childTarget: itChild->second)
7259 stack.push_back(childTarget);
7260 }
7261
7262 return cache;
7263 }
7264
7267 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::darray<Entity>& targets_trav_cache(Entity relation, Entity source) const {
7268 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(Pair(relation, source));
7269 const auto itCache = m_targetsTravCache.find(key);
7270 if (itCache != m_targetsTravCache.end())
7271 return itCache->second;
7272
7273 auto& cache = m_targetsTravCache[key];
7274 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(source))
7275 return cache;
7276
7277 auto curr = source;
7278 GAIA_FOR(MAX_TRAV_DEPTH) {
7279 const auto next = target(curr, relation);
7280 if (next == EntityBad || next == curr)
7281 break;
7282
7283 cache.push_back(next);
7284 curr = next;
7285 }
7286
7287 return cache;
7288 }
7289
7292 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::darray<Entity>& targets_all_cache(Entity source) const {
7293 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(source);
7294 const auto itCache = m_targetsAllCache.find(key);
7295 if (itCache != m_targetsAllCache.end())
7296 return itCache->second;
7297
7298 auto& cache = m_targetsAllCache[key];
7299 if (!valid(source))
7300 return cache;
7301
7302 const auto visitStamp = next_entity_visit_stamp();
7303
7304 const auto itAdjunctRels = m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.find(key);
7305 if (itAdjunctRels != m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel.end()) {
7306 for (auto rel: itAdjunctRels->second) {
7307 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(rel);
7308 if (pStore == nullptr)
7309 continue;
7310
7311 const auto target = exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, source);
7312 if (target != EntityBad && try_mark_entity_visited(target, visitStamp))
7313 cache.push_back(target);
7314 }
7315 }
7316
7317 const auto& ec = fetch(source);
7318 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7319 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7320 return cache;
7321
7322 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7323 for (auto idsIdx: pArchetype->pair_indices()) {
7324 const auto id = ids[idsIdx];
7325 const auto target = pair_target_if_alive(id);
7326 if (target == EntityBad)
7327 continue;
7328 if (try_mark_entity_visited(target, visitStamp))
7329 cache.push_back(target);
7330 }
7331
7332 return cache;
7333 }
7334
7337 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::darray<Entity>& sources_all_cache(Entity target) const {
7338 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(target);
7339 const auto itCache = m_sourcesAllCache.find(key);
7340 if (itCache != m_sourcesAllCache.end())
7341 return itCache->second;
7342
7343 auto& cache = m_sourcesAllCache[key];
7344 if (!valid(target))
7345 return cache;
7346
7347 const auto visitStamp = next_entity_visit_stamp();
7348
7349 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
7350 (void)relKey;
7351 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target);
7352 if (pSources == nullptr)
7353 continue;
7354
7355 for (auto source: *pSources) {
7356 if (valid(source) && try_mark_entity_visited(source, visitStamp))
7357 cache.push_back(source);
7358 }
7359 }
7360
7361 const auto pair = Pair(All, target);
7362 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(pair));
7363 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
7364 return cache;
7365
7366 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
7367 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
7368 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
7369 continue;
7370
7371 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
7372 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
7373 GAIA_EACH(entities) {
7374 const auto source = entities[i];
7375 if (!valid(source))
7376 continue;
7377 if (try_mark_entity_visited(source, visitStamp))
7378 cache.push_back(source);
7379 }
7380 }
7381 }
7382
7383 return cache;
7384 }
7385
7388 template <typename Func>
7389 void targets_trav(Entity relation, Entity source, Func func) const {
7390 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(source))
7391 return;
7392
7393 auto curr = source;
7394 GAIA_FOR(MAX_TRAV_DEPTH) {
7395 const auto next = target(curr, relation);
7396 if (next == EntityBad || next == curr)
7397 break;
7398 if (!enabled(next))
7399 break;
7400
7401 func(next);
7402 curr = next;
7403 }
7404 }
7405
7409 template <typename Func>
7410 GAIA_NODISCARD bool targets_trav_if(Entity relation, Entity source, Func func) const {
7411 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(source))
7412 return false;
7413
7414 auto curr = source;
7415 GAIA_FOR(MAX_TRAV_DEPTH) {
7416 const auto next = target(curr, relation);
7417 if (next == EntityBad || next == curr)
7418 break;
7419 if (!enabled(next))
7420 break;
7421
7422 if (!func(next))
7423 return true;
7424 curr = next;
7425 }
7426
7427 return false;
7428 }
7429
7432 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::darray<Entity>& sources_bfs_trav_cache(Entity relation, Entity rootTarget) const {
7433 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(Pair(relation, rootTarget));
7434 const auto itCache = m_srcBfsTravCache.find(key);
7435 if (itCache != m_srcBfsTravCache.end())
7436 return itCache->second;
7437
7438 auto& cache = m_srcBfsTravCache[key];
7439 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(rootTarget))
7440 return cache;
7441
7442 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 32> queue;
7443 queue.push_back(rootTarget);
7444
7445 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> visited;
7446 visited.insert(EntityLookupKey(rootTarget));
7447
7448 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < queue.size(); ++i) {
7449 const auto currTarget = queue[i];
7450
7451 cnt::darray<Entity> children;
7452 sources(relation, currTarget, [&](Entity source) {
7453 const auto keySource = EntityLookupKey(source);
7454 const auto ins = visited.insert(keySource);
7455 if (!ins.second)
7456 return;
7457
7458 children.push_back(source);
7459 });
7460
7461 core::sort(children, [](Entity left, Entity right) {
7462 return left.id() < right.id();
7463 });
7464
7465 for (auto child: children) {
7466 cache.push_back(child);
7467 queue.push_back(child);
7468 }
7469 }
7470
7471 return cache;
7472 }
7473
7477 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t depth_order_cache(Entity relation, Entity sourceTarget) const {
7478 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(Pair(relation, sourceTarget));
7479 const auto itCache = m_depthOrderCache.find(key);
7480 if (itCache != m_depthOrderCache.end()) {
7481 GAIA_ASSERT(itCache->second != GroupIdMax && "depth_order requires an acyclic relation graph");
7482 return itCache->second;
7483 }
7484
7485 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(sourceTarget))
7486 return 0;
7487
7488 // Mark this node as in-flight so cycles trip a debug assert instead of recursing forever.
7489 m_depthOrderCache[key] = GroupIdMax;
7490
7491 uint32_t depth = 1;
7492 targets(sourceTarget, relation, [&](Entity next) {
7493 const auto nextDepth = depth_order_cache(relation, next);
7494 if (nextDepth == 0)
7495 return;
7496 const auto candidate = nextDepth + 1;
7497 if (candidate > depth)
7498 depth = candidate;
7499 });
7500
7501 m_depthOrderCache[key] = depth;
7502 return depth;
7503 }
7504
7509 template <typename Func>
7510 void as_relations_trav(Entity target, Func func) const {
7511 if (!valid(target))
7512 return;
7513
7514 const auto& relations = as_relations_trav_cache(target);
7515 for (auto relation: relations)
7516 func(relation);
7517 }
7518
7524 template <typename Func>
7525 GAIA_NODISCARD bool as_relations_trav_if(Entity target, Func func) const {
7526 if (!valid(target))
7527 return false;
7528
7529 const auto& relations = as_relations_trav_cache(target);
7530 for (auto relation: relations) {
7531 if (func(relation))
7532 return true;
7533 }
7534
7535 return false;
7536 }
7537
7538 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
7539
7543 GAIA_NODISCARD const cnt::set<EntityLookupKey>* targets(Entity relation) const {
7544 const auto it = m_relToTgt.find(EntityLookupKey(relation));
7545 if (it == m_relToTgt.end())
7546 return nullptr;
7547
7548 return &it->second;
7549 }
7550
7556 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity target(Entity entity, Entity relation) const {
7557 if (!valid(entity))
7558 return EntityBad;
7559 if (relation != All && !valid(relation))
7560 return EntityBad;
7561
7562 if (relation == All) {
7563 const auto& targets = targets_all_cache(entity);
7564 return targets.empty() ? EntityBad : targets[0];
7565 }
7566
7567 if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation)) {
7568 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7569 if (pStore == nullptr)
7570 return EntityBad;
7571
7572 return exclusive_adjunct_target(*pStore, entity);
7573 }
7574
7575 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
7576 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7577
7578 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
7579 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7580 return EntityBad;
7581
7582 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7583 for (auto idsIdx: pArchetype->pair_rel_indices(relation)) {
7584 const auto e = ids[idsIdx];
7585 const auto target = pair_target_if_alive(e);
7586 if (target == EntityBad)
7587 continue;
7588 return target;
7589 }
7590
7591 return EntityBad;
7592 }
7593
7599 template <typename Func>
7600 void targets(Entity entity, Entity relation, Func func) const {
7601 if (!valid(entity))
7602 return;
7603 if (relation != All && !valid(relation))
7604 return;
7605
7606 if (relation == All) {
7607 for (auto target: targets_all_cache(entity))
7608 func(target);
7609 return;
7610 }
7611
7612 if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation)) {
7613 const auto target = this->target(entity, relation);
7614 if (target != EntityBad)
7615 func(target);
7616 return;
7617 }
7618
7619 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
7620 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7621
7622 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
7623 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7624 return;
7625
7626 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7627 for (auto idsIdx: pArchetype->pair_rel_indices(relation)) {
7628 const auto e = ids[idsIdx];
7629 const auto target = pair_target_if_alive(e);
7630 if (target == EntityBad)
7631 continue;
7632 func(target);
7633 }
7634 }
7635
7642 template <typename Func>
7643 void targets_if(Entity entity, Entity relation, Func func) const {
7644 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
7645 if (relation != All && !valid(relation))
7646 return;
7647
7648 if (relation == All) {
7649 for (auto target: targets_all_cache(entity)) {
7650 if (!func(target))
7651 return;
7652 }
7653 return;
7654 }
7655
7656 if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation)) {
7657 const auto target = this->target(entity, relation);
7658 if (target != EntityBad)
7659 (void)func(target);
7660 return;
7661 }
7662
7663 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
7664 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
7665
7666 // Early exit if there are no pairs on the archetype
7667 if (pArchetype->pairs() == 0)
7668 return;
7669
7670 const auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
7671 for (auto idsIdx: pArchetype->pair_rel_indices(relation)) {
7672 const auto e = ids[idsIdx];
7673 const auto target = pair_target_if_alive(e);
7674 if (target == EntityBad)
7675 continue;
7676 if (!func(target))
7677 return;
7678 }
7679 }
7680
7682 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity pair_target_if_alive(Entity pair) const {
7683 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.pair());
7684 if (!valid_entity_id((EntityId)pair.gen()))
7685 return EntityBad;
7686
7687 const auto& ecTarget = m_recs.entities[pair.gen()];
7688 if (ecTarget.pEntity == nullptr)
7689 return EntityBad;
7690
7691 const auto target = *ecTarget.pEntity;
7692 return valid(target) ? target : EntityBad;
7693 }
7694
7700 template <typename Func>
7701 void sources(Entity relation, Entity target, Func func) const {
7702 if ((relation != All && !valid(relation)) || !valid(target))
7703 return;
7704
7705 if (relation == All) {
7706 for (auto source: sources_all_cache(target))
7707 func(source);
7708 return;
7709 }
7710
7711 if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation)) {
7712 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7713 if (pStore == nullptr)
7714 return;
7715
7716 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(*pStore, target);
7717 if (pSources == nullptr)
7718 return;
7719
7720 for (auto source: *pSources) {
7721 if (!valid(source))
7722 continue;
7723
7724 func(source);
7725 }
7726 return;
7727 }
7728
7729 const auto pair = Pair(relation, target);
7730 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(pair));
7731 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
7732 return;
7733
7734 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
7735 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
7736 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
7737 continue;
7738
7739 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
7740 auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
7741 GAIA_EACH(entities) {
7742 const auto source = entities[i];
7743 if (!valid(source))
7744 continue;
7745 func(source);
7746 }
7747 }
7748 }
7749 }
7750
7757 template <typename Func>
7758 void sources_if(Entity relation, Entity target, Func func) const {
7759 if ((relation != All && !valid(relation)) || !valid(target))
7760 return;
7761
7762 if (relation == All) {
7763 for (auto source: sources_all_cache(target)) {
7764 if (!func(source))
7765 return;
7766 }
7767 return;
7768 }
7769
7770 if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation)) {
7771 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7772 if (pStore == nullptr)
7773 return;
7774
7775 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(*pStore, target);
7776 if (pSources == nullptr)
7777 return;
7778
7779 for (auto source: *pSources) {
7780 if (!valid(source))
7781 continue;
7782
7783 if (!func(source))
7784 return;
7785 }
7786 return;
7787 }
7788
7789 const auto pair = Pair(relation, target);
7790 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(pair));
7791 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
7792 return;
7793
7794 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
7795 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
7796 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
7797 continue;
7798
7799 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
7800 auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
7801 GAIA_EACH(entities) {
7802 const auto source = entities[i];
7803 if (!valid(source))
7804 continue;
7805 if (!func(source))
7806 return;
7807 }
7808 }
7809 }
7810 }
7811
7812 private:
7813 GAIA_NODISCARD uint64_t next_entity_visit_stamp() const {
7814 ++m_entityVisitStamp;
7815 if (m_entityVisitStamp != 0)
7816 return m_entityVisitStamp;
7817
7818 const auto cnt = (uint32_t)m_entityVisitStamps.size();
7819 GAIA_FOR(cnt) {
7820 m_entityVisitStamps[i] = 0;
7821 }
7822
7823 m_entityVisitStamp = 1;
7824 return m_entityVisitStamp;
7825 }
7826
7827 GAIA_NODISCARD bool try_mark_entity_visited(Entity entity, uint64_t stamp) const {
7828 GAIA_ASSERT(!entity.pair());
7829 if (entity.id() >= m_entityVisitStamps.size())
7830 m_entityVisitStamps.resize(m_recs.entities.size(), 0);
7831
7832 auto& slot = m_entityVisitStamps[entity.id()];
7833 if (slot == stamp)
7834 return false;
7835
7836 slot = stamp;
7837 return true;
7838 }
7839
7840 template <typename Func>
7841 GAIA_NODISCARD bool for_each_inherited_term_entity(Entity term, Func&& func) const {
7842 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> seen;
7843 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
7844 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
7845 return true;
7846
7847 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
7848 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
7849 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
7850 continue;
7851
7852 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
7853 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
7854 GAIA_EACH(entities) {
7855 const auto entity = entities[i];
7856 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
7857 const auto entityKey = EntityLookupKey(entity);
7858 if (seen.contains(entityKey))
7859 continue;
7860 seen.insert(entityKey);
7861
7862 if (!func(entity))
7863 return false;
7864
7865 const auto& descendants = as_relations_trav_cache(entity);
7866 for (const auto descendant: descendants) {
7867 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(descendant));
7868 const auto descendantKey = EntityLookupKey(descendant);
7869 if (seen.contains(descendantKey))
7870 continue;
7871 seen.insert(descendantKey);
7872
7873 if (!func(descendant))
7874 return false;
7875 }
7876 }
7877 }
7878 }
7879
7880 return true;
7881 }
7882
7885 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t count_direct_term_entities_inter(Entity term, bool allowSemanticIs) const {
7886 if (term == EntityBad)
7887 return 0;
7888
7889 if (allowSemanticIs && term.pair() && term.id() == Is.id() && !is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
7890 const auto target = get(term.gen());
7891 if (!valid(target))
7892 return 0;
7893
7894 return (uint32_t)as_relations_trav_cache(target).size() + 1;
7895 }
7896
7897 if (allowSemanticIs && !is_wildcard(term) && valid(term) && target(term, OnInstantiate) == Inherit) {
7898 uint32_t cnt = 0;
7899 (void)for_each_inherited_term_entity(term, [&](Entity) {
7900 ++cnt;
7901 return true;
7902 });
7903 return cnt;
7904 }
7905
7906 if (term.pair() && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity_from_id(*this, term.id()))) {
7907 const auto relation = entity_from_id(*this, term.id());
7908 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7909 if (pStore == nullptr)
7910 return 0;
7911
7912 if (is_wildcard(term.gen()))
7913 return pStore->srcToTgtCnt;
7914
7915 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(*pStore, entity_from_id(*this, term.gen()));
7916 return pSources != nullptr ? (uint32_t)pSources->size() : 0;
7917 }
7918
7919 if (!term.pair() && is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(term)) {
7920 const auto it = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
7921 return it != m_sparseComponentsByComp.end() ? it->second.func_count(it->second.pStore) : 0;
7922 }
7923
7924 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
7925 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
7926 return 0;
7927
7928 uint32_t cnt = 0;
7929 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
7930 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
7931 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
7932 continue;
7933 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks())
7934 cnt += pChunk->size();
7935 }
7936
7937 return cnt;
7938 }
7939
7941 void collect_direct_term_entities_inter(Entity term, cnt::darray<Entity>& out, bool allowSemanticIs) const {
7942 if (term == EntityBad)
7943 return;
7944
7945 if (allowSemanticIs && term.pair() && term.id() == Is.id() && !is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
7946 const auto target = get(term.gen());
7947 if (!valid(target))
7948 return;
7949
7950 out.push_back(target);
7951 const auto& relations = as_relations_trav_cache(target);
7952 out.reserve(out.size() + (uint32_t)relations.size());
7953 for (auto relation: relations)
7954 out.push_back(relation);
7955 return;
7956 }
7957
7958 if (allowSemanticIs && !is_wildcard(term) && valid(term) && target(term, OnInstantiate) == Inherit) {
7959 (void)for_each_inherited_term_entity(term, [&](Entity entity) {
7960 out.push_back(entity);
7961 return true;
7962 });
7963 return;
7964 }
7965
7966 if (term.pair() && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity_from_id(*this, term.id()))) {
7967 const auto relation = entity_from_id(*this, term.id());
7968 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
7969 if (pStore == nullptr)
7970 return;
7971
7972 if (is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
7973 out.reserve(out.size() + pStore->srcToTgtCnt);
7974 const auto cnt = (uint32_t)pStore->srcToTgt.size();
7975 GAIA_FOR(cnt) {
7976 const auto target = pStore->srcToTgt[i];
7977 if (target == EntityBad)
7978 continue;
7979 if (!m_recs.entities.has(i))
7980 continue;
7981 out.push_back(EntityContainer::handle(m_recs.entities[i]));
7982 }
7983 return;
7984 }
7985
7986 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(*pStore, entity_from_id(*this, term.gen()));
7987 if (pSources == nullptr)
7988 return;
7989
7990 out.reserve(out.size() + (uint32_t)pSources->size());
7991 for (auto source: *pSources)
7992 out.push_back(source);
7993 return;
7994 }
7995
7996 if (!term.pair() && is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(term)) {
7997 const auto it = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
7998 if (it != m_sparseComponentsByComp.end())
7999 it->second.func_collect_entities(it->second.pStore, out);
8000 return;
8001 }
8002
8003 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
8004 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
8005 return;
8006
8007 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
8008 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
8009 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
8010 continue;
8011
8012 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
8013 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
8014 out.reserve(out.size() + (uint32_t)entities.size());
8015 GAIA_EACH(entities)
8016 out.push_back(entities[i]);
8017 }
8018 }
8019 }
8020
8022 GAIA_NODISCARD bool for_each_direct_term_entity_inter(
8023 Entity term, void* ctx, bool (*func)(void*, Entity), bool allowSemanticIs) const {
8024 if (term == EntityBad)
8025 return true;
8026
8027 if (allowSemanticIs && term.pair() && term.id() == Is.id() && !is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
8028 const auto target = get(term.gen());
8029 if (!valid(target))
8030 return true;
8031
8032 if (!func(ctx, target))
8033 return false;
8034
8035 const auto& relations = as_relations_trav_cache(target);
8036 for (auto relation: relations) {
8037 if (!func(ctx, relation))
8038 return false;
8039 }
8040 return true;
8041 }
8042
8043 if (allowSemanticIs && !is_wildcard(term) && valid(term) && target(term, OnInstantiate) == Inherit) {
8044 return for_each_inherited_term_entity(term, [&](Entity entity) {
8045 return func(ctx, entity);
8046 });
8047 }
8048
8049 if (term.pair() && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity_from_id(*this, term.id()))) {
8050 const auto relation = entity_from_id(*this, term.id());
8051 const auto* pStore = exclusive_adjunct_store(relation);
8052 if (pStore == nullptr)
8053 return true;
8054
8055 if (is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
8056 const auto cnt = (uint32_t)pStore->srcToTgt.size();
8057 GAIA_FOR(cnt) {
8058 const auto target = pStore->srcToTgt[i];
8059 if (target == EntityBad)
8060 continue;
8061 if (!m_recs.entities.has(i))
8062 continue;
8063 if (!func(ctx, EntityContainer::handle(m_recs.entities[i])))
8064 return false;
8065 }
8066 return true;
8067 }
8068
8069 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(*pStore, entity_from_id(*this, term.gen()));
8070 if (pSources == nullptr)
8071 return true;
8072
8073 for (auto source: *pSources) {
8074 if (!func(ctx, source))
8075 return false;
8076 }
8077 return true;
8078 }
8079
8080 if (!term.pair() && is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(term)) {
8081 const auto it = m_sparseComponentsByComp.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
8082 if (it == m_sparseComponentsByComp.end())
8083 return true;
8084 return it->second.func_for_each_entity(it->second.pStore, ctx, func);
8085 }
8086
8087 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
8088 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
8089 return true;
8090
8091 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
8092 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
8093 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
8094 continue;
8095
8096 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
8097 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
8098 GAIA_EACH(entities) {
8099 if (!func(ctx, entities[i]))
8100 return false;
8101 }
8102 }
8103 }
8104
8105 return true;
8106 }
8107
8108 public:
8112 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t count_direct_term_entities(Entity term) const {
8113 return count_direct_term_entities_inter(term, true);
8114 }
8115
8119 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t count_direct_term_entities_direct(Entity term) const {
8120 return count_direct_term_entities_inter(term, false);
8121 }
8122
8126 void collect_direct_term_entities(Entity term, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) const {
8127 collect_direct_term_entities_inter(term, out, true);
8128 }
8129
8133 void collect_direct_term_entities_direct(Entity term, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) const {
8134 collect_direct_term_entities_inter(term, out, false);
8135 }
8136
8142 GAIA_NODISCARD bool for_each_direct_term_entity(Entity term, void* ctx, bool (*func)(void*, Entity)) const {
8143 return for_each_direct_term_entity_inter(term, ctx, func, true);
8144 }
8145
8151 GAIA_NODISCARD bool
8152 for_each_direct_term_entity_direct(Entity term, void* ctx, bool (*func)(void*, Entity)) const {
