8153 return for_each_direct_term_entity_inter(term, ctx, func, false);
8154 }
8155
8161 template <typename Func>
8162 void sources_bfs(Entity relation, Entity rootTarget, Func func) const {
8163 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(rootTarget))
8164 return;
8165
8166 cnt::darray<Entity> queue;
8167 queue.push_back(rootTarget);
8168
8169 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> visited;
8170 visited.insert(EntityLookupKey(rootTarget));
8171
8172 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < queue.size(); ++i) {
8173 const auto currTarget = queue[i];
8174
8175 cnt::darray<Entity> children;
8176 sources(relation, currTarget, [&](Entity source) {
8177 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(source);
8178 const auto ins = visited.insert(key);
8179 if (!ins.second)
8180 return;
8181
8182 children.push_back(source);
8183 });
8184
8185 core::sort(children, [](Entity left, Entity right) {
8186 return left.id() < right.id();
8187 });
8188
8189 for (auto child: children) {
8190 if (!enabled(child))
8191 continue;
8192 func(child);
8193 queue.push_back(child);
8194 }
8195 }
8196 }
8197
8205 template <typename Func>
8206 GAIA_NODISCARD bool sources_bfs_if(Entity relation, Entity rootTarget, Func func) const {
8207 if (!valid(relation) || !valid(rootTarget))
8208 return false;
8209
8210 cnt::darray<Entity> queue;
8211 queue.push_back(rootTarget);
8212
8213 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> visited;
8214 visited.insert(EntityLookupKey(rootTarget));
8215
8216 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < queue.size(); ++i) {
8217 const auto currTarget = queue[i];
8218
8219 cnt::darray<Entity> children;
8220 sources(relation, currTarget, [&](Entity source) {
8221 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(source);
8222 const auto ins = visited.insert(key);
8223 if (!ins.second)
8224 return;
8225
8226 children.push_back(source);
8227 });
8228
8229 core::sort(children, [](Entity left, Entity right) {
8230 return left.id() < right.id();
8231 });
8232
8233 for (auto child: children) {
8234 if (!enabled(child))
8235 continue;
8236 if (func(child))
8237 return true;
8238
8239 queue.push_back(child);
8240 }
8241 }
8242
8243 return false;
8244 }
8245
8249 template <typename Func>
8250 void children(Entity parent, Func func) const {
8251 sources(ChildOf, parent, func);
8252 }
8253
8258 template <typename Func>
8259 void children_if(Entity parent, Func func) const {
8260 sources_if(ChildOf, parent, func);
8261 }
8262
8266 template <typename Func>
8267 void children_bfs(Entity root, Func func) const {
8268 sources_bfs(ChildOf, root, func);
8269 }
8270
8276 template <typename Func>
8277 GAIA_NODISCARD bool children_bfs_if(Entity root, Func func) const {
8278 return sources_bfs_if(ChildOf, root, func);
8279 }
8280
8285 template <typename Func>
8286 void as_targets_trav(Entity relation, Func func) const {
8287 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(relation));
8288 if (!valid(relation))
8289 return;
8290
8291 const auto& targets = as_targets_trav_cache(relation);
8292 for (auto target: targets)
8293 func(target);
8294 }
8295
8301 template <typename Func>
8302 bool as_targets_trav_if(Entity relation, Func func) const {
8303 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(relation));
8304 if (!valid(relation))
8305 return false;
8306
8307 const auto& targets = as_targets_trav_cache(relation);
8308 for (auto target: targets)
8309 if (func(target))
8310 return true;
8311
8312 return false;
8313 }
8314
8315 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
8316
8319 CommandBufferST& cmd_buffer_st() const {
8320 return *m_pCmdBufferST;
8321 }
8322
8325 CommandBufferMT& cmd_buffer_mt() const {
8326 return *m_pCmdBufferMT;
8327 }
8328
8329 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
8330
8331#if GAIA_SYSTEMS_ENABLED
8332
8334 void systems_init();
8335
8337 void systems_run();
8338
8341 SystemBuilder system();
8342
8343#endif
8344
8345#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
8346
8349 ObserverBuilder observer();
8350
8352 ObserverRegistry& observers() {
8353 return m_observers;
8354 }
8355
8357 const ObserverRegistry& observers() const {
8358 return m_observers;
8359 }
8360
8361#endif
8362
8363 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
8364
8369 void enable(Entity entity, bool enable) {
8370 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
8371
8372 auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
8373 auto& archetype = *ec.pArchetype;
8374 auto* pChunk = ec.pChunk;
8375 const bool wasEnabled = !ec.data.dis;
8376#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
8377 verify_enable(*this, archetype, entity);
8378#endif
8379 archetype.enable_entity(ec.pChunk, ec.row, enable, m_recs);
8380
8381 if (wasEnabled != enable) {
8382 pChunk->update_world_version();
8383 pChunk->update_entity_order_version();
8384 update_version(m_enabledHierarchyVersion);
8385 update_version(m_worldVersion);
8386 }
8387 }
8388
8392 GAIA_NODISCARD bool enabled(const EntityContainer& ec) const {
8393 const bool entityStateInContainer = !ec.data.dis;
8394#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
8395 const bool entityStateInChunk = ec.pChunk->enabled(ec.row);
8396 GAIA_ASSERT(entityStateInChunk == entityStateInContainer);
8397#endif
8398 return entityStateInContainer;
8399 }
8400
8405 GAIA_NODISCARD bool enabled(Entity entity) const {
8406 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
8407
8408 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
8409 return enabled(ec);
8410 }
8411
8414 GAIA_NODISCARD bool enabled_hierarchy(Entity entity, Entity relation) const {
8415 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
8416 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(relation));
8417 if (!valid(entity) || !valid(relation))
8418 return false;
8419 if (!enabled(entity))
8420 return false;
8421
8422 auto curr = entity;
8423 GAIA_FOR(MAX_TRAV_DEPTH) {
8424 const auto next = target(curr, relation);
8425 if (next == EntityBad || next == curr)
8426 break;
8427 if (!enabled(next))
8428 return false;
8429 curr = next;
8430 }
8431
8432 return true;
8433 }
8434
8435 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
8436
8440 GAIA_NODISCARD Chunk* get_chunk(Entity entity) const {
8441 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.id() < m_recs.entities.size());
8442 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
8443 return ec.pChunk;
8444 }
8445
8451 GAIA_NODISCARD Chunk* get_chunk(Entity entity, uint32_t& row) const {
8452 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.id() < m_recs.entities.size());
8453 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
8454 row = ec.row;
8455 return ec.pChunk;
8456 }
8457
8460 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t size() const {
8461 return m_recs.entities.item_count();
8462 }
8463
8465 void runtime_counters(
8466 uint32_t& outArchetypes, uint32_t& outChunks, uint32_t& outEntitiesTotal, uint32_t& outEntitiesActive) const {
8467 outArchetypes = (uint32_t)m_archetypes.size();
8468 outChunks = 0;
8469 outEntitiesTotal = 0;
8470 outEntitiesActive = 0;
8471
8472 for (const auto* pArchetype: m_archetypes) {
8473 if (pArchetype == nullptr)
8474 continue;
8475 const auto& chunks = pArchetype->chunks();
8476 outChunks += (uint32_t)chunks.size();
8477 for (const auto* pChunk: chunks) {
8478 if (pChunk == nullptr)
8479 continue;
8480 outEntitiesTotal += pChunk->size();
8481 outEntitiesActive += pChunk->size_enabled();
8482 }
8483 }
8484 }
8485
8488 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t& world_version() {
8489 return m_worldVersion;
8490 }
8491
8494 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t rel_version(Entity relation) const {
8495 const auto it = m_relationVersions.find(EntityLookupKey(relation));
8496 return it != m_relationVersions.end() ? it->second : 0;
8497 }
8498
8502 GAIA_NODISCARD uint32_t enabled_hierarchy_version() const {
8503 return m_enabledHierarchyVersion;
8504 }
8505
8506 friend uint32_t world_rel_version(const World& world, Entity relation);
8507 friend uint32_t world_version(const World& world);
8508 friend uint32_t world_entity_archetype_version(const World& world, Entity entity);
8509
8511 void update_src_entity_version(Entity entity) {
8512 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(entity);
8513 const auto it = m_srcEntityVersions.find(key);
8514 if (it == m_srcEntityVersions.end())
8515 return;
8516
8517 update_version(it->second);
8518 }
8519
8521 void remove_src_entity_version(Entity entity) {
8522 m_srcEntityVersions.erase(EntityLookupKey(entity));
8523 }
8524
8529 void set_max_lifespan(Entity entity, uint32_t lifespan = Archetype::MAX_ARCHETYPE_LIFESPAN) {
8530 if (!valid(entity))
8531 return;
8532
8533 auto& ec = fetch(entity);
8534 const auto prevLifespan = ec.pArchetype->max_lifespan();
8535 ec.pArchetype->set_max_lifespan(lifespan);
8536
8537 if (prevLifespan == 0) {
8538 // The archetype used to be immortal but not anymore
8539 try_enqueue_archetype_for_deletion(*ec.pArchetype);
8540 }
8541 }
8542
8543 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
8544
8547 void update() {
8548 systems_run();
8549
8550 // Finish deleting entities
8551 del_finalize();
8552
8553 // Run garbage collector
8554 gc();
8555
8556 util::log_flush();
8557
8558 // Signal the end of the frame
8559 GAIA_PROF_FRAME();
8560 }
8561
8565 void teardown() {
8566 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (m_teardownActive)
8567 return;
8568 m_teardownActive = true;
8569
8570 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::teardown);
8571
8572#if GAIA_SYSTEMS_ENABLED
8573 systems_done();
8574#endif
8575
8576#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
8577 m_observers.teardown();
8578#endif
8579
8580 for (;;) {
8581 const auto prevReqArchetypes = m_reqArchetypesToDel.size();
8582 const auto prevReqEntities = m_reqEntitiesToDel.size();
8583 const auto prevChunks = m_chunksToDel.size();
8584 const auto prevArchetypes = m_archetypesToDel.size();
8585
8586 del_finalize();
8587 gc();
8588
8589 if (m_reqArchetypesToDel.empty() && m_reqEntitiesToDel.empty() && m_chunksToDel.empty() &&
8590 m_archetypesToDel.empty())
8591 break;
8592
8593 const bool madeProgress = m_reqArchetypesToDel.size() != prevReqArchetypes ||
8594 m_reqEntitiesToDel.size() != prevReqEntities ||
8595 m_chunksToDel.size() != prevChunks || m_archetypesToDel.size() != prevArchetypes;
8596 if (!madeProgress)
8597 break;
8598 }
8599
8600 util::log_flush();
8601 }
8602
8604 void cleanup() {
8605 cleanup_inter();
8606
8607 // Reinit
8608 m_pRootArchetype = nullptr;
8609 m_pEntityArchetype = nullptr;
8610 m_pCompArchetype = nullptr;
8611 m_nextArchetypeId = 0;
8612 m_defragLastArchetypeIdx = 0;
8613 m_worldVersion = 0;
8614 m_enabledHierarchyVersion = 0;
8615 init();
8616 }
8617
8620 void defrag_entities_per_tick(uint32_t value) {
8621 m_defragEntitiesPerTick = value;
8622 }
8623
8624 //--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
8625
8627 void diag_archetypes() const {
8628 GAIA_LOG_N("Archetypes:%u", (uint32_t)m_archetypes.size());
8629 for (auto* pArchetype: m_archetypes)
8630 Archetype::diag(*this, *pArchetype);
8631 }
8632
8635 void diag_components() const {
8636 comp_cache().diag();
8637 }
8638
8641 void diag_entities() const {
8642 validate_entities();
8643
8644 GAIA_LOG_N("Deleted entities: %u", (uint32_t)m_recs.entities.get_free_items());
8645 if (m_recs.entities.get_free_items() != 0U) {
8646 GAIA_LOG_N(" --> %u", (uint32_t)m_recs.entities.get_next_free_item());
8647
8648 uint32_t iters = 0;
8649 auto fe = m_recs.entities.next_free(m_recs.entities.get_next_free_item());
8650 while (fe != IdentifierIdBad) {
8651 GAIA_LOG_N(" --> %u", m_recs.entities.next_free(fe));
8652 fe = m_recs.entities.next_free(fe);
8653 ++iters;
8654 if (iters > m_recs.entities.get_free_items())
8655 break;
8656 }
8657
8658 if ((iters == 0U) || iters > m_recs.entities.get_free_items())
8659 GAIA_LOG_E(" Entities recycle list contains inconsistent data!");
8660 }
8661 }
8662
8664 void diag() const {
8665 diag_archetypes();
8666 diag_components();
8667 diag_entities();
8668 }
8669
8670 private:
8672 void cleanup_inter() {
8673 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::cleanup_inter);
8674
8675 // Shutdown bypasses the regular GC path, so clear raw-pointer tracking first.
8676 // Chunk/component dtors that run while archetypes are freed can still drop cached queries,
8677 // but after this point they must not touch stale archetype/chunk reverse indices.
8678 {
8679 m_queryCache.clear_archetype_tracking();
8680 m_reqArchetypesToDel = {};
8681 m_reqEntitiesToDel = {};
8682 m_entitiesToDel = {};
8683 m_chunksToDel = {};
8684 m_archetypesToDel = {};
8685 }
8686
8687 // Clear entities
8688 m_recs.entities = {};
8689 m_recs.pairs = {};
8690
8691 // Clear archetypes
8692 {
8693 // Delete all allocated chunks and their parent archetypes
8694 for (auto* pArchetype: m_archetypes)
8695 Archetype::destroy(pArchetype);
8696
8697 m_entityToAsRelations = {};
8698 m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache = {};
8699 m_entityToAsTargets = {};
8700 m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache = {};
8701 m_targetsTravCache = {};
8702 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
8703 m_depthOrderCache = {};
8704 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
8705 m_targetsAllCache = {};
8706 m_tgtToRel = {};
8707 m_relToTgt = {};
8708 m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel = {};
8709 m_srcToExclusiveAdjunctRel = {};
8710 for (auto& [compKey, store]: m_sparseComponentsByComp) {
8711 (void)compKey;
8712 store.func_clear_store(store.pStore);
8713 store.func_del_store(store.pStore);
8714 }
8715 m_sparseComponentsByComp = {};
8716 m_relationVersions = {};
8717 m_srcEntityVersions = {};
8718
8719 m_archetypes = {};
8720 m_archetypesById = {};
8721 m_archetypesByHash = {};
8722 }
8723
8724 // Clear caches
8725 {
8726 m_entityToArchetypeMap = {};
8727 m_queryCache.clear();
8728 for (auto* pScratch: m_queryMatchScratchStack)
8729 delete pScratch;
8730 m_queryMatchScratchStack = {};
8731 m_queryMatchScratchDepth = 0;
8732 m_querySerMap = {};
8733 m_nextQuerySerId = 0;
8734 }
8735
8736 // Clear entity aliases
8737 {
8738 for (auto& pair: m_aliasToEntity) {
8739 if (!pair.first.owned())
8740 continue;
8741 // Release any memory allocated for owned names
8742 mem::mem_free((void*)pair.first.str());
8743 }
8744 m_aliasToEntity = {};
8745 }
8746
8747 // Clear entity names
8748 {
8749 for (auto& pair: m_nameToEntity) {
8750 if (!pair.first.owned())
8751 continue;
8752 // Release any memory allocated for owned names
8753 mem::mem_free((void*)pair.first.str());
8754 }
8755 m_nameToEntity = {};
8756 }
8757
8758 // Clear component cache
8759 m_compCache.clear();
8760 }
8761
8762 GAIA_NODISCARD static bool valid(const EntityContainer& ec, [[maybe_unused]] Entity entityExpected) {
8763 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::Load) != 0) {
8764 return entityExpected.id() == ec.idx && entityExpected.gen() == ec.data.gen &&
8765 entityExpected.entity() == (bool)ec.data.ent && entityExpected.pair() == (bool)ec.data.pair &&
8766 entityExpected.kind() == (EntityKind)ec.data.kind;
8767 }
8768
8769 if (is_req_del(ec))
8770 return false;
8771
8772 // The entity in the chunk must match the index in the entity container
8773 const auto* pChunk = ec.pChunk;
8774 if (pChunk == nullptr || ec.row >= pChunk->size())
8775 return false;
8776
8777 const auto entityPresent = pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row];
8778 // Public validity checks can legitimately observe a recycled slot with a different generation.
8779 // Treat that as stale instead of aborting.
8780 return entityExpected == entityPresent;
8781 }
8782
8786 GAIA_NODISCARD bool valid_pair(Entity entity) const {
8787 if (entity == EntityBad)
8788 return false;
8789
8790 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.pair());
8791 if (!entity.pair())
8792 return false;
8793
8794 // Ignore wildcards because they can't be attached to entities
8795 if (is_wildcard(entity))
8796 return true;
8797
8798 const auto it = m_recs.pairs.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
8799 if (it == m_recs.pairs.end())
8800 return false;
8801
8802 const auto& ec = it->second;
8803 return valid(ec, entity);
8804 }
8805
8809 GAIA_NODISCARD bool valid_entity(Entity entity) const {
8810 if (entity == EntityBad)
8811 return false;
8812
8813 GAIA_ASSERT(!entity.pair());
8814 if (entity.pair())
8815 return false;
8816
8817 // Entity ID has to fit inside the entity array
8818 if (entity.id() >= m_recs.entities.size())
8819 return false;
8820
8821 const auto* pEc = m_recs.entities.try_get(entity.id());
8822 if (pEc == nullptr)
8823 return false;
8824
8825 return valid(*pEc, entity);
8826 }
8827
8832 GAIA_NODISCARD bool valid_entity_id(EntityId entityId) const {
8833 if (entityId == EntityBad.id())
8834 return false;
8835
8836 // Entity ID has to fit inside the entity array
8837 if (entityId >= m_recs.entities.size())
8838 return false;
8839
8840 const auto* pEc = m_recs.entities.try_get(entityId);
8841 if (pEc == nullptr)
8842 return false;
8843
8844 const auto& ec = *pEc;
8845 if (ec.data.pair != 0)
8846 return false;
8847
8848 return valid(
8849 ec, Entity(entityId, ec.data.gen, (bool)ec.data.ent, (bool)ec.data.pair, (EntityKind)ec.data.kind));
8850 }
8851
8855 void lock() {
8856 GAIA_ASSERT(m_structuralChangesLocked != (uint32_t)-1);
8857 ++m_structuralChangesLocked;
8858 }
8859
8863 void unlock() {
8864 GAIA_ASSERT(m_structuralChangesLocked > 0);
8865 --m_structuralChangesLocked;
8866 }
8867
8868#if GAIA_SYSTEMS_ENABLED
8869 void systems_done();
8870#endif
8871
8872 public:
8874 GAIA_NODISCARD bool locked() const {
8875 return m_structuralChangesLocked != 0;
8876 }
8877
8880 GAIA_NODISCARD bool tearing_down() const {
8881 return m_teardownActive;
8882 }
8883
8884 private:
8885 static constexpr uint32_t WorldSerializerVersion = 2;
8886 static constexpr uint32_t WorldSerializerJSONVersion = 1;
8887
8888 void save_to(ser::serializer s) const {
8889 GAIA_ASSERT(s.valid());
8890
8891 // Version number, currently unused
8892 s.save((uint32_t)WorldSerializerVersion);
8893
8894 // Store the index of the last core component.
8895 // TODO: As this changes, we will have to modify entity ids accordingly.
8896 const auto lastCoreComponentId = GAIA_ID(LastCoreComponent).id();
8897 s.save(lastCoreComponentId);
8898
8899 // Entities
8900 {
8901 auto saveEntityContainer = [&](const EntityContainer& ec) {
8902 s.save(ec.idx);
8903 s.save(ec.dataRaw);
8904 s.save(ec.row);
8905 GAIA_ASSERT((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::Load) == 0);
8906 s.save(ec.flags); // ignore Load
8907
8908#if GAIA_USE_SAFE_ENTITY
8909 s.save(ec.refCnt);
8910#else
8911 s.save((uint32_t)0);
8912#endif
8913
8914 uint32_t archetypeIdx = ec.pArchetype->list_idx();
8915 s.save(archetypeIdx);
8916 uint32_t chunkIdx = ec.pChunk->idx();
8917 s.save(chunkIdx);
8918 };
8919
8920 const auto recEntities = (uint32_t)m_recs.entities.size();
8921 const auto newEntities = recEntities - lastCoreComponentId;
8922 s.save(newEntities);
8923 GAIA_FOR2(lastCoreComponentId, recEntities) {
8924 const bool isAlive = m_recs.entities.has(i);
8925 s.save(isAlive);
8926 if (isAlive)
8927 saveEntityContainer(m_recs.entities[i]);
8928 else {
8929 s.save(m_recs.entities.handle(i).val);
8930 s.save(m_recs.entities.next_free(i));
8931 }
8932 }
8933
8934 {
8935 uint32_t pairsCnt = 0;
8936 for (const auto& pair: m_recs.pairs) {
8937 // Skip core pairs
8938 if (pair.first.entity().id() < lastCoreComponentId && pair.first.entity().gen() < lastCoreComponentId)
8939 continue;
8940
8941 ++pairsCnt;
8942 }
8943 s.save(pairsCnt);
8944 }
8945 {
8946 for (const auto& pair: m_recs.pairs) {
8947 // Skip core pairs
8948 if (pair.first.entity().id() < lastCoreComponentId && pair.first.entity().gen() < lastCoreComponentId)
8949 continue;
8950
8951 saveEntityContainer(pair.second);
8952 }
8953 }
8954
8955 s.save(m_recs.entities.m_nextFreeIdx);
8956 s.save(m_recs.entities.m_freeItems);
8957 }
8958
8959 // World
8960 {
8961 s.save((uint32_t)m_archetypes.size());
8962 for (auto* pArchetype: m_archetypes) {
8963 s.save((uint32_t)pArchetype->ids_view().size());
8964 for (auto e: pArchetype->ids_view())
8965 s.save(e);
8966
8967 pArchetype->save(s);
8968 }
8969
8970 s.save(m_worldVersion);
8971 }
8972
8973 // Entity names
8974 {
8975 s.save((uint32_t)m_nameToEntity.size());
8976 for (const auto& pair: m_nameToEntity) {
8977 s.save(pair.second);
8978 const bool isOwnedStr = pair.first.owned();
8979 s.save(isOwnedStr);
8980
8981 // For owner string we copy the entire string into the buffer
8982 if (isOwnedStr) {
8983 const auto* str = pair.first.str();
8984 const uint32_t len = pair.first.len();
8985 s.save(len);
8986 s.save_raw(str, len, ser::serialization_type_id::c8);
8987 }
8988 // Non-owned strings will only store the pointer.
8989 // However, if it is a component, we do not store anything at all because we can reconstruct
8990 // the name from our component cache.
8991 else if (!pair.second.comp()) {
8992 const auto* str = pair.first.str();
8993 const uint32_t len = pair.first.len();
8994 s.save(len);
8995 const auto ptr_val = (uint64_t)str;
8996 s.save_raw(&ptr_val, sizeof(ptr_val), ser::serialization_type_id::u64);
8997 }
8998 }
8999 }
9000
9001 // Entity aliases
9002 {
9003 uint32_t aliasCnt = 0;
9004 GAIA_FOR((uint32_t)m_recs.entities.size()) {
9005 const auto entity = get((EntityId)i);
9006 if (!valid(entity) || entity.pair())
9007 continue;
9008
9009 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[i];
9010 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
9011 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
9012 continue;
9013
9014 const auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<const EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr(compIdx, ec.row));
9015 if (pDesc->alias != nullptr)
9016 ++aliasCnt;
9017 }
9018
9019 s.save(aliasCnt);
9020 GAIA_FOR((uint32_t)m_recs.entities.size()) {
9021 const auto entity = get((EntityId)i);
9022 if (!valid(entity) || entity.pair())
9023 continue;
9024
9025 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[i];
9026 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
9027 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
9028 continue;
9029
9030 const auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<const EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr(compIdx, ec.row));
9031 if (pDesc->alias == nullptr)
9032 continue;
9033
9034 s.save(entity);
9035 s.save(pDesc->alias_len);
9036 s.save_raw(pDesc->alias, pDesc->alias_len, ser::serialization_type_id::c8);
9037 }
9038 }
9039 }
9040
9041 public:
9048 void save() {
9049 auto s = m_serializer;
9050 GAIA_ASSERT(s.valid());
9051
9052 s.reset();
9053 save_to(s);
9054 }
9055
9060 bool save_json(ser::ser_json& writer, ser::JsonSaveFlags flags = ser::JsonSaveFlags::Default) const;
9061
9063 ser::json_str save_json(bool& ok, ser::JsonSaveFlags flags = ser::JsonSaveFlags::Default) const;
9064
9068 bool load_json(const char* json, uint32_t len, ser::JsonDiagnostics& diagnostics);
9069
9074 bool load_json(const char* json, uint32_t len);
9075
9080 bool load_json(ser::json_str_view json, ser::JsonDiagnostics& diagnostics);
9081
9085 bool load_json(ser::json_str_view json);
9086
9093 bool load(ser::serializer inputSerializer = {}) {
9094 auto s = inputSerializer.valid() ? inputSerializer : m_serializer;
9095 GAIA_ASSERT(s.valid());
9096
9097 // Move back to the beginning of the stream
9098 s.seek(0);
9099
9100 // Version number, currently unused
9101 uint32_t version = 0;
9102 s.load(version);
9103 if (version != WorldSerializerVersion) {
9104 GAIA_LOG_E("Unsupported world version %u. Expected %u.", version, WorldSerializerVersion);
9105 return false;
9106 }
9107
9108 // Store the index of the last core component. As they change, we will have to modify entity ids accordingly.
9109 uint32_t lastCoreComponentId = 0;
9110 s.load(lastCoreComponentId);
9111
9112 // Append-only core ids are handled via load-time entity remapping.
9113 // Snapshots from a runtime with a larger core-id boundary are not supported.
9114 const auto currLastCoreComponentId = GAIA_ID(LastCoreComponent).id();
9115 if (lastCoreComponentId > currLastCoreComponentId) {
9116 GAIA_LOG_E(
9117 "Unsupported world core boundary %u. Current runtime supports up to %u.", lastCoreComponentId,
9118 currLastCoreComponentId);
9119 return false;
9120 }
9121 // Install the append-only core-id remap for nested Entity::load() calls.
9122 // This keeps the serializer API unchanged, at the cost of relying on
9123 // scoped thread-local state instead of explicit serializer-local context.
9124 const detail::EntityLoadRemapGuard entityLoadRemapGuard(lastCoreComponentId, currLastCoreComponentId);
9125 auto remapLoadedEntityId = [&](uint32_t id) {
9126 return detail::remap_loaded_entity_id(id, lastCoreComponentId, currLastCoreComponentId);
9127 };
9128
9129 // Entities
9130 {
9131 auto loadEntityContainer = [&](EntityContainer& ec) {
9132 s.load(ec.idx);
9133 s.load(ec.dataRaw);
9134 s.load(ec.row);
9135 s.load(ec.flags);
9136 ec.flags |= EntityContainerFlags::Load;
9137
9138 ec.idx = remapLoadedEntityId(ec.idx);
9139 if (ec.data.pair != 0)
9140 ec.data.gen = remapLoadedEntityId(ec.data.gen);
9141
9142#if GAIA_USE_SAFE_ENTITY
9143 s.load(ec.refCnt);
9144#else
9145 s.load(ec.unused);
9146 // if this value is different from zero, it means we are trying to load data
9147 // that was previously saved with GAIA_USE_SAFE_ENTITY. It's probably not a good idea
9148 // because if your program used reference counting it probably won't work correctly.
9149 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.unused == 0);
9150#endif
9151 // Store the archetype idx inside the pointer. We will decode this once archetypes are created.
9152 uint32_t archetypeIdx = 0;
9153 s.load(archetypeIdx);
9154 ec.pArchetype = (Archetype*)((uintptr_t)archetypeIdx);
9155 // Store the chunk idx inside the pointer. We will decode this once chunks are created.
9156 uint32_t chunkIdx = 0;
9157 s.load(chunkIdx);
9158 ec.pChunk = (Chunk*)((uintptr_t)chunkIdx);
9159 };
9160
9161 uint32_t newEntities = 0;
9162 s.load(newEntities);
9163 GAIA_FOR(newEntities) {
9164 bool isAlive = false;
9165 s.load(isAlive);
9166 if (isAlive) {
9167 EntityContainer ec{};
9168 loadEntityContainer(ec);
9169 m_recs.entities.add_live(GAIA_MOV(ec));
9170 } else {
9171 Identifier id = IdentifierBad;
9172 uint32_t nextFreeIdx = Entity::IdMask;
9173 s.load(id);
9174 s.load(nextFreeIdx);
9175 auto entity = Entity(id);
9176 entity = detail::remap_loaded_entity(entity, lastCoreComponentId, currLastCoreComponentId);
9177 nextFreeIdx = remapLoadedEntityId(nextFreeIdx);
9178 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.id() == remapLoadedEntityId(lastCoreComponentId + i));
9179 m_recs.entities.add_free(entity, nextFreeIdx);
9180 }
9181 }
9182
9183 uint32_t pairsCnt = 0;
9184 s.load(pairsCnt);
9185 GAIA_FOR(pairsCnt) {
9186 EntityContainer ec{};
9187 loadEntityContainer(ec);
9188 Entity pair(ec.idx, ec.data.gen);
9189 m_recs.pairs.emplace(EntityLookupKey(pair), GAIA_MOV(ec));
9190 }
9191
9192 s.load(m_recs.entities.m_nextFreeIdx);
9193 m_recs.entities.m_nextFreeIdx = remapLoadedEntityId(m_recs.entities.m_nextFreeIdx);
9194 s.load(m_recs.entities.m_freeItems);
9195 }
9196
9197 // World
9198 {
9199 uint32_t archetypesSize = 0;
9200 s.load(archetypesSize);
9201 m_archetypes.reserve(archetypesSize);
9202 GAIA_FOR(archetypesSize) {
9203 uint32_t idsSize = 0;
9204 s.load(idsSize);
9205 Entity ids[ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS];
9206 GAIA_FOR_(idsSize, j) {
9207 s.load(ids[j]);
9208 }
9209
9210 // Calculate the lookup hash
9211 const auto hashLookup = calc_lookup_hash({&ids[0], idsSize}).hash;
9212
9213 auto* pArchetype = find_archetype({hashLookup}, {&ids[0], idsSize});
9214 if (pArchetype == nullptr) {
9215 // Create the archetype
9216 pArchetype = create_archetype({&ids[0], idsSize});
9217 pArchetype->set_hashes({hashLookup});
9218
9219 // No need to do anything with the archetype graph. It will build itself naturally.
9220 // pArchetype->build_graph_edges(pArchetypeRight, entity);
9221
9222 // Register the archetype in the world
9223 reg_archetype(pArchetype);
9224 }
9225
9226 // Load archetype data
9227 pArchetype->load(s);
9228 }
9229
9230 s.load(m_worldVersion);
9231 }
9232
9233 // Update entity records.
9234 // We previously encoded the archetype id into refCnt.
9235 // Now we need to convert it back to the pointer.
9236 {
9237 for (auto& ec: m_recs.entities) {
9238 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::Load) == 0)
9239 continue;
9240 ec.flags &= ~EntityContainerFlags::Load; // Clear the load flag
9241
9242 const auto archetypeIdx = (ArchetypeId)((uintptr_t)ec.pArchetype); // Decode the archetype idx
9243 ec.pArchetype = m_archetypes[archetypeIdx];
9244 const uint32_t chunkIdx = (uint32_t)((uintptr_t)ec.pChunk); // Decode the chunk idx
9245 ec.pChunk = ec.pArchetype->chunks()[chunkIdx];
9246 ec.pEntity = &ec.pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row];
9247 }
9248
9249 for (auto& pair: m_recs.pairs) {
9250 auto& ec = pair.second;
9251
9252 // Core pairs remain in-world during load and were not serialized into the stream.
9253 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::Load) == 0)
9254 continue;
9255
9256 GAIA_ASSERT((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::Load) != 0);
9257 ec.flags &= ~EntityContainerFlags::Load; // Clear the load flag
9258
9259 const auto archetypeIdx = (ArchetypeId)((uintptr_t)ec.pArchetype); // Decode the archetype idx
9260 ec.pArchetype = m_archetypes[archetypeIdx];
9261 const uint32_t chunkIdx = (uint32_t)((uintptr_t)ec.pChunk); // Decode the chunk idx
9262 ec.pChunk = ec.pArchetype->chunks()[chunkIdx];
9263 ec.pEntity = &ec.pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row];
9264 }
9265 }
9266
9267#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
9268 for (const auto& ec: m_recs.entities) {
9269 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.idx < m_recs.entities.size());
9270 GAIA_ASSERT(m_recs.entities.handle(ec.idx) == EntityContainer::handle(ec));
9271 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pArchetype != nullptr);
9272 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk != nullptr);
9273 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pEntity != nullptr);
9274 }
9275#endif
9276 // Entity names
9277 {
9278 m_nameToEntity = {};
9279 uint32_t cnt = 0;
9280 s.load(cnt);
9281 GAIA_FOR(cnt) {
9282 Entity entity;
9283 s.load(entity);
9284 // entity.data.gen = 0; // Reset generation to zero
9285
9286 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
9287 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
9288 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut(compIdx, ec.row));
9289 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
9290
9291 bool isOwned = false;
9292 s.load(isOwned);
9293 if (!isOwned) {
9294 if (entity.comp()) {
9295 // Make components point back to their component cache record because if we save the world and load
9296 // it back in runtime, EntityDesc would still point to the old pointers to component names.
9297 const auto& ci = comp_cache().get(entity);
9298 pDesc->name = ci.name.str();
9299 // Length should still be the same. Only the pointer has changed.
9300 GAIA_ASSERT(pDesc->name_len == ci.name.len());
9301 m_nameToEntity.try_emplace(EntityNameLookupKey(pDesc->name, pDesc->name_len, 0), entity);
9302 } else {
9303 uint32_t len = 0;
9304 s.load(len);
9305 uint64_t ptr_val = 0;
9306 s.load_raw(&ptr_val, sizeof(ptr_val), ser::serialization_type_id::u64);
9307
9308 // Simply point to whereever the original pointer pointed to
9309 pDesc->name = (const char*)ptr_val;
9310 pDesc->name_len = len;
9311 m_nameToEntity.try_emplace(EntityNameLookupKey(pDesc->name, pDesc->name_len, 0), entity);
9312 }
9313
9314 continue;
9315 }
9316
9317 uint32_t len = 0;
9318 s.load(len);
9319
9320 // Get a pointer to where the string begins and seek to the end of the string
9321 const char* entityStr = (const char*)(s.data() + s.tell());
9322 s.seek(s.tell() + len);
9323
9324 // Make sure EntityDesc does not point anywhere right now.
9325 {
9326 pDesc->name = nullptr;
9327 pDesc->name_len = 0;
9328 }
9329
9330 // Name the entity using an owned string
9331 name(entity, entityStr, len);
9332 }
9333 }
9334
9335 // Entity aliases
9336 {
9337 m_aliasToEntity = {};
9338 for (auto& ec: m_recs.entities) {
9339 const auto entity = EntityContainer::handle(ec);
9340 if (entity.pair())
9341 continue;
9342
9343 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
9344 if (compIdx == BadIndex)
9345 continue;
9346
9347 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut(compIdx, ec.row));
9348 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
9349 pDesc->alias = nullptr;
9350 pDesc->alias_len = 0;
9351 }
9352
9353 uint32_t cnt = 0;
9354 s.load(cnt);
9355 GAIA_FOR(cnt) {
9356 Entity entity;
9357 s.load(entity);
9358
9359 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
9360 const auto compIdx = core::get_index(ec.pChunk->ids_view(), GAIA_ID(EntityDesc));
9361 auto* pDesc = reinterpret_cast<EntityDesc*>(ec.pChunk->comp_ptr_mut(compIdx, ec.row));
9362 GAIA_ASSERT(core::check_alignment(pDesc));
9363
9364 uint32_t len = 0;
9365 s.load(len);
9366
9367 // Get a pointer to where the string begins and seek to the end of the string
9368 const char* aliasStr = (const char*)(s.data() + s.tell());
9369 s.seek(s.tell() + len);
9370
9371 pDesc->alias = nullptr;
9372 pDesc->alias_len = 0;
9373 alias(entity, aliasStr, len);
9374 }
9375 }
9376
9377 return true;
9378 }
9379
9383 template <typename TSerializer>
9384 bool load(TSerializer& inputSerializer) {
9385 return load(ser::make_serializer(inputSerializer));
9386 }
9387
9388 private:
9390 void sort_archetypes() {
9391 struct sort_cond {
9392 bool operator()(const Archetype* a, const Archetype* b) const {
9393 return a->id() < b->id();
9394 }
9395 };
9396
9397 core::sort(m_archetypes, sort_cond{}, [&](uint32_t left, uint32_t right) {
9398 Archetype* tmp = m_archetypes[left];
9399
9400 m_archetypes[right]->list_idx(left);
9401 m_archetypes[left]->list_idx(right);
9402
9403 m_archetypes.data()[left] = (Archetype*)m_archetypes[right];
9404 m_archetypes.data()[right] = tmp;
9405 });
9406 }
9407
9411 void remove_chunk(Archetype& archetype, Chunk& chunk) {
9412 archetype.del(&chunk);
9413 try_enqueue_archetype_for_deletion(archetype);
9414 }
9415
9417 void remove_chunk_from_delete_queue(uint32_t idx) {
9418 GAIA_ASSERT(idx < m_chunksToDel.size());
9419
9420 auto* pChunk = m_chunksToDel[idx].pChunk;
9421 pChunk->clear_delete_queue_index();
9422
9423 const auto lastIdx = (uint32_t)m_chunksToDel.size() - 1;
9424 if (idx != lastIdx) {
9425 auto* pMovedChunk = m_chunksToDel[lastIdx].pChunk;
9426 pMovedChunk->delete_queue_index(idx);
9427 }
9428
9429 core::swap_erase(m_chunksToDel, idx);
9430 }
9431
9436 void remove_entity(Archetype& archetype, Chunk& chunk, uint16_t row) {
9437 archetype.remove_entity(chunk, row, m_recs);
9438 try_enqueue_chunk_for_deletion(archetype, chunk);
9439 }
9440
9442 void del_empty_chunks() {
9443 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::del_empty_chunks);
9444
9445 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_chunksToDel.size();) {
9446 auto* pArchetype = m_chunksToDel[i].pArchetype;
9447 auto* pChunk = m_chunksToDel[i].pChunk;
9448
9449 // Revive reclaimed chunks
9450 if (!pChunk->empty()) {
9451 pChunk->revive();
9452 revive_archetype(*pArchetype);
9453 remove_chunk_from_delete_queue(i);
9454 continue;
9455 }
9456
9457 // Skip chunks which still have some lifespan left
9458 if (pChunk->progress_death()) {
9459 ++i;
9460 continue;
9461 }
9462
9463 // Delete unused chunks that are past their lifespan
9464 remove_chunk(*pArchetype, *pChunk);
9465 remove_chunk_from_delete_queue(i);
9466 }
9467 }
9468
9470 void del_empty_archetype(Archetype* pArchetype) {
9471 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::del_empty_archetype);
9472
9473 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
9474 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype->empty() || pArchetype->is_req_del());
9475 GAIA_ASSERT(!pArchetype->dying() || pArchetype->is_req_del());
9476
9477 unreg_archetype(pArchetype);
9478 for (auto& ec: m_recs.entities) {
9479 if (ec.pArchetype != pArchetype)
9480 continue;
9481
9482 ec.pArchetype = nullptr;
9483 ec.pChunk = nullptr;
9484 ec.pEntity = nullptr;
9485 }
9486 for (auto& [_, ec]: m_recs.pairs) {
9487 if (ec.pArchetype != pArchetype)
9488 continue;
9489
9490 ec.pArchetype = nullptr;
9491 ec.pChunk = nullptr;
9492 ec.pEntity = nullptr;
9493 }
9494 Archetype::destroy(pArchetype);
9495 }
9496
9498 void del_empty_archetypes() {
9499 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::del_empty_archetypes);
9500
9501 cnt::sarray_ext<Archetype*, 512> tmp;
9502
9503 // Remove all dead archetypes from query caches.
9504 // Because the number of cached queries is way higher than the number of archetypes
9505 // we want to remove, we flip the logic around and iterate over all query caches
9506 // and match against our lists.
9507 // Note, all archetype pointers in the tmp array are invalid at this point and can
9508 // be used only for comparison. They can't be dereferenced.
9509 auto remove_from_queries = [&]() {
9510 if (tmp.empty())
9511 return;
9512
9513 for (auto* pArchetype: tmp) {
9514 m_queryCache.remove_archetype_from_queries(pArchetype);
9515 del_empty_archetype(pArchetype);
9516 }
9517 tmp.clear();
9518 };
9519
9520 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_archetypesToDel.size();) {
9521 auto* pArchetype = m_archetypesToDel[i];
9522
9523 // Skip reclaimed archetypes or archetypes that became immortal
9524 if (!pArchetype->empty() || pArchetype->max_lifespan() == 0) {
9525 revive_archetype(*pArchetype);
9526 core::swap_erase(m_archetypesToDel, i);
9527 continue;
9528 }
9529
9530 // Skip archetypes which still have some lifespan left unless
9531 // they are force-deleted.
9532 if (!pArchetype->is_req_del() && pArchetype->progress_death()) {
9533 ++i;
9534 continue;
9535 }
9536
9537 tmp.push_back(pArchetype);
9538
9539 // Remove the unused archetypes
9540 core::swap_erase(m_archetypesToDel, i);
9541
9542 // Clear what we have once the capacity is reached
9543 if (tmp.size() == tmp.max_size())
9544 remove_from_queries();
9545 }
9546
9547 remove_from_queries();
9548 }
9549
9550 void revive_archetype(Archetype& archetype) {
9551 archetype.revive();
9552 m_reqArchetypesToDel.erase(ArchetypeLookupKey(archetype.lookup_hash(), &archetype));
9553 }
9554
9555 void try_enqueue_chunk_for_deletion(Archetype& archetype, Chunk& chunk) {
9556 if (chunk.dying() || !chunk.empty())
9557 return;
9558
9559 // When the chunk is emptied we want it to be removed. We can't do it
9560 // rowB away and need to wait for world::gc() to be called.
9561 //
9562 // However, we need to prevent the following:
9563 // 1) chunk is emptied, add it to some removal list
9564 // 2) chunk is reclaimed
9565 // 3) chunk is emptied, add it to some removal list again
9566 //
9567 // Therefore, we have a flag telling us the chunk is already waiting to
9568 // be removed. The chunk might be reclaimed before garbage collection happens
9569 // but it simply ignores such requests. This way we always have at most one
9570 // record for removal for any given chunk.
9571 chunk.start_dying();
9572
9573 m_chunksToDel.push_back({&archetype, &chunk});
9574 chunk.delete_queue_index((uint32_t)m_chunksToDel.size() - 1);
9575 }
9576
9577 void try_enqueue_archetype_for_deletion(Archetype& archetype) {
9578 if (!archetype.ready_to_die())
9579 return;
9580
9581 // When the chunk is emptied we want it to be removed. We can't do it
9582 // rowB away and need to wait for world::gc() to be called.
9583 //
9584 // However, we need to prevent the following:
9585 // 1) archetype is emptied, add it to some removal list
9586 // 2) archetype is reclaimed
9587 // 3) archetype is emptied, add it to some removal list again
9588 //
9589 // Therefore, we have a flag telling us the chunk is already waiting to
9590 // be removed. The archetype might be reclaimed before garbage collection happens
9591 // but it simply ignores such requests. This way we always have at most one
9592 // record for removal for any given chunk.
9593 archetype.start_dying();
9594
9595 m_archetypesToDel.push_back(&archetype);
9596 }
9597
9600 void defrag_chunks(uint32_t maxEntities) {
9601 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::defrag_chunks);
9602
9603 const auto maxIters = m_archetypes.size();
9604 // There has to be at least the root archetype present
9605 GAIA_ASSERT(maxIters > 0);
9606
9607 GAIA_FOR(maxIters) {
9608 const auto idx = (m_defragLastArchetypeIdx + 1) % maxIters;
9609 auto* pArchetype = m_archetypes[idx];
9610 defrag_archetype(*pArchetype, maxEntities);
9611 if (maxEntities == 0)
9612 return;
9613
9614 m_defragLastArchetypeIdx = idx;
9615 }
9616 }
9617
9621 void defrag_archetype(Archetype& archetype, uint32_t& maxEntities) {
9622 // Assuming the following chunk layout:
9623 // Chunk_1: 10/10
9624 // Chunk_2: 1/10
9625 // Chunk_3: 7/10
9626 // Chunk_4: 10/10
9627 // Chunk_5: 9/10
9628 // After full defragmentation we end up with:
9629 // Chunk_1: 10/10
9630 // Chunk_2: 10/10 (7 entities from Chunk_3 + 2 entities from Chunk_5)
9631 // Chunk_3: 0/10 (empty, ready for removal)
9632 // Chunk_4: 10/10
9633 // Chunk_5: 7/10
9634 // TODO: Implement mask of semi-full chunks so we can pick one easily when searching
9635 // for a chunk to fill with a new entity and when defragmenting.
9636 // NOTE 1:
9637 // Even though entity movement might be present during defragmentation, we do
9638 // not update the world version here because no real structural changes happen.
9639 // All entities and components remain intact, they just move to a different place.
9640 // NOTE 2:
9641 // Entities belonging to chunks with uni components are locked to their chunk.
9642 // Therefore, we won't defragment them unless their uni components contain matching
9643 // values.
9644
9645 if (maxEntities == 0)
9646 return;
9647
9648 const auto& chunks = archetype.chunks();
9649 if (chunks.size() < 2)
9650 return;
9651
9652 uint32_t front = 0;
9653 uint32_t back = chunks.size() - 1;
9654
9655 auto* pDstChunk = chunks[front];
9656 auto* pSrcChunk = chunks[back];
9657
9658 // Find the first semi-full chunk in the front
9659 while (front < back && (pDstChunk->full() || !pDstChunk->is_semi()))
9660 pDstChunk = chunks[++front];
9661 // Find the last semi-full chunk in the back
9662 while (front < back && (pSrcChunk->empty() || !pSrcChunk->is_semi()))
9663 pSrcChunk = chunks[--back];
9664
9665 const auto& props = archetype.props();
9666 const bool hasUniEnts =
9667 props.cntEntities > 0 && archetype.ids_view()[props.cntEntities - 1].kind() == EntityKind::EK_Uni;
9668
9669 // Find the first semi-empty chunk in the back
9670 while (front < back) {
9671 pDstChunk = chunks[front];
9672 pSrcChunk = chunks[back];
9673
9674 const uint32_t entitiesInSrcChunk = pSrcChunk->size();
9675 const uint32_t spaceInDstChunk = pDstChunk->capacity() - pDstChunk->size();
9676 const uint32_t entitiesToMoveSrc = core::get_min(entitiesInSrcChunk, maxEntities);
9677 const uint32_t entitiesToMove = core::get_min(entitiesToMoveSrc, spaceInDstChunk);
9678
9679 // Make sure uni components have matching values
9680 if (hasUniEnts) {
9681 auto rec = pSrcChunk->comp_rec_view();
9682 bool res = true;
9683 GAIA_FOR2(props.genEntities, props.cntEntities) {
9684 const auto* pSrcVal = (const void*)pSrcChunk->comp_ptr(i, 0);
9685 const auto* pDstVal = (const void*)pDstChunk->comp_ptr(i, 0);
9686 if (rec[i].pItem->cmp(pSrcVal, pDstVal)) {
9687 res = false;
9688 break;
9689 }
9690 }
9691
9692 // When there is not a match we move to the next chunk
9693 if (!res) {
9694 pDstChunk = chunks[++front];
9695 goto next_iteration;
9696 }
9697 }
9698
9699 GAIA_FOR(entitiesToMove) {
9700 const auto lastSrcEntityIdx = entitiesInSrcChunk - i - 1;
9701 const auto entity = pSrcChunk->entity_view()[lastSrcEntityIdx];
9702
9703 auto& ec = m_recs[entity];
9704
9705 const auto srcRow = ec.row;
9706 const auto dstRow = pDstChunk->add_entity(entity);
9707 const bool wasEnabled = !ec.data.dis;
9708
9709 // Make sure the old entity becomes enabled now
9710 archetype.enable_entity(pSrcChunk, srcRow, true, m_recs);
9711 // We go back-to-front in the chunk so enabling the entity is not expected to change its row
9712 GAIA_ASSERT(srcRow == ec.row);
9713
9714 // Move data from the old chunk to the new one
9715 pDstChunk->move_entity_data(entity, dstRow, m_recs);
9716
9717 // Remove the entity record from the old chunk.
9718 // Normally we'd call remove_entity but we don't want to trigger world
9719 // version updated all the time. It's enough to do it just once at the
9720 // end of defragmentation.
9721 // remove_entity(archetype, *pSrcChunk, srcRow);
9722 archetype.remove_entity_raw(*pSrcChunk, srcRow, m_recs);
9723 try_enqueue_chunk_for_deletion(archetype, *pSrcChunk);
9724
9725 // Bring the entity container record up-to-date
9726 ec.pChunk = pDstChunk;
9727 ec.row = (uint16_t)dstRow;
9728 ec.pEntity = &pDstChunk->entity_view()[dstRow];
9729
9730 // Transfer the original enabled state to the new chunk
9731 archetype.enable_entity(pDstChunk, dstRow, wasEnabled, m_recs);
9732 }
9733
9734 // Update world versions
9735 if (entitiesToMove > 0) {
9736 pSrcChunk->update_world_version();
9737 pDstChunk->update_world_version();
9738 pSrcChunk->update_entity_order_version();
9739 pDstChunk->update_entity_order_version();
9740 update_version(m_worldVersion);
9741 }
9742
9743 maxEntities -= entitiesToMove;
9744 if (maxEntities == 0)
9745 return;
9746
9747 // The source is empty, find another semi-empty source
9748 if (pSrcChunk->empty()) {
9749 while (front < back) {
9750 if (chunks[--back]->is_semi())
9751 break;
9752 }
9753 }
9754
9755 next_iteration:
9756 // The destination chunk is full, we need to move to the next one.
9757 // The idea is to fill the destination as much as possible.
9758 while (front < back && pDstChunk->full())
9759 pDstChunk = chunks[++front];
9760 }
9761 }
9762
9767 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* find_archetype(Archetype::LookupHash hashLookup, EntitySpan ids) {
9768 auto tmpArchetype = ArchetypeLookupChecker(ids);
9769 ArchetypeLookupKey key(hashLookup, &tmpArchetype);
9770
9771 // Search for the archetype in the map
9772 const auto it = m_archetypesByHash.find(key);
9773 if (it == m_archetypesByHash.end())
9774 return nullptr;
9775
9776 auto* pArchetype = it->second;
9777 return pArchetype;
9778 }
9779
9780 GAIA_NODISCARD static auto
9781 find_component_index_record(ComponentIndexEntryArray& records, const Archetype* pArchetype) {
9782 return core::get_index_if(records, [&](const auto& record) {
9783 return record.matches(pArchetype);
9784 });
9785 }
9786
9787 GAIA_NODISCARD static auto
9788 find_component_index_record(const ComponentIndexEntryArray& records, const Archetype* pArchetype) {
9789 return core::get_index_if(records, [&](const auto& record) {
9790 return record.matches(pArchetype);
9791 });
9792 }
9793
9796 void add_entity_archetype_pair(
9797 Entity entity, Archetype* pArchetype, uint16_t compIdx = ComponentIndexBad, uint16_t matchCount = 1) {
9798 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
9799 GAIA_ASSERT(matchCount > 0);
9800
9801 EntityLookupKey entityKey(entity);
9802 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(entityKey);
9803 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end()) {
9804 ComponentIndexEntryArray records;
9805 records.push_back(ComponentIndexEntry{pArchetype, compIdx, matchCount});
9806 m_entityToArchetypeMap.try_emplace(entityKey, GAIA_MOV(records));
9807 return;
9808 }
9809
9810 auto& records = it->second;
9811 const auto idx = find_component_index_record(records, pArchetype);
9812 if (idx == BadIndex) {
9813 records.push_back(ComponentIndexEntry{pArchetype, compIdx, matchCount});
9814 return;
9815 }
9816
9817 auto& record = records[idx];
9818 record.matchCount = (uint16_t)(record.matchCount + matchCount);
9819 if (compIdx != ComponentIndexBad)
9820 record.compIdx = compIdx;
9821 }
9822
9823 void add_pair_archetype_query_pairs(Entity pair, Archetype* pArchetype, uint16_t matchCount = 1) {
9824 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.pair());
9825 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
9826 GAIA_ASSERT(matchCount > 0);
9827
9828 const auto first = get(pair.id());
9829 const auto second = get(pair.gen());
9830
9831 add_entity_archetype_pair(Pair(All, second), pArchetype, ComponentIndexBad, matchCount);
9832 add_entity_archetype_pair(Pair(first, All), pArchetype, ComponentIndexBad, matchCount);
9833 add_entity_archetype_pair(Pair(All, All), pArchetype, ComponentIndexBad, matchCount);
9834 }
9835
9839 void del_entity_query_pair(Pair pair, Entity entityToRemove) {
9840 auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(pair));
9841 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
9842 return;
9843 auto& records = it->second;
9844
9845 // Remove any reference to the found archetype from the array.
9846 // We don't know the archetype so we remove/decrement any archetype record that contains our entity.
9847 for (uint32_t i = records.size() - 1; i != (uint32_t)-1; --i) {
9848 auto& record = records[i];
9849 const auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
9850 if (!pArchetype->has(entityToRemove))
9851 continue;
9852
9853 if ((!is_wildcard(pair.first()) && !is_wildcard(pair.second())) || record.matchCount <= 1)
9854 core::swap_erase_unsafe(records, i);
9855 else
9856 --record.matchCount;
9857 }
9858
9859 if (records.empty())
9860 m_entityToArchetypeMap.erase(it);
9861 }
9862
9865 void del_entity_query_pair(Pair pair, Archetype* pArchetypeToRemove) {
9866 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetypeToRemove != nullptr);
9867
9868 auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(pair));
9869 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
9870 return;
9871
9872 auto& records = it->second;
9873 const auto idx = find_component_index_record(records, pArchetypeToRemove);
9874 if (idx != BadIndex)
9875 core::swap_erase_unsafe(records, idx);
9876
9877 if (records.empty())
9878 m_entityToArchetypeMap.erase(it);
9879 }
9880
9881 void del_pair_archetype_query_pairs(Entity pair, Archetype* pArchetypeToRemove) {
9882 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.pair());
9883 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetypeToRemove != nullptr);
9884
9885 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.id() < m_recs.entities.size());
9886 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.gen() < m_recs.entities.size());
9887 const auto first = m_recs.entities.handle(pair.id());
9888 const auto second = m_recs.entities.handle(pair.gen());
9889
9890 del_entity_query_pair(Pair(All, second), pArchetypeToRemove);
9891 del_entity_query_pair(Pair(first, All), pArchetypeToRemove);
9892 del_entity_query_pair(Pair(All, All), pArchetypeToRemove);
9893 }
9894
9895 void del_pair_archetype_query_pairs(Entity pair, Entity entityToRemove) {
9896 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.pair());
9897
9898 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.id() < m_recs.entities.size());
9899 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.gen() < m_recs.entities.size());
9900 const auto first = m_recs.entities.handle(pair.id());
9901 const auto second = m_recs.entities.handle(pair.gen());
9902
9903 del_entity_query_pair(Pair(All, second), entityToRemove);
9904 del_entity_query_pair(Pair(first, All), entityToRemove);
9905 del_entity_query_pair(Pair(All, All), entityToRemove);
9906 }
9907
9910 void del_entity_archetype_pair(Entity entity, Archetype* pArchetypeToRemove) {
9911 GAIA_ASSERT(entity != Pair(All, All));
9912 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetypeToRemove != nullptr);
9913
9914 auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
9915 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
9916 return;
9917
9918 auto& records = it->second;
9919 const auto idx = find_component_index_record(records, pArchetypeToRemove);
9920 if (idx != BadIndex)
9921 core::swap_erase_unsafe(records, idx);
9922
9923 if (records.empty())
9924 m_entityToArchetypeMap.erase(it);
9925 }
9926
9928 void del_archetype_entity_pairs(Archetype* pArchetype) {
9929 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
9930
9931 for (const auto entity: pArchetype->ids_view()) {
9932 del_entity_archetype_pair(entity, pArchetype);
9933
9934 if (!entity.pair())
9935 continue;
9936
9937 // Archetype unregistration can run while the pair's relation or target entity is already
9938 // invalid. Rebuild wildcard pair lookup keys from the stored entity records instead of
9939 // calling get(), which asserts on invalidated ids.
9940 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.id() < m_recs.entities.size());
9941 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.gen() < m_recs.entities.size());
9942 del_pair_archetype_query_pairs(entity, pArchetype);
9943 }
9944 }
9945
9949 void del_entity_archetype_pairs(Entity entity, Archetype* pArchetype) {
9950 GAIA_ASSERT(entity != Pair(All, All));
9951
9952 m_entityToArchetypeMap.erase(EntityLookupKey(entity));
9953
9954 if (entity.pair()) {
9955 if (pArchetype != nullptr) {
9956 del_pair_archetype_query_pairs(entity, pArchetype);
9957 } else {
9958 del_pair_archetype_query_pairs(entity, entity);
9959 }
9960 }
9961 }
9962
9966 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* create_archetype(EntitySpan entities) {
9967 GAIA_ASSERT(m_nextArchetypeId < (decltype(m_nextArchetypeId))-1);
9968 auto* pArchetype = Archetype::create(*this, m_nextArchetypeId++, m_worldVersion, entities);
9969
9970 const auto entityCnt = (uint32_t)entities.size();
9971 GAIA_FOR(entityCnt) {
9972 auto entity = entities[i];
9973 add_entity_archetype_pair(entity, pArchetype, (uint16_t)i);
9974
9975#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
9976 auto& ec = fetch(entity);
9977 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::IsObserved) != 0 || m_observers.has_observers(entity)) {
9978 ec.flags |= EntityContainerFlags::IsObserved;
9979 pArchetype->observed_terms_inc();
9980 }
9981#endif
9982
9983 // If the entity is a pair, make sure to create special wildcard records for it
9984 // as well so wildcard queries can find the archetype.
9985 if (entity.pair()) {
9986 add_pair_archetype_query_pairs(entity, pArchetype);
9987 }
9988 }
9989
9990 return pArchetype;
9991 }
9992
9995 void reg_archetype(Archetype* pArchetype) {
9996 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
9997
9998 // // Make sure hashes were set already
9999 // GAIA_ASSERT(
10000 // (m_archetypesById.empty() || pArchetype == m_pRootArchetype) || (pArchetype->lookup_hash().hash != 0));
10001
10002 // Make sure the archetype is not registered yet
10003 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype->list_idx() == BadIndex);
10004
10005 // Register the archetype
10006 [[maybe_unused]] const auto it0 =
10007 m_archetypesById.emplace(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(pArchetype->id(), pArchetype->id_hash()), pArchetype);
10008 [[maybe_unused]] const auto it1 =
10009 m_archetypesByHash.emplace(ArchetypeLookupKey(pArchetype->lookup_hash(), pArchetype), pArchetype);
10010
10011 GAIA_ASSERT(it0.second);
10012 GAIA_ASSERT(it1.second);
10013
10014 pArchetype->list_idx(m_archetypes.size());
10015 m_archetypes.emplace_back(pArchetype);
10016
10017 m_queryCache.register_archetype_with_queries(pArchetype);
10018 }
10019
10022 void unreg_archetype(Archetype* pArchetype) {
10023 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
10024
10025 // Make sure hashes were set already
10026 GAIA_ASSERT(
10027 (m_archetypesById.empty() || pArchetype == m_pRootArchetype) || (pArchetype->lookup_hash().hash != 0));
10028
10029 // Make sure the archetype was registered already
10030 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype->list_idx() != BadIndex);
10031
10032 // Query rematching uses the entity -> archetype lookup map as an input. Remove this
10033 // archetype from all of its lookup buckets before destroying it so dead archetype
10034 // pointers cannot be reintroduced into cached query state during the next rematch.
10035 del_archetype_entity_pairs(pArchetype);
10036
10037 // Break graph connections
10038 {
10039 auto& edgeLefts = pArchetype->left_edges();
10040 for (auto& itLeft: edgeLefts)
10041 remove_edge_from_archetype(pArchetype, itLeft.second, itLeft.first.entity());
10042 }
10043
10044 auto tmpArchetype = ArchetypeLookupChecker(pArchetype->ids_view());
10045 [[maybe_unused]] const auto res0 =
10046 m_archetypesById.erase(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(pArchetype->id(), pArchetype->id_hash()));
10047 [[maybe_unused]] const auto res1 =
10048 m_archetypesByHash.erase(ArchetypeLookupKey(pArchetype->lookup_hash(), &tmpArchetype));
10049 GAIA_ASSERT(res0 != 0);
10050 GAIA_ASSERT(res1 != 0);
10051
10052 const auto idx = pArchetype->list_idx();
10053 GAIA_ASSERT(idx == core::get_index(m_archetypes, pArchetype));
10054 core::swap_erase(m_archetypes, idx);
10055 if (!m_archetypes.empty() && idx != m_archetypes.size())
10056 m_archetypes[idx]->list_idx(idx);
10057 }
10058
10059#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
10060 static void print_archetype_entities(const World& world, const Archetype& archetype, Entity entity, bool adding) {
10061 auto ids = archetype.ids_view();
10062
10063 GAIA_LOG_W("Currently present:");
10064 GAIA_EACH(ids) {
10065 const auto name = entity_name(world, ids[i]);
10066 GAIA_LOG_W(
10067 "> [%u] %.*s [%s]", i, (int)name.size(), name.empty() ? "" : name.data(),
10068 EntityKindString[(uint32_t)ids[i].kind()]);
10069 }
10070
10071 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to %s:", adding ? "add" : "del");
10072 const auto name = entity_name(world, entity);
10073 GAIA_LOG_W(
10074 "> %.*s [%s]", (int)name.size(), name.empty() ? "" : name.data(),
10075 EntityKindString[(uint32_t)entity.kind()]);
10076 }
10077
10078 static void verify_add(const World& world, Archetype& archetype, Entity entity, Entity addEntity) {
10079 // Make sure the world is not locked
10080 if (world.locked()) {
10081 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to add an entity while the world is locked");
10082 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to add an entity [%u:%u] while the world is locked", entity.id(), entity.gen());
10083 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, entity, false);
10084 return;
10085 }
10086
10087 // Makes sure no wildcard entities are added
10088 if (is_wildcard(addEntity)) {
10089 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Adding wildcard pairs is not supported");
10090 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, addEntity, true);
10091 return;
10092 }
10093
10094 // Make sure not to add too many entities/components
10095 auto ids = archetype.ids_view();
10096 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (ids.size() + 1 >= ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS) {
10097 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to add too many entities to entity!");
10098 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to add an entity to entity [%u:%u] but there's no space left!", entity.id(), entity.gen());
10099 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, addEntity, true);
10100 return;
10101 }
10102 }
10103
10104 static void verify_del(const World& world, Archetype& archetype, Entity entity, Entity func_del) {
10105 // Make sure the world is not locked
10106 if (world.locked()) {
10107 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to delete an entity while the world is locked");
10108 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to delete an entity [%u:%u] while the world is locked", entity.id(), entity.gen());
10109 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, entity, false);
10110 return;
10111 }
10112
10113 // Make sure the entity is present on the archetype
10114 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (!archetype.has(func_del)) {
10115 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to remove an entity which wasn't added");
10116 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to del an entity from entity [%u:%u] but it was never added", entity.id(), entity.gen());
10117 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, func_del, false);
10118 return;
10119 }
10120 }
10121
10122 static void verify_enable(const World& world, Archetype& archetype, Entity entity) {
10123 if (world.locked()) {
10124 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to enable/disable an entity while the world is locked");
10125 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to enable/disable an entity [%u:%u] while the world is locked", entity.id(), entity.gen());
10126 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, entity, false);
10127 }
10128 }
10129
10130 static void verify_move(const World& world, Archetype& archetype, Entity entity) {
10131 if (world.locked()) {
10132 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to move an entity while the world is locked");
10133 GAIA_LOG_W("Trying to move an entity [%u:%u] while the world is locked", entity.id(), entity.gen());
10134 print_archetype_entities(world, archetype, entity, false);
10135 }
10136 }
10137#endif
10138
10144 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* foc_archetype_add(Archetype* pArchetypeLeft, Entity entity) {
10145 // Check if the component is found when following the "add" edges
10146 bool edgeNeedsRebuild = false;
10147 {
10148 const auto edge = pArchetypeLeft->find_edge_right(entity);
10149 if (edge != ArchetypeIdHashPairBad) {
10150 auto it = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edge.id, edge.hash));
10151 if (it != m_archetypesById.end() && it->second != nullptr)
10152 return it->second;
10153
10154 // Drop stale local cache edge and rebuild it below.
10155 pArchetypeLeft->del_graph_edge_right_local(entity);
10156 edgeNeedsRebuild = true;
10157 }
10158 }
10159
10160 // Prepare a joint array of components of old + the newly added component
10161 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS> entsNew;
10162 {
10163 auto entsOld = pArchetypeLeft->ids_view();
10164 const auto entsOldCnt = entsOld.size();
10165 entsNew.resize((uint32_t)entsOld.size() + 1);
10166 GAIA_FOR(entsOldCnt) entsNew[i] = entsOld[i];
10167 entsNew[(uint32_t)entsOld.size()] = entity;
10168 }
10169
10170 // Make sure to sort the components so we receive the same hash no matter the order in which components
10171 // are provided Bubble sort is okay. We're dealing with at most ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS items.
10172 sort(entsNew, SortComponentCond{});
10173
10174 // Once sorted we can calculate the hashes
10175 const auto hashLookup = calc_lookup_hash({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()}).hash;
10176 auto* pArchetypeRight = find_archetype({hashLookup}, {entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10177 if (pArchetypeRight == nullptr) {
10178 pArchetypeRight = create_archetype({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10179 pArchetypeRight->set_hashes({hashLookup});
10180 reg_archetype(pArchetypeRight);
10181 edgeNeedsRebuild = true;
10182 }
10183
10184 if (edgeNeedsRebuild)
10185 pArchetypeLeft->build_graph_edges(pArchetypeRight, entity);
10186
10187 return pArchetypeRight;
10188 }
10189
10192 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* foc_archetype_add_no_graph(Archetype* pArchetypeLeft, Entity entity) {
10193 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS> entsNew;
10194 {
10195 auto entsOld = pArchetypeLeft->ids_view();
10196 const auto entsOldCnt = entsOld.size();
10197 entsNew.resize((uint32_t)entsOld.size() + 1);
10198 GAIA_FOR(entsOldCnt) entsNew[i] = entsOld[i];
10199 entsNew[(uint32_t)entsOld.size()] = entity;
10200 }
10201
10202 sort(entsNew, SortComponentCond{});
10203
10204 const auto hashLookup = calc_lookup_hash({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()}).hash;
10205 auto* pArchetypeRight = find_archetype({hashLookup}, {entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10206 if (pArchetypeRight != nullptr)
10207 return pArchetypeRight;
10208
10209 pArchetypeRight = create_archetype({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10210 pArchetypeRight->set_hashes({hashLookup});
10211 reg_archetype(pArchetypeRight);
10212 return pArchetypeRight;
10213 }
10214
10220 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* foc_archetype_del(Archetype* pArchetypeRight, Entity entity) {
10221 // Check if the component is found when following the "del" edges
10222 bool edgeNeedsRebuild = false;
10223 {
10224 const auto edge = pArchetypeRight->find_edge_left(entity);
10225 if (edge != ArchetypeIdHashPairBad) {
10226 const auto it = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edge.id, edge.hash));
10227 if (it != m_archetypesById.end()) {
10228 auto* pArchetypeLeft = it->second;
10229 if (pArchetypeLeft != nullptr)
10230 return pArchetypeLeft;
10231 }
10232
10233 // Drop stale local cache edge and rebuild it below.
10234 pArchetypeRight->del_graph_edge_left_local(entity);
10235 edgeNeedsRebuild = true;
10236 }
10237 }
10238
10239 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS> entsNew;
10240 auto entsOld = pArchetypeRight->ids_view();
10241
10242 // Find the intersection
10243 for (const auto e: entsOld) {
10244 if (e == entity)
10245 continue;
10246
10247 entsNew.push_back(e);
10248 }
10249
10250 // Verify there was a change
10251 GAIA_ASSERT(entsNew.size() != entsOld.size());
10252
10253 // Calculate the hashes
10254 const auto hashLookup = calc_lookup_hash({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()}).hash;
10255 auto* pArchetype = find_archetype({hashLookup}, {entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10256 if (pArchetype == nullptr) {
10257 pArchetype = create_archetype({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10258 pArchetype->set_hashes({hashLookup});
10259 reg_archetype(pArchetype);
10260 edgeNeedsRebuild = true;
10261 }
10262
10263 if (edgeNeedsRebuild)
10264 pArchetype->build_graph_edges(pArchetypeRight, entity);
10265
10266 return pArchetype;
10267 }
10268
10271 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* foc_archetype_del_no_graph(Archetype* pArchetypeRight, Entity entity) {
10272 cnt::sarray_ext<Entity, ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS> entsNew;
10273 auto entsOld = pArchetypeRight->ids_view();
10274
10275 for (const auto e: entsOld) {
10276 if (e == entity)
10277 continue;
10278
10279 entsNew.push_back(e);
10280 }
10281
10282 GAIA_ASSERT(entsNew.size() != entsOld.size());
10283
10284 const auto hashLookup = calc_lookup_hash({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()}).hash;
10285 auto* pArchetype = find_archetype({hashLookup}, {entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10286 if (pArchetype != nullptr)
10287 return pArchetype;
10288
10289 pArchetype = create_archetype({entsNew.data(), entsNew.size()});
10290 pArchetype->set_hashes({hashLookup});
10291 reg_archetype(pArchetype);
10292 return pArchetype;
10293 }
10294
10297 GAIA_NODISCARD const auto& archetypes() const {
10298 return m_archetypes;
10299 }
10300
10304 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype& archetype(Entity entity) {
10305 const auto& ec = fetch(entity);
10306 return *ec.pArchetype;
10307 }
10308
10312 void del_name(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity) {
10313 EntityBuilder(*this, entity, ec).del_name();
10314 }
10315
10318 void del_name(Entity entity) {
10319 EntityBuilder(*this, entity).del_name();
10320 }
10321
10326 void del_entity(Entity entity, bool invalidate) {
10327 if (entity.pair() || entity == EntityBad)
10328 return;
10329
10330 auto& ec = fetch(entity);
10331 del_entity_inter(ec, entity, invalidate);
10332 }
10333
10339 void del_entity(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool invalidate) {
10340 if (entity.pair() || entity == EntityBad)
10341 return;
10342
10343 del_entity_inter(ec, entity, invalidate);
10344 }
10345
10350 void del_entity_inter(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, bool invalidate) {
10351 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.id() > GAIA_ID(LastCoreComponent).id());
10352
10353 // if (!is_req_del(ec))
10354 {
10355 if (m_recs.entities.item_count() == 0)
10356 return;
10357
10358#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
10359 auto* pChunk = ec.pChunk;
10360 GAIA_ASSERT(pChunk != nullptr);
10361#endif
10362
10363 // Remove the entity from its chunk.
10364 // We call del_name first because remove_entity calls component destructors.
10365 // If the call was made inside invalidate_entity we would access a memory location
10366 // which has already been destructed which is not nice.
10367 del_name(ec, entity);
10368 remove_entity(*ec.pArchetype, *ec.pChunk, ec.row);
10369 remove_src_entity_version(entity);
10370 }
10371
10372 // Invalidate on-demand.
10373 // We delete as a separate step in the delayed deletion.
10374 if (invalidate)
10375 invalidate_entity(entity);
10376 }
10377
10383 void del_entities(Archetype& archetype) {
10384 for (auto* pChunk: archetype.chunks()) {
10385 auto ids = pChunk->entity_view();
10386 for (auto e: ids) {
10387 if (!valid(e))
10388 continue;
10389
10390#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
10391 const auto& ec = fetch(e);
10392
10393 // We should never end up trying to delete a forbidden-to-delete entity
10394 GAIA_ASSERT((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Error) == 0);
10395#endif
10396
10397 del_entity(e, true);
10398 }
10399
10400 validate_chunk(pChunk);
10401
10402 // If the chunk was already dying we need to remove it from the delete list
10403 // because we can delete it right away.
10404 if (pChunk->queued_for_deletion())
10405 remove_chunk_from_delete_queue(pChunk->delete_queue_index());
10406
10407 remove_chunk(archetype, *pChunk);
10408 }
10409
10410 validate_entities();
10411 }
10412
10415 void del_inter(Entity entity) {
10416 auto on_delete = [this](Entity entityToDel) {
10417 auto& ec = fetch(entityToDel);
10418 handle_del_entity(ec, entityToDel);
10419 };
10420
10421 if (is_wildcard(entity)) {
10422 const auto rel = get(entity.id());
10423 const auto tgt = get(entity.gen());
10424
10425 // (*,*)
10426 if (rel == All && tgt == All) {
10427 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Not supported yet");
10428 }
10429 // (*,X)
10430 else if (rel == All) {
10431 if (const auto* pTargets = relations(tgt)) {
10432 // handle_del might invalidate the targets map so we need to make a copy
10433 // TODO: this is suboptimal at best, needs to be optimized
10434 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 64> tmp;
10435 for (auto key: *pTargets)
10436 tmp.push_back(key.entity());
10437 for (auto e: tmp)
10438 on_delete(Pair(e, tgt));
10439 }
10440 }
10441 // (X,*)
10442 else if (tgt == All) {
10443 if (const auto* pRelations = targets(rel)) {
10444 // handle_del might invalidate the targets map so we need to make a copy
10445 // TODO: this is suboptimal at best, needs to be optimized
10446 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 64> tmp;
10447 for (auto key: *pRelations)
10448 tmp.push_back(key.entity());
10449 for (auto e: tmp)
10450 on_delete(Pair(rel, e));
10451 }
10452 }
10453 } else {
10454 on_delete(entity);
10455 }
10456 }
10457
10458 // Force-delete all entities from the requested archetypes along with the archetype itself
10459 void del_finalize_archetypes() {
10460 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::del_finalize_archetypes);
10461
10462 for (auto& key: m_reqArchetypesToDel) {
10463 auto* pArchetype = key.archetype();
10464 if (pArchetype == nullptr)
10465 continue;
10466
10467 del_entities(*pArchetype);
10468
10469 // Now that all entities are deleted, all their chunks are requested to get deleted
10470 // and in turn the archetype itself as well. Therefore, it is added to the archetype
10471 // delete list and picked up by del_empty_archetypes. No need to call deletion from here.
10472 // > del_empty_archetype(pArchetype);
10473 }
10474 m_reqArchetypesToDel.clear();
10475 }
10476
10478 void del_finalize_entities() {
10479 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::del_finalize_entities);
10480
10481 for (auto it = m_reqEntitiesToDel.begin(); it != m_reqEntitiesToDel.end();) {
10482 const auto e = it->entity();
10483
10484 // Entities that form archetypes need to stay until the archetype itself is gone
10485 if (m_entityToArchetypeMap.contains(*it)) {
10486 ++it;
10487 continue;
10488 }
10489
10490 // Requested entities are partially deleted. We only need to invalidate them.
10491 invalidate_entity(e);
10492
10493 it = m_reqEntitiesToDel.erase(it);
10494 }
10495 }
10496
10498 void del_finalize() {
10499 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::del_finalize);
10500
10501 del_finalize_archetypes();
10502 del_finalize_entities();
10503 }
10504
10505 GAIA_NODISCARD bool archetype_cond_match(Archetype& archetype, Pair cond, Entity target) const {
10506 // E.g.:
10507 // target = (All, entity)
10508 // cond = (OnDeleteTarget, delete)
10509 // Delete the entity if it matches the cond
10510 auto ids = archetype.ids_view();
10511
10512 if (target.pair()) {
10513 for (auto e: ids) {
10514 // Find the pair which matches (All, entity)
10515 if (!e.pair())
10516 continue;
10517 if (e.gen() != target.gen())
10518 continue;
10519
10520 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[e.id()];
10521 const auto entity = ec.pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row];
10522 if (!has(entity, cond))
10523 continue;
10524
10525 return true;
10526 }
10527 } else {
10528 for (auto e: ids) {
10529 if (e.pair())
10530 continue;
10531 if (!has(e, cond))
10532 continue;
10533
10534 return true;
10535 }
10536 }
10537
10538 return false;
10539 }
10540
10544 void move_to_archetype(Archetype& srcArchetype, Archetype& dstArchetype) {
10545 GAIA_ASSERT(&srcArchetype != &dstArchetype);
10546
10547 bool updated = false;
10548
10549 for (auto* pSrcChunk: srcArchetype.chunks()) {
10550 auto srcEnts = pSrcChunk->entity_view();
10551 if (srcEnts.empty())
10552 continue;
10553
10554 // Copy entities back-to-front to avoid unnecessary data movements.
10555 // TODO: Handle disabled entities efficiently.
10556 // If there are disabled entities, we still do data movements if there already
10557 // are enabled entities in the chunk.
10558 // TODO: If the header was of some fixed size, e.g. if we always acted as if we had
10559 // ChunkHeader::MAX_COMPONENTS, certain data movements could be done pretty much instantly.
10560 // E.g. when removing tags or pairs, we would simply replace the chunk pointer
10561 // with a pointer to another one. The same goes for archetypes. Component data
10562 // would not have to move at all internal chunk header pointers would remain unchanged.
10563
10564 uint32_t i = (uint32_t)srcEnts.size();
10565 while (i != 0) {
10566 auto* pDstChunk = dstArchetype.foc_free_chunk();
10567 const uint32_t dstSpaceLeft = pDstChunk->capacity() - pDstChunk->size();
10568 const uint32_t cnt = core::get_min(dstSpaceLeft, i);
10569 for (uint32_t j = 0; j < cnt; ++j) {
10570 auto e = srcEnts[i - j - 1];
10571 move_entity(e, fetch(e), dstArchetype, *pDstChunk);
10572 }
10573
10574 pDstChunk->update_world_version();
10575 pDstChunk->update_entity_order_version();
10576
10577 GAIA_ASSERT(cnt <= i);
10578 i -= cnt;
10579 }
10580
10581 pSrcChunk->update_world_version();
10582 pSrcChunk->update_entity_order_version();
10583 updated = true;
10584 }
10585
10586 if (updated)
10587 update_version(m_worldVersion);
10588 }
10589
10594 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* calc_dst_archetype_ent(Archetype* pArchetype, Entity entity) {
10595 GAIA_ASSERT(!is_wildcard(entity));
10596
10597 auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
10598 for (auto id: ids) {
10599 if (id != entity)
10600 continue;
10601
10602 return foc_archetype_del(pArchetype, id);
10603 }
10604
10605 return nullptr;
10606 }
10607
10612 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* calc_dst_archetype_all_ent(Archetype* pArchetype, Entity entity) {
10613 GAIA_ASSERT(is_wildcard(entity));
10614
10615 Archetype* pDstArchetype = pArchetype;
10616
10617 auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
10618 for (auto id: ids) {
10619 if (!id.pair() || id.gen() != entity.gen())
10620 continue;
10621
10622 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, id);
10623 }
10624
10625 return pArchetype != pDstArchetype ? pDstArchetype : nullptr;
10626 }
10627
10632 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* calc_dst_archetype_ent_all(Archetype* pArchetype, Entity entity) {
10633 GAIA_ASSERT(is_wildcard(entity));
10634
10635 Archetype* pDstArchetype = pArchetype;
10636
10637 auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
10638 for (auto id: ids) {
10639 if (!id.pair() || id.id() != entity.id())
10640 continue;
10641
10642 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, id);
10643 }
10644
10645 return pArchetype != pDstArchetype ? pDstArchetype : nullptr;
10646 }
10647
10652 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* calc_dst_archetype_all_all(Archetype* pArchetype, [[maybe_unused]] Entity entity) {
10653 GAIA_ASSERT(is_wildcard(entity));
10654
10655 Archetype* pDstArchetype = pArchetype;
10656 bool found = false;
10657
10658 auto ids = pArchetype->ids_view();
10659 for (auto id: ids) {
10660 if (!id.pair())
10661 continue;
10662
10663 pDstArchetype = foc_archetype_del(pDstArchetype, id);
10664 found = true;
10665 }
10666
10667 return found ? pDstArchetype : nullptr;
10668 }
10669
10675 GAIA_NODISCARD Archetype* calc_dst_archetype(Archetype* pArchetype, Entity entity) {
10676 if (entity.pair()) {
10677 auto rel = entity.id();
10678 auto tgt = entity.gen();
10679
10680 // Removing a wildcard pair. We need to find all pairs matching it.
10681 if (rel == All.id() || tgt == All.id()) {
10682 // (first, All) means we need to match (first, A), (first, B), ...
10683 if (rel != All.id() && tgt == All.id())
10684 return calc_dst_archetype_ent_all(pArchetype, entity);
10685
10686 // (All, second) means we need to match (A, second), (B, second), ...
10687 if (rel == All.id() && tgt != All.id())
10688 return calc_dst_archetype_all_ent(pArchetype, entity);
10689
10690 // (All, All) means we need to match all relationships
10691 return calc_dst_archetype_all_all(pArchetype, EntityBad);
10692 }
10693 }
10694
10695 // Non-wildcard pair or entity
10696 return calc_dst_archetype_ent(pArchetype, entity);
10697 }
10698
10699 void req_del(Archetype& archetype) {
10700 if (archetype.is_req_del())
10701 return;
10702
10703 archetype.req_del();
10704 m_reqArchetypesToDel.insert(ArchetypeLookupKey(archetype.lookup_hash(), &archetype));
10705 }
10706
10707 void req_del(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity) {
10708 if (is_req_del(ec))
10709 return;
10710
10711#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
10712 auto delDiffCtx =
10713 m_observers.prepare_diff(*this, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{&entity, 1}, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
10714#endif
10715 del_entity(ec, entity, false);
10716#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
10717 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(delDiffCtx));
10718#endif
10719
10720 ec.req_del();
10721 m_reqEntitiesToDel.insert(EntityLookupKey(entity));
10722 }
10723
10724 void invalidate_pair_removal_caches(Entity entity) {
10725 if (!entity.pair())
10726 return;
10727
10728 auto invalidate_relation = [this](Entity relation) {
10729 if (relation == EntityBad)
10730 return;
10731 touch_rel_version(relation);
10732 invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation);
10733 };
10734
10735 if (entity.id() != All.id()) {
10736 invalidate_relation(try_get(entity.id()));
10737 } else if (entity.gen() != All.id()) {
10738 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
10739 if (target != EntityBad) {
10740 if (const auto* pRelations = relations(target)) {
10741 for (auto relationKey: *pRelations)
10742 invalidate_relation(relationKey.entity());
10743 }
10744 }
10745 } else {
10746 for (const auto& [relationKey, _]: m_relToTgt)
10747 invalidate_relation(relationKey.entity());
10748 }
10749
10750 m_targetsTravCache = {};
10751 m_srcBfsTravCache = {};
10752 m_depthOrderCache = {};
10753 m_sourcesAllCache = {};
10754 m_targetsAllCache = {};
10755 }
10756
10757 void unlink_live_is_relation(Entity source, Entity target) {
10758 const auto sourceKey = EntityLookupKey(source);
10759 const auto targetKey = EntityLookupKey(target);
10760
10761 invalidate_queries_for_entity({Is, target});
10762
10763 if (const auto itTargets = m_entityToAsTargets.find(sourceKey); itTargets != m_entityToAsTargets.end()) {
10764 itTargets->second.erase(targetKey);
10765 if (itTargets->second.empty())
10766 m_entityToAsTargets.erase(itTargets);
10767 }
10768 m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache = {};
10769
10770 if (const auto itRelations = m_entityToAsRelations.find(targetKey);
10771 itRelations != m_entityToAsRelations.end()) {
10772 itRelations->second.erase(sourceKey);
10773 if (itRelations->second.empty())
10774 m_entityToAsRelations.erase(itRelations);
10775 }
10776 m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache = {};
10777 }
10778
10779 void unlink_stale_is_relations_by_target_id(Entity source, EntityId targetId) {
10780 const auto sourceKey = EntityLookupKey(source);
10781 const auto itTargets = m_entityToAsTargets.find(sourceKey);
10782 if (itTargets == m_entityToAsTargets.end())
10783 return;
10784
10785 cnt::darray_ext<EntityLookupKey, 4> removedTargets;
10786 for (auto targetKey: itTargets->second) {
10787 if (targetKey.entity().id() == targetId)
10788 removedTargets.push_back(targetKey);
10789 }
10790
10791 for (auto targetKey: removedTargets) {
10792 invalidate_queries_for_structural_entity(EntityLookupKey(Pair{Is, targetKey.entity()}));
10793 itTargets->second.erase(targetKey);
10794
10795 const auto itRelations = m_entityToAsRelations.find(targetKey);
10796 if (itRelations != m_entityToAsRelations.end()) {
10797 itRelations->second.erase(sourceKey);
10798 if (itRelations->second.empty())
10799 m_entityToAsRelations.erase(itRelations);
10800 }
10801 }
10802
10803 if (itTargets->second.empty())
10804 m_entityToAsTargets.erase(itTargets);
10805
10806 m_entityToAsTargetsTravCache = {};
10807 m_entityToAsRelationsTravCache = {};
10808 }
10809
10810 template <typename Func>
10811 void each_delete_cascade_direct_source(Entity target, Pair cond, Func&& func) {
10812 GAIA_ASSERT(!target.pair());
10813
10814 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
10815 const auto relation = relKey.entity();
10816 if (!has(relation, cond))
10817 continue;
10818
10819 const auto* pSources = exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target);
10820 if (pSources == nullptr)
10821 continue;
10822
10823 for (auto source: *pSources)
10824 func(source);
10825 }
10826
10827 const auto pairEntity = Pair(All, target);
10828 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(pairEntity));
10829 if (it != m_entityToArchetypeMap.end()) {
10830 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
10831 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
10832 if (pArchetype == nullptr || pArchetype->is_req_del())
10833 continue;
10834 if (!archetype_cond_match(*pArchetype, cond, pairEntity))
10835 continue;
10836
10837 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
10838 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
10839 GAIA_EACH(entities)
