10840 func(entities[i]);
10841 }
10842 }
10843 }
10844 }
10845
10846 void collect_delete_cascade_direct_sources(Entity target, Pair cond, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) {
10847 GAIA_ASSERT(!target.pair());
10848 const auto visitStamp = next_entity_visit_stamp();
10849 each_delete_cascade_direct_source(target, cond, [&](Entity source) {
10850 if (!valid(source))
10851 return;
10852 if (!try_mark_entity_visited(source, visitStamp))
10853 return;
10854 out.push_back(source);
10855 });
10856 }
10857
10858 void collect_delete_cascade_sources(Entity target, Pair cond, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) {
10859 GAIA_ASSERT(!target.pair());
10860 const auto visitStamp = next_entity_visit_stamp();
10861 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 32> targetsToVisit;
10862 (void)try_mark_entity_visited(target, visitStamp);
10863 targetsToVisit.push_back(target);
10864
10865 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < targetsToVisit.size(); ++i) {
10866 const auto currTarget = targetsToVisit[i];
10867 each_delete_cascade_direct_source(currTarget, cond, [&](Entity source) {
10868 if (!valid(source))
10869 return;
10870 if (!try_mark_entity_visited(source, visitStamp))
10871 return;
10872
10873 out.push_back(source);
10874 targetsToVisit.push_back(source);
10875 });
10876 }
10877 }
10878
10881 void req_del_entities_with(Entity entity) {
10882 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::req_del_entities_with);
10883
10884 GAIA_ASSERT(entity != Pair(All, All));
10885
10886 auto req_del_adjunct_pair = [&](Entity relation, Entity target) {
10887 cnt::darray<Entity> sourcesToDel;
10888 sources(relation, target, [&](Entity source) {
10889 sourcesToDel.push_back(source);
10890 });
10891
10892 for (auto source: sourcesToDel)
10893 req_del(fetch(source), source);
10894 };
10895
10896 if (entity.pair()) {
10897 if (entity.id() != All.id()) {
10898 const auto relation = try_get(entity.id());
10899 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
10900 if (relation != EntityBad && target != EntityBad && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation))
10901 req_del_adjunct_pair(relation, target);
10902 } else {
10903 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
10904 if (target == EntityBad)
10905 goto skip_req_del_all_target;
10906 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
10907 if (exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target) == nullptr)
10908 continue;
10909
10910 req_del_adjunct_pair(relKey.entity(), target);
10911 }
10912 skip_req_del_all_target:;
10913 }
10914 } else if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity)) {
10915 if (const auto* pTargets = targets(entity)) {
10916 for (auto targetKey: *pTargets)
10917 req_del_adjunct_pair(entity, targetKey.entity());
10918 }
10919 }
10920
10921 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
10922 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
10923 return;
10924
10925 for (const auto& record: it->second)
10926 req_del(*record.pArchetype);
10927 }
10928
10933 void req_del_entities_with(Entity entity, Pair cond) {
10934 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> visited;
10935 req_del_entities_with(entity, cond, visited);
10936 }
10937
10938 void req_del_entities_with(Entity entity, Pair cond, cnt::set<EntityLookupKey>& visited) {
10939 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::req_del_entities_with);
10940
10941 GAIA_ASSERT(entity != Pair(All, All));
10942 if (!visited.insert(EntityLookupKey(entity)).second)
10943 return;
10944
10945 auto req_del_adjunct_pair = [&](Entity relation, Entity target) {
10946 if (!has(relation, cond))
10947 return;
10948
10949 cnt::darray<Entity> sourcesToDel;
10950 sources(relation, target, [&](Entity source) {
10951 sourcesToDel.push_back(source);
10952 });
10953
10954 for (auto source: sourcesToDel)
10955 req_del(fetch(source), source);
10956 };
10957
10958 if (entity.pair()) {
10959 if (entity.id() != All.id()) {
10960 const auto relation = try_get(entity.id());
10961 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
10962 if (relation != EntityBad && target != EntityBad && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation))
10963 req_del_adjunct_pair(relation, target);
10964 } else {
10965 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
10966 if (target == EntityBad)
10967 goto skip_req_del_all_target_cond;
10968 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
10969 if (exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target) == nullptr)
10970 continue;
10971
10972 req_del_adjunct_pair(relKey.entity(), target);
10973 }
10974 skip_req_del_all_target_cond:;
10975 }
10976 } else if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity)) {
10977 if (const auto* pTargets = targets(entity)) {
10978 for (auto targetKey: *pTargets)
10979 req_del_adjunct_pair(entity, targetKey.entity());
10980 }
10981 }
10982
10983 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
10984 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
10985 return;
10986
10987 cnt::darray<Entity> cascadeTargets;
10988 if (entity.pair() && entity.id() == All.id()) {
10989 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
10990 if (target != EntityBad)
10991 collect_delete_cascade_direct_sources(target, cond, cascadeTargets);
10992 }
10993
10994 for (auto source: cascadeTargets)
10995 req_del_entities_with(Pair(All, source), cond, visited);
10996
10997 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
10998 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
10999 // Evaluate the condition if a valid pair is given
11000 if (!archetype_cond_match(*pArchetype, cond, entity))
11001 continue;
11002
11003 req_del(*pArchetype);
11004 }
11005 }
11006
11009 void rem_from_entities(Entity entity) {
11010 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::rem_from_entities);
11011
11012 invalidate_pair_removal_caches(entity);
11013
11014 auto rem_adjunct_pair = [&](Entity relation, Entity target) {
11015 cnt::darray<Entity> sourcesToRem;
11016 sources(relation, target, [&](Entity source) {
11017 sourcesToRem.push_back(source);
11018 });
11019
11020 for (auto source: sourcesToRem)
11021 del(source, Pair(relation, target));
11022 };
11023
11024 if (entity.pair()) {
11025 if (entity.id() != All.id()) {
11026 const auto relation = try_get(entity.id());
11027 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
11028 if (relation != EntityBad && target != EntityBad && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation))
11029 rem_adjunct_pair(relation, target);
11030 } else {
11031 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
11032 if (target == EntityBad)
11033 goto skip_rem_all_target;
11034 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
11035 if (exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target) == nullptr)
11036 continue;
11037
11038 rem_adjunct_pair(relKey.entity(), target);
11039 }
11040 skip_rem_all_target:;
11041 }
11042 } else if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity)) {
11043 if (const auto* pTargets = targets(entity)) {
11044 for (auto targetKey: *pTargets)
11045 rem_adjunct_pair(entity, targetKey.entity());
11046 }
11047 }
11048
11049 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
11050 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
11051 return;
11052
11053 // Invalidate the singleton status if necessary
11054 if (!entity.pair()) {
11055 auto& ec = fetch(entity);
11056 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::IsSingleton) != 0) {
11057 auto ids = ec.pArchetype->ids_view();
11058 const auto idx = core::get_index(ids, entity);
11059 if (idx != BadIndex)
11060 EntityBuilder::set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::IsSingleton, false);
11061 }
11062 }
11063
11064#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11065 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> diffTermSet;
11066 cnt::darray<Entity> diffTerms;
11067 cnt::darray<Entity> diffTargets;
11068 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
11069 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
11070 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
11071 continue;
11072
11073 auto* pDstArchetype = calc_dst_archetype(pArchetype, entity);
11074 if (pDstArchetype == nullptr)
11075 continue;
11076
11077 for (auto id: pArchetype->ids_view()) {
11078 bool matches = false;
11079 if (entity.pair()) {
11080 if (entity.id() == All.id() && entity.gen() == All.id())
11081 matches = id.pair();
11082 else if (entity.id() == All.id())
11083 matches = id.pair() && id.gen() == entity.gen();
11084 else if (entity.gen() == All.id())
11085 matches = id.pair() && id.id() == entity.id();
11086 else
11087 matches = id == entity;
11088 } else
11089 matches = id == entity;
11090
11091 if (!matches)
11092 continue;
11093
11094 if (diffTermSet.insert(EntityLookupKey(id)).second)
11095 diffTerms.push_back(id);
11096 }
11097
11098 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
11099 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
11100 GAIA_EACH(entities)
11101 diffTargets.push_back(entities[i]);
11102 }
11103 }
11104 auto delDiffCtx = diffTargets.empty() || diffTerms.empty()
11105 ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
11106 : m_observers.prepare_diff(
11107 *this, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{diffTerms.data(), diffTerms.size()},
11108 EntitySpan{diffTargets.data(), diffTargets.size()});
11109#endif
11110
11111 // Update archetypes of all affected entities
11112 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
11113 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
11114 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
11115 continue;
11116
11117 if (entity.pair()) {
11118 cnt::darray_ext<Entity, 16> removedIsTargets;
11119 for (auto id: pArchetype->ids_view()) {
11120 bool matches = false;
11121 if (entity.id() == All.id() && entity.gen() == All.id())
11122 matches = id.pair();
11123 else if (entity.id() == All.id())
11124 matches = id.pair() && id.gen() == entity.gen();
11125 else if (entity.gen() == All.id())
11126 matches = id.pair() && id.id() == entity.id();
11127 else
11128 matches = id == entity;
11129
11130 if (!matches || !id.pair() || id.id() != Is.id())
11131 continue;
11132
11133 const auto target = try_get(id.gen());
11134 if (target != EntityBad)
11135 removedIsTargets.push_back(target);
11136 }
11137
11138 if (!removedIsTargets.empty()) {
11139 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
11140 auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
11141 GAIA_EACH(entities) {
11142 for (const auto target: removedIsTargets)
11143 unlink_live_is_relation(entities[i], target);
11144 }
11145 }
11146 }
11147 }
11148
11149 auto* pDstArchetype = calc_dst_archetype(pArchetype, entity);
11150 if (pDstArchetype != nullptr)
11151 move_to_archetype(*pArchetype, *pDstArchetype);
11152 }
11153
11154#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11155 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(delDiffCtx));
11156#endif
11157 }
11158
11163 void rem_from_entities(Entity entity, Pair cond) {
11164 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::rem_from_entities);
11165
11166 invalidate_pair_removal_caches(entity);
11167
11168 auto rem_adjunct_pair = [&](Entity relation, Entity target) {
11169 if (!has(relation, cond))
11170 return;
11171
11172 cnt::darray<Entity> sourcesToRem;
11173 sources(relation, target, [&](Entity source) {
11174 sourcesToRem.push_back(source);
11175 });
11176
11177 for (auto source: sourcesToRem)
11178 del(source, Pair(relation, target));
11179 };
11180
11181 if (entity.pair()) {
11182 if (entity.id() != All.id()) {
11183 const auto relation = try_get(entity.id());
11184 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
11185 if (relation != EntityBad && target != EntityBad && is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation))
11186 rem_adjunct_pair(relation, target);
11187 } else {
11188 const auto target = try_get(entity.gen());
11189 if (target == EntityBad)
11190 goto skip_rem_all_target_cond;
11191 for (const auto& [relKey, store]: m_exclusiveAdjunctByRel) {
11192 if (exclusive_adjunct_sources(store, target) == nullptr)
11193 continue;
11194
11195 rem_adjunct_pair(relKey.entity(), target);
11196 }
11197 skip_rem_all_target_cond:;
11198 }
11199 } else if (is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(entity)) {
11200 if (const auto* pTargets = targets(entity)) {
11201 for (auto targetKey: *pTargets)
11202 rem_adjunct_pair(entity, targetKey.entity());
11203 }
11204 }
11205
11206 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
11207 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
11208 return;
11209
11210 // Invalidate the singleton status if necessary
11211 if (!entity.pair()) {
11212 auto& ec = fetch(entity);
11213 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::IsSingleton) != 0) {
11214 auto ids = ec.pArchetype->ids_view();
11215 const auto idx = core::get_index(ids, entity);
11216 if (idx != BadIndex)
11217 EntityBuilder::set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::IsSingleton, false);
11218 }
11219 }
11220
11221#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11222 cnt::set<EntityLookupKey> diffTermSet;
11223 cnt::darray<Entity> diffTerms;
11224 cnt::darray<Entity> diffTargets;
11225 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
11226 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
11227 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
11228 continue;
11229
11230 if (!archetype_cond_match(*pArchetype, cond, entity))
11231 continue;
11232
11233 auto* pDstArchetype = calc_dst_archetype(pArchetype, entity);
11234 if (pDstArchetype == nullptr)
11235 continue;
11236
11237 for (auto id: pArchetype->ids_view()) {
11238 bool matches = false;
11239 if (entity.pair()) {
11240 if (entity.id() == All.id() && entity.gen() == All.id())
11241 matches = id.pair();
11242 else if (entity.id() == All.id())
11243 matches = id.pair() && id.gen() == entity.gen();
11244 else if (entity.gen() == All.id())
11245 matches = id.pair() && id.id() == entity.id();
11246 else
11247 matches = id == entity;
11248 } else
11249 matches = id == entity;
11250
11251 if (!matches)
11252 continue;
11253
11254 if (diffTermSet.insert(EntityLookupKey(id)).second)
11255 diffTerms.push_back(id);
11256 }
11257
11258 for (const auto* pChunk: pArchetype->chunks()) {
11259 const auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
11260 GAIA_EACH(entities)
11261 diffTargets.push_back(entities[i]);
11262 }
11263 }
11264 auto delDiffCtx = diffTargets.empty() || diffTerms.empty()
11265 ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
11266 : m_observers.prepare_diff(
11267 *this, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{diffTerms.data(), diffTerms.size()},
11268 EntitySpan{diffTargets.data(), diffTargets.size()});
11269#endif
11270
11271 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
11272 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
11273 if (pArchetype->is_req_del())
11274 continue;
11275
11276 // Evaluate the condition if a valid pair is given
11277 if (!archetype_cond_match(*pArchetype, cond, entity))
11278 continue;
11279
11280 auto* pDstArchetype = calc_dst_archetype(pArchetype, entity);
11281 if (pDstArchetype != nullptr)
11282 move_to_archetype(*pArchetype, *pDstArchetype);
11283 }
11284
11285#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11286 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(delDiffCtx));
11287#endif
11288 }
11289
11302 void handle_del_entity(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity) {
11303 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::handle_del_entity);
11304
11305 GAIA_ASSERT(!is_wildcard(entity));
11306
11307 if (entity.pair()) {
11308 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Error) != 0) {
11309 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to delete an entity that is forbidden from being deleted");
11310 GAIA_LOG_E(
11311 "Trying to delete a pair [%u.%u] %s [%s] that is forbidden from being deleted", entity.id(),
11312 entity.gen(), name(entity), EntityKindString[entity.kind()]);
11313 return;
11314 }
11315
11316 const auto tgt = try_get(entity.gen());
11317 const bool hasLiveTarget = tgt != EntityBad;
11318 if (hasLiveTarget) {
11319 const auto& ecTgt = fetch(tgt);
11320 if ((ecTgt.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Error) != 0 ||
11321 has_exclusive_adjunct_target_cond(tgt, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Error))) {
11322 GAIA_ASSERT2(
11323 false, "Trying to delete an entity that is forbidden from being deleted (target restriction)");
11324 GAIA_LOG_E(
11325 "Trying to delete a pair [%u.%u] %s [%s] that is forbidden from being deleted (target restriction)",
11326 entity.id(), entity.gen(), name(entity), EntityKindString[entity.kind()]);
11327 return;
11328 }
11329 }
11330
11331#if GAIA_USE_SAFE_ENTITY
11332 // Decrement the ref count at this point.
11333 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::RefDecreased) == 0) {
11334 --ec.refCnt;
11335 ec.flags |= EntityContainerFlags::RefDecreased;
11336 }
11337
11338 // Don't delete so long something still references us
11339 if (ec.refCnt != 0)
11340 return;
11341#endif
11342
11343 if (hasLiveTarget) {
11344 const auto& ecTgt = fetch(tgt);
11345 if ((ecTgt.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Delete) != 0 ||
11346 has_exclusive_adjunct_target_cond(tgt, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete))) {
11347#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11348 cnt::darray<Entity> cascadeTargets;
11349 collect_delete_cascade_sources(tgt, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete), cascadeTargets);
11350 auto cascadeDelDiffCtx =
11351 cascadeTargets.empty()
11352 ? ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{}
11353 : m_observers.prepare_diff(
11354 *this, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{cascadeTargets.data(), cascadeTargets.size()},
11355 EntitySpan{cascadeTargets.data(), cascadeTargets.size()});
11356#endif
11357 // Delete all entities referencing this one as a relationship pair's target
11358 req_del_entities_with(Pair(All, tgt), Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete));
11359#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11360 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(cascadeDelDiffCtx));
11361#endif
11362 } else {
11363 // Remove from all entities referencing this one as a relationship pair's target
11364 rem_from_entities(Pair(All, tgt));
11365 }
11366 }
11367
11368 // This entity has been requested to be deleted already. Nothing more for us to do here
11369 if (is_req_del(ec))
11370 return;
11371
11372#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11373 observers().del(*this, entity);
11374#endif
11375
11376 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Delete) != 0) {
11377 // Delete all references to the entity
11378 req_del_entities_with(entity);
11379 } else {
11380 // Entities are only removed by default
11381 rem_from_entities(entity);
11382 }
11383 } else {
11384 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Error) != 0) {
11385 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to delete an entity that is forbidden from being deleted");
11386 GAIA_LOG_E(
11387 "Trying to delete an entity [%u.%u] %s [%s] that is forbidden from being deleted", entity.id(),
11388 entity.gen(), name(entity), EntityKindString[entity.kind()]);
11389 return;
11390 }
11391
11392 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Error) != 0 ||
11393 has_exclusive_adjunct_target_cond(entity, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Error))) {
11394 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Trying to delete an entity that is forbidden from being deleted (a pair's target)");
11395 GAIA_LOG_E(
11396 "Trying to delete an entity [%u.%u] %s [%s] that is forbidden from being deleted (a pair's target)",
11397 entity.id(), entity.gen(), name(entity), EntityKindString[entity.kind()]);
11398 return;
11399 }
11400
11401#if GAIA_USE_SAFE_ENTITY
11402 // Decrement the ref count at this point.
11403 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::RefDecreased) == 0) {
11404 --ec.refCnt;
11405 ec.flags |= EntityContainerFlags::RefDecreased;
11406 }
11407
11408 // Don't delete so long something still references us
11409 if (ec.refCnt != 0)
11410 return;
11411#endif
11412
11413 const bool deleteTargets = (ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDeleteTarget_Delete) != 0 ||
11414 has_exclusive_adjunct_target_cond(entity, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete));
11415 cnt::darray<Entity> cascadeTargets;
11416 if (deleteTargets)
11417 collect_delete_cascade_sources(entity, Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete), cascadeTargets);
11418#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11419 auto cascadeDelDiffCtx = ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx{};
11420 if (!cascadeTargets.empty()) {
11421 cascadeDelDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff(
11422 *this, ObserverEvent::OnDel, EntitySpan{cascadeTargets.data(), cascadeTargets.size()},
11423 EntitySpan{cascadeTargets.data(), cascadeTargets.size()});
11424 }
11425#endif
11426
11427 if (deleteTargets) {
11428 // Delete all entities referencing this one as a relationship pair's target
11429 req_del_entities_with(Pair(All, entity), Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete));
11430 } else {
11431 // Remove from all entities referencing this one as a relationship pair's target
11432 rem_from_entities(Pair(All, entity));
11433 }
11434
11435#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11436 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(cascadeDelDiffCtx));
11437#endif
11438
11439 // This entity is has been requested to be deleted already. Nothing more for us to do here
11440 if (is_req_del(ec))
11441 return;
11442
11443#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
11444 observers().del(*this, entity);
11445#endif
11446
11447 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::OnDelete_Delete) != 0) {
11448 // Delete all references to the entity
11449 req_del_entities_with(entity);
11450 } else {
11451 // Entities are only removed by default
11452 rem_from_entities(entity);
11453 }
11454 }
11455
11456 // Mark the entity with the "delete requested" flag
11457 req_del(ec, entity);
11458
11459#if GAIA_USE_WEAK_ENTITY
11460 // Invalidate WeakEntities
11461 while (ec.pWeakTracker != nullptr) {
11462 auto* pTracker = ec.pWeakTracker;
11463 ec.pWeakTracker = pTracker->next;
11464 if (ec.pWeakTracker != nullptr)
11465 ec.pWeakTracker->prev = nullptr;
11466
11467 auto* pWeakEntity = pTracker->pWeakEntity;
11468 GAIA_ASSERT(pWeakEntity != nullptr);
11469 GAIA_ASSERT(pWeakEntity->m_pTracker == pTracker);
11470 pWeakEntity->m_pTracker = nullptr;
11471 pWeakEntity->m_entity = EntityBad;
11472 delete pTracker;
11473 }
11474#endif
11475 }
11476
11481 void remove_edge_from_archetype(Archetype* pArchetype, ArchetypeGraphEdge edgeLeft, Entity edgeEntity) {
11482 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
11483
11484 const auto edgeLeftIt = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edgeLeft.id, edgeLeft.hash));
11485 if (edgeLeftIt == m_archetypesById.end())
11486 return;
11487
11488 auto* pArchetypeLeft = edgeLeftIt->second;
11489 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetypeLeft != nullptr);
11490
11491 // Remove the connection with the current archetype
11492 pArchetypeLeft->del_graph_edges(pArchetype, edgeEntity);
11493
11494 // Traverse all archetypes on the right
11495 auto& archetypesRight = pArchetype->right_edges();
11496 for (auto& it: archetypesRight) {
11497 const auto& edgeRight = it.second;
11498 const auto edgeRightIt = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edgeRight.id, edgeRight.hash));
11499 if (edgeRightIt == m_archetypesById.end())
11500 continue;
11501
11502 auto* pArchetypeRight = edgeRightIt->second;
11503
11504 // Remove the connection with the current archetype
11505 pArchetype->del_graph_edges(pArchetypeRight, it.first.entity());
11506 }
11507 }
11508
11509 void remove_edges(Entity entityToRemove) {
11510 const auto it = m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(entityToRemove));
11511 if (it == m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
11512 return;
11513
11514 for (const auto& record: it->second) {
11515 auto* pArchetype = record.pArchetype;
11516 remove_edge_from_archetype(pArchetype, pArchetype->find_edge_left(entityToRemove), entityToRemove);
11517 }
11518 }
11519
11520 void remove_edges_from_pairs(Entity entity) {
11521 if (entity.pair())
11522 return;
11523
11524 // Make sure to remove all pairs containing the entity
11525 // (X, something)
11526 const auto* tgts = targets(entity);
11527 if (tgts != nullptr) {
11528 for (auto target: *tgts)
11529 remove_edges(Pair(entity, target.entity()));
11530 }
11531 // (something, X)
11532 const auto* rels = relations(entity);
11533 if (rels != nullptr) {
11534 for (auto relation: *rels)
11535 remove_edges(Pair(relation.entity(), entity));
11536 }
11537 }
11538
11541 void del_graph_edges(Entity entity) {
11542 remove_edges(entity);
11543 remove_edges_from_pairs(entity);
11544 }
11545
11546 void touch_rel_version(Entity relation) {
11547 const EntityLookupKey key(relation);
11548 auto it = m_relationVersions.find(key);
11549 if (it == m_relationVersions.end())
11550 m_relationVersions.emplace(key, 1);
11551 else {
11552 ++it->second;
11553 if (it->second == 0)
11554 it->second = 1;
11555 }
11556 }
11557
11558 void del_reltgt_tgtrel_pairs(Entity entity) {
11559 auto delPair = [](PairMap& map, Entity source, Entity remove) {
11560 auto itTargets = map.find(EntityLookupKey(source));
11561 if (itTargets != map.end()) {
11562 auto& targets = itTargets->second;
11563 targets.erase(EntityLookupKey(remove));
11564 }
11565 };
11566
11567 Archetype* pArchetype = nullptr;
11568
11569 if (entity.pair()) {
11570 const auto it = m_recs.pairs.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
11571 if (it != m_recs.pairs.end()) {
11572 pArchetype = it->second.pArchetype;
11573 // Delete the container record
11574 m_recs.pairs.erase(it);
11575
11576 // Update pairs
11577 // The relation or target entity may already be invalid at this point. Rebuild the
11578 // lookup keys from the stored entity records instead of calling get().
11579 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.id() < m_recs.entities.size());
11580 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.gen() < m_recs.entities.size());
11581 auto rel = m_recs.entities.handle(entity.id());
11582 auto tgt = m_recs.entities.handle(entity.gen());
11583
11584 delPair(m_relToTgt, rel, tgt);
11585 delPair(m_relToTgt, All, tgt);
11586 delPair(m_tgtToRel, tgt, rel);
11587 delPair(m_tgtToRel, All, rel);
11588 }
11589 } else {
11590 // Update the container record
11591 auto ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
11592 m_recs.entities.free(entity);
11593
11594 // Remove all outgoing non-fragmenting sparse components from this entity.
11595 del_sparse_components(entity);
11596 // Remove all outgoing non-fragmenting exclusive relations from this source entity.
11597 del_exclusive_adjunct_source(entity);
11598 // If the deleted entity is itself a non-fragmenting exclusive relation, drop its store.
11599 del_exclusive_adjunct_relation(entity);
11600 // If the deleted entity is itself a non-fragmenting sparse component, drop its store.
11601 del_sparse_component_store(entity);
11602
11603 // If this is a singleton entity its archetype needs to be deleted
11604 if ((ec.flags & EntityContainerFlags::IsSingleton) != 0)
11605 req_del(*ec.pArchetype);
11606
11607 ec.pArchetype = nullptr;
11608 ec.pChunk = nullptr;
11609 ec.pEntity = nullptr;
11610 EntityBuilder::set_flag(ec.flags, EntityContainerFlags::DeleteRequested, false);
11611
11612 // Update pairs
11613 delPair(m_relToTgt, All, entity);
11614 delPair(m_tgtToRel, All, entity);
11615 m_relToTgt.erase(EntityLookupKey(entity));
11616 m_tgtToRel.erase(EntityLookupKey(entity));
11617 }
11618
11619 del_entity_archetype_pairs(entity, pArchetype);
11620 }
11621
11624 void invalidate_entity(Entity entity) {
11625 del_graph_edges(entity);
11626 del_reltgt_tgtrel_pairs(entity);
11627 }
11628
11634 void store_entity(EntityContainer& ec, Entity entity, Archetype* pArchetype, Chunk* pChunk) {
11635 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
11636 GAIA_ASSERT(pChunk != nullptr);
11637 GAIA_ASSERT(
11638 !locked() && "Entities can't be stored while the world is locked "
11639 "(structural changes are forbidden during this time!)");
11640
11641 ec.pArchetype = pArchetype;
11642 ec.pChunk = pChunk;
11643 ec.row = pChunk->add_entity(entity);
11644 ec.pEntity = &pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row];
11645 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.pair() || ec.data.gen == entity.gen());
11646 ec.data.dis = 0;
11647 }
11648
11654 void move_entity(Entity entity, EntityContainer& ec, Archetype& dstArchetype, Chunk& dstChunk) {
11655 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::move_entity);
11656
11657 auto* pDstChunk = &dstChunk;
11658 auto* pSrcChunk = ec.pChunk;
11659
11660 GAIA_ASSERT(pDstChunk != pSrcChunk);
11661
11662 const auto srcRow0 = ec.row;
11663 const auto dstRow = pDstChunk->add_entity(entity);
11664 const bool wasEnabled = !ec.data.dis;
11665
11666 auto& srcArchetype = *ec.pArchetype;
11667 const bool archetypeChanged = srcArchetype.id() != dstArchetype.id();
11668#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
11669 verify_move(*this, srcArchetype, entity);
11670#endif
11671
11672 // Make sure the old entity becomes enabled now
11673 srcArchetype.enable_entity(pSrcChunk, srcRow0, true, m_recs);
11674 // Enabling the entity might have changed its chunk index so fetch it again
11675 const auto srcRow = ec.row;
11676
11677 // Move data from the old chunk to the new one
11678 if (dstArchetype.id() == srcArchetype.id()) {
11679 pDstChunk->move_entity_data(entity, dstRow, m_recs);
11680 } else {
11681 pDstChunk->move_foreign_entity_data(pSrcChunk, srcRow, pDstChunk, dstRow);
11682 }
11683
11684 // Remove the entity record from the old chunk
11685 remove_entity(srcArchetype, *pSrcChunk, srcRow);
11686
11687 // An entity might have moved, try updating the free chunk index
11688 dstArchetype.try_update_free_chunk_idx();
11689
11690 // Bring the entity container record up-to-date
11691 ec.pArchetype = &dstArchetype;
11692 ec.pChunk = pDstChunk;
11693 ec.row = (uint16_t)dstRow;
11694 ec.pEntity = &pDstChunk->entity_view()[dstRow];
11695 if (archetypeChanged)
11696 update_src_entity_version(entity);
11697
11698 // Make the enabled state in the new chunk match the original state
11699 dstArchetype.enable_entity(pDstChunk, dstRow, wasEnabled, m_recs);
11700
11701 // End-state validation
11702 GAIA_ASSERT(valid(entity));
11703 validate_chunk(pSrcChunk);
11704 validate_chunk(pDstChunk);
11705 validate_entities();
11706 }
11707
11712 void move_entity_raw(Entity entity, EntityContainer& ec, Archetype& dstArchetype) {
11713 // Update the old chunk's world version first
11714 ec.pChunk->update_world_version();
11715 ec.pChunk->update_entity_order_version();
11716
11717 auto* pDstChunk = dstArchetype.foc_free_chunk();
11718 move_entity(entity, ec, dstArchetype, *pDstChunk);
11719
11720 // Update world versions
11721 pDstChunk->update_world_version();
11722 pDstChunk->update_entity_order_version();
11723 update_version(m_worldVersion);
11724 }
11725
11729 Chunk* move_entity(Entity entity, Archetype& dstArchetype) {
11730 // Archetypes need to be different
11731 auto& ec = fetch(entity);
11732 if (ec.pArchetype == &dstArchetype)
11733 return nullptr;
11734
11735 // Update the old chunk's world version first
11736 ec.pChunk->update_world_version();
11737 ec.pChunk->update_entity_order_version();
11738
11739 auto* pDstChunk = dstArchetype.foc_free_chunk();
11740 move_entity(entity, ec, dstArchetype, *pDstChunk);
11741
11742 // Update world versions
11743 pDstChunk->update_world_version();
11744 pDstChunk->update_entity_order_version();
11745 update_version(m_worldVersion);
11746
11747 return pDstChunk;
11748 }
11749
11750 void validate_archetype_edges([[maybe_unused]] const Archetype* pArchetype) const {
11751#if GAIA_ECS_VALIDATE_ARCHETYPE_GRAPH && GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
11752 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype != nullptr);
11753
11754 // Validate left edges
11755 const auto& archetypesLeft = pArchetype->left_edges();
11756 for (const auto& it: archetypesLeft) {
11757 const auto& edge = it.second;
11758 const auto edgeIt = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edge.id, edge.hash));
11759 if (edgeIt == m_archetypesById.end())
11760 continue;
11761
11762 const auto entity = it.first.entity();
11763 const auto* pArchetypeRight = edgeIt->second;
11764
11765 // Edge must be found
11766 const auto edgeRight = pArchetypeRight->find_edge_right(entity);
11767 GAIA_ASSERT(edgeRight != ArchetypeIdHashPairBad);
11768
11769 // The edge must point to pArchetype
11770 const auto it2 = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edgeRight.id, edgeRight.hash));
11771 GAIA_ASSERT(it2 != m_archetypesById.end());
11772 const auto* pArchetype2 = it2->second;
11773 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype2 == pArchetype);
11774 }
11775
11776 // Validate right edges
11777 const auto& archetypesRight = pArchetype->right_edges();
11778 for (const auto& it: archetypesRight) {
11779 const auto& edge = it.second;
11780 const auto edgeIt = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edge.id, edge.hash));
11781 if (edgeIt == m_archetypesById.end())
11782 continue;
11783
11784 const auto entity = it.first.entity();
11785 const auto* pArchetypeRight = edgeIt->second;
11786
11787 // Edge must be found
11788 const auto edgeLeft = pArchetypeRight->find_edge_left(entity);
11789 GAIA_ASSERT(edgeLeft != ArchetypeIdHashPairBad);
11790
11791 // The edge must point to pArchetype
11792 const auto it2 = m_archetypesById.find(ArchetypeIdLookupKey(edgeLeft.id, edgeLeft.hash));
11793 GAIA_ASSERT(it2 != m_archetypesById.end());
11794 const auto* pArchetype2 = it2->second;
11795 GAIA_ASSERT(pArchetype2 == pArchetype);
11796 }
11797#endif
11798 }
11799
11801 void validate_entities() const {
11802#if GAIA_ECS_VALIDATE_ENTITY_LIST
11803 m_recs.entities.validate();
11804#endif
11805 }
11806
11808 void validate_chunk([[maybe_unused]] Chunk* pChunk) const {
11809#if GAIA_ECS_VALIDATE_CHUNKS && GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
11810 GAIA_ASSERT(pChunk != nullptr);
11811
11812 if (!pChunk->empty()) {
11813 // Make sure a proper amount of entities reference the chunk
11814 uint32_t cnt = 0;
11815 for (const auto& ec: m_recs.entities) {
11816 if (ec.pChunk != pChunk)
11817 continue;
11818 ++cnt;
11819 }
11820 for (const auto& pair: m_recs.pairs) {
11821 if (pair.second.pChunk != pChunk)
11822 continue;
11823 ++cnt;
11824 }
11825 GAIA_ASSERT(cnt == pChunk->size());
11826 } else {
11827 // Make sure no entities reference the chunk
11828 for (const auto& ec: m_recs.entities) {
11829 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk != pChunk);
11830 }
11831 for (const auto& pair: m_recs.pairs) {
11832 GAIA_ASSERT(pair.second.pChunk != pChunk);
11833 }
11834 }
11835#endif
11836 }
11837
11844 template <bool CheckIn>
11845 GAIA_NODISCARD bool is_inter(Entity entity, Entity entityBase) const {
11846 GAIA_ASSERT(valid_entity(entity));
11847 GAIA_ASSERT(valid_entity(entityBase));
11848
11849 // Pairs are not supported
11850 if (entity.pair() || entityBase.pair())
11851 return false;
11852
11853 if constexpr (!CheckIn) {
11854 if (entity == entityBase)
11855 return true;
11856 }
11857
11858 const auto& targets = as_targets_trav_cache(entity);
11859 for (auto target: targets) {
11860 if (target == entityBase)
11861 return true;
11862 }
11863
11864 return false;
11865 }
11866
11868 template <bool CheckIn, typename Func>
11869 void as_up_trav(Entity entity, Func func) {
11870 GAIA_ASSERT(valid_entity(entity));
11871
11872 // Pairs are not supported
11873 if (entity.pair())
11874 return;
11875
11876 if constexpr (!CheckIn) {
11877 func(entity);
11878 }
11879
11880 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
11881 const auto* pArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
11882
11883 // Early exit if there are no Is relationship pairs on the archetype
11884 if (pArchetype->pairs_is() == 0)
11885 return;
11886
11887 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < pArchetype->pairs_is(); ++i) {
11888 auto e = pArchetype->entity_from_pairs_as_idx(i);
11889 const auto& ecTarget = m_recs.entities[e.gen()];
11890 auto target = *ecTarget.pEntity;
11891 func(target);
11892
11893 as_up_trav<CheckIn>(target, func);
11894 }
11895 }
11896
11897 template <typename T>
11898 const ComponentCacheItem& reg_core_entity(Entity id, Archetype* pArchetype) {
11899 auto comp = add(*pArchetype, id.entity(), id.pair(), id.kind());
11900 const auto& ci = comp_cache_mut().add<T>(id);
11901 GAIA_ASSERT(ci.entity == id);
11902 GAIA_ASSERT(comp == id);
11903 (void)comp;
11904 return ci;
11905 }
11906
11907 template <typename T>
11908 const ComponentCacheItem& reg_core_entity(Entity id) {
11909 return reg_core_entity<T>(id, m_pRootArchetype);
11910 }
11911
11912#if GAIA_ECS_AUTO_COMPONENT_SCHEMA
11913 template <typename T>
11914 static void auto_populate_component_schema(ComponentCacheItem& item) {
11915 if (!item.fields_empty())
11916 return;
11917
11918 using U = core::raw_t<T>;
11919 if constexpr (std::is_empty_v<U>)
11920 return;
11921 if constexpr (mem::is_soa_layout_v<U>)
11922 return;
11923
11924 if constexpr (!std::is_class_v<U>) {
11925 (void)item.set_field("value", 5, ser::type_id<U>(), 0, (uint32_t)sizeof(U));
11926 return;
11927 } else if constexpr (!std::is_aggregate_v<U>) {
11928 // Non-aggregate classes are not safe for offset extraction via meta::each_member.
11929 // Keep these components on serializer-based fallback rendering.
11930 return;
11931 } else {
11932 U tmp{};
11933 const auto* pBase = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&tmp);
11934 uint32_t fieldIdx = 0;
11935 meta::each_member(tmp, [&](auto&... fields) {
11936 auto add_field = [&](auto& field) {
11937 using F = core::raw_t<decltype(field)>;
11938 char fieldName[24]{};
11939 (void)GAIA_STRFMT(fieldName, sizeof(fieldName), "f%u", fieldIdx++);
11940 const auto* pField = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&field);
11941 const auto offset = (uint32_t)(pField - pBase);
11942 (void)item.set_field(fieldName, 0, ser::type_id<F>(), offset, (uint32_t)sizeof(F));
11943 };
11944 (add(fields), ...);
11945 });
11946 }
11947 }
11948#endif
11949
11950 void init();
11951
11952 void done() {
11953 cleanup_inter();
11954
11955#if GAIA_ECS_CHUNK_ALLOCATOR
11956 ChunkAllocator::get().flush();
11957#endif
11958 }
11959
11963 void assign_entity(Entity entity, Archetype& archetype) {
11964 GAIA_ASSERT(!entity.pair());
11965
11966 auto* pChunk = archetype.foc_free_chunk();
11967 store_entity(m_recs.entities[entity.id()], entity, &archetype, pChunk);
11968 pChunk->update_versions();
11969 archetype.try_update_free_chunk_idx();
11970
11971 // Call constructors for the generic components on the newly added entity if necessary
11972 pChunk->call_gen_ctors(pChunk->size() - 1, 1);
11973
11974#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
11975 const auto& ec = m_recs.entities[entity.id()];
11976 GAIA_ASSERT(ec.pChunk == pChunk);
11977 auto entityExpected = pChunk->entity_view()[ec.row];
11978 GAIA_ASSERT(entityExpected == entity);
11979#endif
11980 }
11981
11985 void assign_pair(Entity entity, Archetype& archetype) {
11986 GAIA_ASSERT(entity.pair());
11987
11988 // Pairs are always added to m_pEntityArchetype initially and this can't change.
11989 GAIA_ASSERT(&archetype == m_pEntityArchetype);
11990
11991 const auto it = m_recs.pairs.find(EntityLookupKey(entity));
11992 if (it != m_recs.pairs.end())
11993 return;
11994
11995 // Update the container record
11996 EntityContainer ec{};
11997 ec.idx = entity.id();
11998 ec.data.gen = entity.gen();
11999 ec.data.pair = 1;
12000 ec.data.ent = 1;
12001 ec.data.kind = EntityKind::EK_Gen;
12002
12003 auto* pChunk = archetype.foc_free_chunk();
12004 store_entity(ec, entity, &archetype, pChunk);
12005 pChunk->update_versions();
12006 archetype.try_update_free_chunk_idx();
12007
12008 m_recs.pairs.emplace(EntityLookupKey(entity), GAIA_MOV(ec));
12009
12010 // Update pair mappings
12011 const auto rel = get(entity.id());
12012 const auto tgt = get(entity.gen());
12013
12014 auto addPair = [](PairMap& map, Entity source, Entity add) {
12015 auto& ents = map[EntityLookupKey(source)];
12016 ents.insert(EntityLookupKey(add));
12017 };
12018
12019 addPair(m_relToTgt, rel, tgt);
12020 addPair(m_relToTgt, All, tgt);
12021 addPair(m_tgtToRel, tgt, rel);
12022 addPair(m_tgtToRel, All, rel);
12023
12024#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
12025 m_observers.try_mark_term_observed(*this, entity);
12026#endif
12027 }
12028
12035 GAIA_NODISCARD Entity add(Archetype& archetype, bool isEntity, bool isPair, EntityKind kind) {
12036 EntityContainerCtx ctx{isEntity, isPair, kind};
12037 const auto entity = m_recs.entities.alloc(&ctx);
12038 assign_entity(entity, archetype);
12039 return entity;
12040 }
12041
12047 template <typename Func>
12048 void add_entity_n(Archetype& archetype, uint32_t count, Func func) {
12049 EntityContainerCtx ctx{true, false, EntityKind::EK_Gen};
12050#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
12051 const auto addedIds = EntitySpan{archetype.ids_view()};
12052 ObserverRegistry::DiffDispatchCtx addDiffCtx{};
12053 if (!addedIds.empty())
12054 addDiffCtx = m_observers.prepare_diff_add_new(*this, addedIds);
12055#endif
12056
12057 uint32_t left = count;
12058 do {
12059 auto* pChunk = archetype.foc_free_chunk();
12060 const uint32_t originalChunkSize = pChunk->size();
12061 const uint32_t freeSlotsInChunk = pChunk->capacity() - originalChunkSize;
12062 const uint32_t toCreate = core::get_min(freeSlotsInChunk, left);
12063
12064 GAIA_FOR(toCreate) {
12065 const auto entityNew = m_recs.entities.alloc(&ctx);
12066 auto& ecNew = m_recs.entities[entityNew.id()];
12067 store_entity(ecNew, entityNew, &archetype, pChunk);
12068
12069#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
12070 GAIA_ASSERT(ecNew.pChunk == pChunk);
12071 auto entityExpected = pChunk->entity_view()[ecNew.row];
12072 GAIA_ASSERT(entityExpected == entityNew);
12073#endif
12074 }
12075
12076 // New entities were added, try updating the free chunk index
12077 archetype.try_update_free_chunk_idx();
12078
12079 // Call constructors for the generic components on the newly added entity if necessary
12080 pChunk->call_gen_ctors(originalChunkSize, toCreate);
12081
12082 // Call functors
12083 {
12084 auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
12085 GAIA_FOR2(originalChunkSize, pChunk->size()) func(entities[i]);
12086 }
12087
12088 pChunk->update_versions();
12089
12090#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
12091 if (!addedIds.empty()) {
12092 auto entities = pChunk->entity_view();
12093 const auto targets = EntitySpan{entities.data() + originalChunkSize, toCreate};
12094 m_observers.append_diff_targets(*this, addDiffCtx, targets);
12095 m_observers.on_add(*this, archetype, addedIds, targets);
12096 }
12097#endif
12098
12099 left -= toCreate;
12100 } while (left > 0);
12101
12102#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
12103 if (!addedIds.empty())
12104 m_observers.finish_diff(*this, GAIA_MOV(addDiffCtx));
12105#endif
12106 }
12107
12109 void gc() {
12110 GAIA_PROF_SCOPE(World::gc);
12111
12112 del_empty_chunks();
12113 defrag_chunks(m_defragEntitiesPerTick);
12114 del_empty_archetypes();
12115 }
12116
12117 public:
12122 QuerySerBuffer& query_buffer(QueryId& serId) {
12123 // No serialization id set on the query, try creating a new record
12124 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (serId == QueryIdBad) {
12125#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
12126 uint32_t safetyCounter = 0;
12127#endif
12128
12129 while (true) {
12130#if GAIA_ASSERT_ENABLED
12131 // Make sure we don't cross some safety threshold
12132 ++safetyCounter;
12133 GAIA_ASSERT(safetyCounter < 100000);
12134#endif
12135
12136 serId = ++m_nextQuerySerId;
12137 // Make sure we do not overflow
12138 GAIA_ASSERT(serId != 0);
12139
12140 // If the id is already found, try again.
12141 // Note, this is essentially never going to repeat. We would have to prepare millions if
12142 // not billions of queries for which we only added inputs but never queried them.
12143 auto ret = m_querySerMap.try_emplace(serId);
12144 if (!ret.second)
12145 continue;
12146
12147 return ret.first->second;
12148 };
12149 }
12150
12151 return m_querySerMap[serId];
12152 }
12153
12156 void query_buffer_reset(QueryId& serId) {
12157 auto it = m_querySerMap.find(serId);
12158 if (it == m_querySerMap.end())
12159 return;
12160
12161 m_querySerMap.erase(it);
12162 serId = QueryIdBad;
12163 }
12164
12167 void invalidate_queries_for_structural_entity(EntityLookupKey entityKey) {
12168 m_queryCache.invalidate_queries_for_entity(entityKey, QueryCache::ChangeKind::Structural);
12169 }
12170
12173 void invalidate_queries_for_rel(Entity relation) {
12174 m_queryCache.invalidate_queries_for_rel(relation, QueryCache::ChangeKind::DynamicResult);
12175 }
12176
12179 void invalidate_sorted_queries_for_entity(Entity entity) {
12180 m_queryCache.invalidate_sorted_queries_for_entity(entity);
12181 }
12182
12184 void invalidate_sorted_queries() {
12185 m_queryCache.invalidate_sorted_queries();
12186 }
12187
12190 void invalidate_queries_for_entity(Pair is_pair) {
12191 GAIA_ASSERT(is_pair.first() == Is);
12192
12193 // We still need to handle invalidation "down-the-tree".
12194 // E.g. following setup:
12195 // q = w.query().all({Is,animal});
12196 // w.as(wolf, carnivore);
12197 // w.as(carnivore, animal);
12198 // q.each() ...; // animal, carnivore, wolf
12199 // w.del(wolf, {Is,carnivore}) // wolf is no longer a carnivore and thus no longer an animal
12200 // After this deletion, we need to invalidate "q" because wolf is no longer an animal
12201 // and we don't want q to include it.
12202 // q.each() ...; // animal
12203
12204 auto e = is_pair.second();
12205 as_up_trav<false>(e, [&](Entity target) {
12206 // Invalidate all queries that contain everything in our path.
12207 invalidate_queries_for_structural_entity(EntityLookupKey(Pair{Is, target}));
12208 });
12209 }
12210
12215 Entity name_to_entity(std::span<const char> exprRaw) const {
12216 auto expr = util::trim(exprRaw);
12217
12218 if (expr[0] == '(') {
12219 if (expr.back() != ')') {
12220 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Expression '(' not terminated");
12221 return EntityBad;
12222 }
12223
12224 const auto idStr = expr.subspan(1, expr.size() - 2);
12225 const auto commaIdx = core::get_index(idStr, ',');
12226
12227 const auto first = name_to_entity(idStr.subspan(0, commaIdx));
12228 if (first == EntityBad)
12229 return EntityBad;
12230 const auto second = name_to_entity(idStr.subspan(commaIdx + 1));
12231 if (second == EntityBad)
12232 return EntityBad;
12233
12234 return ecs::Pair(first, second);
12235 }
12236
12237 {
12238 auto idStr = util::trim(expr);
12239
12240 // Wildcard character
12241 if (idStr.size() == 1 && idStr[0] == '*')
12242 return All;
12243
12244 return get_inter(idStr.data(), (uint32_t)idStr.size());
12245 }
12246 }
12247
12253 Entity expr_to_entity(va_list& args, std::span<const char> exprRaw) const {
12254 auto expr = util::trim(exprRaw);
12255
12256 if (expr[0] == '%') {
12257 if (expr[1] != 'e') {
12258 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Expression '%' not terminated");
12259 return EntityBad;
12260 }
12261
12262 auto id = (Identifier)va_arg(args, unsigned long long);
12263 return Entity(id);
12264 }
12265
12266 if (expr[0] == '(') {
12267 if (expr.back() != ')') {
12268 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Expression '(' not terminated");
12269 return EntityBad;
12270 }
12271
12272 const auto idStr = expr.subspan(1, expr.size() - 2);
12273 const auto commaIdx = core::get_index(idStr, ',');
12274
12275 const auto first = expr_to_entity(args, idStr.subspan(0, commaIdx));
12276 if (first == EntityBad)
12277 return EntityBad;
12278 const auto second = expr_to_entity(args, idStr.subspan(commaIdx + 1));
12279 if (second == EntityBad)
12280 return EntityBad;
12281
12282 return ecs::Pair(first, second);
12283 }
12284
12285 {
12286 auto idStr = util::trim(expr);
12287
12288 // Wildcard character
12289 if (idStr.size() == 1 && idStr[0] == '*')
12290 return All;
12291
12292 // Anything else is a component name
12293 const auto* pItem = resolve_component_name_inter(idStr.data(), (uint32_t)idStr.size());
12294 if (pItem == nullptr) {
12295 GAIA_ASSERT2(false, "Component not found");
12296 GAIA_LOG_W("Component '%.*s' not found", (uint32_t)idStr.size(), idStr.data());
12297 return EntityBad;
12298 }
12299
12300 return pItem->entity;
12301 }
12302 }
12303 };
12304
12305 using EntityBuilder = World::EntityBuilder;
12306 } // namespace ecs
12307} // namespace gaia
12308
12309#include "api.inl"
12310#include "observer.inl"
12311#include "system.inl"
12312
12313namespace gaia {
12314 namespace ecs {
12315 inline void World::init() {
12316 // Use the default serializer
12317 set_serializer(nullptr);
12318
12319 // Register the root archetype
12320 {
12321 m_pRootArchetype = create_archetype({});
12322 m_pRootArchetype->set_hashes({calc_lookup_hash({})});
12323 reg_archetype(m_pRootArchetype);
12324 }
12325
12326 (void)reg_core_entity<Core_>(Core);
12327
12328 // Entity archetype matches the root archetype for now
12329 m_pEntityArchetype = m_pRootArchetype;
12330
12331 // Register the component archetype (entity + EntityDesc + Component)
12332 {
12333 Archetype* pCompArchetype{};
12334 {
12335 const auto id = GAIA_ID(EntityDesc);
12336 const auto& ci = reg_core_entity<EntityDesc>(id);
12337 EntityBuilder(*this, id).add_inter_init(ci.entity);
12338 sset<EntityDesc>(id) = {ci.name.str(), ci.name.len(), nullptr, 0};
12339 pCompArchetype = m_recs.entities[id.id()].pArchetype;
12340 }
12341 {
12342 const auto id = GAIA_ID(Component);
12343 const auto& ci = reg_core_entity<Component>(id, pCompArchetype);
12344 EntityBuilder(*this, id).add_inter_init(ci.entity);
12345 acc_mut(id)
12346 // Entity descriptor
12347 .sset<EntityDesc>({ci.name.str(), ci.name.len(), nullptr, 0})
12348 // Component
12349 .sset<Component>(ci.comp);
12350 m_pCompArchetype = m_recs.entities[id.id()].pArchetype;
12351 }
12352 }
12353
12354 // Core components.
12355 // Their order must correspond to the value sequence in id.h.
12356 {
12357 (void)reg_core_entity<OnDelete_>(OnDelete);
12358 (void)reg_core_entity<OnDeleteTarget_>(OnDeleteTarget);
12359 (void)reg_core_entity<Remove_>(Remove);
12360 (void)reg_core_entity<Delete_>(Delete);
12361 (void)reg_core_entity<Error_>(Error);
12362 (void)reg_core_entity<Requires_>(Requires);
12363 (void)reg_core_entity<CantCombine_>(CantCombine);
12364 (void)reg_core_entity<Exclusive_>(Exclusive);
12365 (void)reg_core_entity<DontFragment_>(DontFragment);
12366 (void)reg_core_entity<Sparse_>(Sparse);
12367 (void)reg_core_entity<Acyclic_>(Acyclic);
12368 (void)reg_core_entity<Traversable_>(Traversable);
12369 (void)reg_core_entity<All_>(All);
12370 (void)reg_core_entity<ChildOf_>(ChildOf);
12371 (void)reg_core_entity<Parent_>(Parent);
12372 (void)reg_core_entity<Is_>(Is);
12373 (void)reg_core_entity<Prefab_>(Prefab);
12374 (void)reg_core_entity<OnInstantiate_>(OnInstantiate);
12375 (void)reg_core_entity<Override_>(Override);
12376 (void)reg_core_entity<Inherit_>(Inherit);
12377 (void)reg_core_entity<DontInherit_>(DontInherit);
12378 (void)reg_core_entity<System_>(System);
12379 (void)reg_core_entity<DependsOn_>(DependsOn);
12380 (void)reg_core_entity<Observer_>(Observer);
12381
12382 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var0>(Var0);
12383 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var1>(Var1);
12384 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var2>(Var2);
12385 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var3>(Var3);
12386 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var4>(Var4);
12387 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var5>(Var5);
12388 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var6>(Var6);
12389 (void)reg_core_entity<_Var7>(Var7);
12390 }
12391
12392 // Add special properties for core components.
12393 // Their order must correspond to the value sequence in id.h.
12394 {
12395 EntityBuilder(*this, Core) //
12396 .add(Core)
12397 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12398 EntityBuilder(*this, GAIA_ID(EntityDesc)) //
12399 .add(Core)
12400 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12401 EntityBuilder(*this, GAIA_ID(Component)) //
12402 .add(Core)
12403 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12404 EntityBuilder(*this, OnDelete) //
12405 .add(Core)
12406 .add(Exclusive)
12407 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12408 EntityBuilder(*this, OnDeleteTarget) //
12409 .add(Core)
12410 .add(Exclusive)
12411 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12412 EntityBuilder(*this, Remove) //
12413 .add(Core)
12414 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12415 EntityBuilder(*this, Delete) //
12416 .add(Core)
12417 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12418 EntityBuilder(*this, Error) //
12419 .add(Core)
12420 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12421 EntityBuilder(*this, All) //
12422 .add(Core)
12423 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12424 EntityBuilder(*this, Requires) //
12425 .add(Core)
12426 .add(Acyclic)
12427 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12428 EntityBuilder(*this, CantCombine) //
12429 .add(Core)
12430 .add(Acyclic)
12431 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12432 EntityBuilder(*this, Exclusive) //
12433 .add(Core)
12434 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error))
12435 .add(Acyclic);
12436 EntityBuilder(*this, DontFragment) //
12437 .add(Core)
12438 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error))
12439 .add(Acyclic);
12440 EntityBuilder(*this, Sparse) //
12441 .add(Core)
12442 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error))
12443 .add(Acyclic);
12444 EntityBuilder(*this, Acyclic) //
12445 .add(Core)
12446 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12447 EntityBuilder(*this, Traversable) //
12448 .add(Core)
12449 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12450
12451 EntityBuilder(*this, ChildOf) //
12452 .add(Core)
12453 .add(Acyclic)
12454 .add(Exclusive)
12455 .add(Traversable)
12456 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error))
12457 .add(Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete));
12458 EntityBuilder(*this, Parent) //
12459 .add(Core)
12460 .add(Acyclic)
12461 .add(Exclusive)
12462 .add(DontFragment)
12463 .add(Traversable)
12464 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error))
12465 .add(Pair(OnDeleteTarget, Delete));
12466 EntityBuilder(*this, Is) //
12467 .add(Core)
12468 .add(Acyclic)
12469 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12470 EntityBuilder(*this, Prefab) //
12471 .add(Core)
12472 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12473 EntityBuilder(*this, OnInstantiate) //
12474 .add(Core)
12475 .add(Acyclic)
12476 .add(Exclusive)
12477 .add(DontFragment)
12478 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12479 EntityBuilder(*this, Override) //
12480 .add(Core)
12481 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12482 EntityBuilder(*this, Inherit) //
12483 .add(Core)
12484 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12485 EntityBuilder(*this, DontInherit) //
12486 .add(Core)
12487 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12488
12489 EntityBuilder(*this, System) //
12490 .add(Core)
12491 .add(Acyclic)
12492 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12493 EntityBuilder(*this, DependsOn) //
12494 .add(Core)
12495 .add(Acyclic)
12496 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12497 EntityBuilder(*this, Observer) //
12498 .add(Core)
12499 .add(Acyclic)
12500 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12501
12502 EntityBuilder(*this, Var0) //
12503 .add(Core)
12504 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12505 EntityBuilder(*this, Var1) //
12506 .add(Core)
12507 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12508 EntityBuilder(*this, Var2) //
12509 .add(Core)
12510 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12511 EntityBuilder(*this, Var3) //
12512 .add(Core)
12513 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12514 EntityBuilder(*this, Var4) //
12515 .add(Core)
12516 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12517 EntityBuilder(*this, Var5) //
12518 .add(Core)
12519 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12520 EntityBuilder(*this, Var6) //
12521 .add(Core)
12522 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12523 EntityBuilder(*this, Var7) //
12524 .add(Core)
12525 .add(Pair(OnDelete, Error));
12526 }
12527
12528 // Remove all archetypes with no chunks. We don't want any leftovers after
12529 // archetype movements.
12530 {
12531 for (uint32_t i = 1; i < m_archetypes.size(); ++i) {
12532 auto* pArchetype = m_archetypes[i];
12533 if (!pArchetype->chunks().empty())
12534 continue;
12535
12536 // Request deletion the standard way.
12537 // We could simply add archetypes into m_archetypesToDel but this way
12538 // we can actually replicate what the system really does on the inside
12539 // and it will require more work at the cost of easier maintenance.
12540 // The amount of archetypes cleanup is very small after init and the code
12541 // only runs after the world is created so this is not a big deal.
12542 req_del(*pArchetype);
12543 }
12544
12545 // Cleanup
12546 {
12547 del_finalize();
12548 while (!m_chunksToDel.empty() || !m_archetypesToDel.empty())
12549 gc();
12550
12551 // Make sure everything has been cleared
12552 GAIA_ASSERT(m_reqArchetypesToDel.empty());
12553 GAIA_ASSERT(m_chunksToDel.empty());
12554 GAIA_ASSERT(m_archetypesToDel.empty());
12555 }
12556
12557 sort_archetypes();
12558
12559 // Make sure archetypes have valid graphs after the cleanup
12560 for (const auto* pArchetype: m_archetypes)
12561 validate_archetype_edges(pArchetype);
12562 }
12563
12564 // Make sure archetype pointers are up-to-date
12565 m_pCompArchetype = m_recs.entities[GAIA_ID(Component).id()].pArchetype;
12566
12567#if GAIA_SYSTEMS_ENABLED
12568 // Initialize the systems query
12569 systems_init();
12570#endif
12571 }
12572
12573 inline GroupId
12574 group_by_func_default([[maybe_unused]] const World& world, const Archetype& archetype, Entity groupBy) {
12575 if (archetype.pairs() > 0) {
12576 auto ids = archetype.ids_view();
12577 for (auto id: ids) {
12578 if (!id.pair() || id.id() != groupBy.id())
12579 continue;
12580
12581 // Consider the pair's target the groupId
12582 return id.gen();
12583 }
12584 }
12585
12586 // No group
12587 return 0;
12588 }
12589
12590 inline GroupId group_by_func_depth_order(const World& world, const Archetype& archetype, Entity relation) {
12591 GAIA_ASSERT(!relation.pair());
12592
12593 // Depth ordering only makes sense for fragmenting relations whose target participates in archetype identity.
12594 // Non-fragmenting relations such as Parent must stay on walk(...), because their targets vary per entity
12595 // and cannot be represented by one cached archetype depth.
12596 // The level is derived from the cached upward traversal chain so normal query iteration can stay cheap.
12597 if (!world.supports_depth_order(relation) || archetype.pairs() == 0)
12598 return 0;
12599
12600 auto ids = archetype.ids_view();
12601 GroupId maxDepth = 0;
12602 bool found = false;
12603
12604 for (auto idsIdx: archetype.pair_rel_indices(relation)) {
12605 const auto pair = ids[idsIdx];
12606 const auto target = world.pair_target_if_alive(pair);
12607 if (target == EntityBad)
12608 continue;
12609
12610 const GroupId depth = GroupId(world.depth_order_cache(relation, target));
12611
12612 if (!found || depth > maxDepth) {
12613 maxDepth = depth;
12614 found = true;
12615 }
12616 }
12617
12618 return found ? maxDepth : 0;
12619 }
12620 } // namespace ecs
12621} // namespace gaia
12622
12623#include "gaia/ecs/impl/world_json.h"
12624
12625#if GAIA_SYSTEMS_ENABLED
12626namespace gaia {
12627 namespace ecs {
12628 namespace detail {
12629 struct RunSystemEntity {
12630 World* pWorld = nullptr;
12631
12632 void operator()(Entity systemEntity) const {
12633 if (!pWorld->valid(systemEntity) || !pWorld->has(systemEntity, System))
12634 return;
12635 if (!pWorld->enabled_hierarchy(systemEntity, ChildOf))
12636 return;
12637
12638 auto ss = pWorld->acc_mut(systemEntity);
12639 auto& sys = ss.smut<ecs::System_>();
12640 sys.exec();
12641 }
12642 };
12643
12644 struct CollectSystemEntity {
12645 cnt::darray<Entity>* pOut = nullptr;
12646
12647 void operator()(Entity systemEntity) const {
12648 pOut->push_back(systemEntity);
12649 }
12650 };
12651 } // namespace detail
12652
12653 inline void World::systems_init() {
12654 m_systemsQuery = query().all(System).depth_order(DependsOn);
12655 }
12656
12657 inline void World::systems_run() {
12658 if GAIA_UNLIKELY (tearing_down())
12659 return;
12660
12661 m_systemsQuery.each(detail::RunSystemEntity{this});
12662 }
12663
12664 inline void World::systems_done() {
12665 cnt::darray<Entity> tmpEntities;
12666 m_systemsQuery.each(detail::CollectSystemEntity{&tmpEntities});
12667
12668 // Wait for every outstanding system job before mutating any system runtime state.
12669 // This keeps dependency chains intact while jobs are still live.
12670 for (auto entity: tmpEntities) {
12671 if (!valid(entity) || !has(entity, System))
12672 continue;
12673
12674 auto ss = acc_mut(entity);
12675 auto& sys = ss.smut<ecs::System_>();
12676 if (sys.jobHandle != (mt::JobHandle)mt::JobNull_t{}) {
12677 auto& tp = mt::ThreadPool::get();
12678 tp.wait(sys.jobHandle);
12679 }
12680 }
12681
12682 // With all system jobs complete we can release their runtime state safely.
12683 for (auto entity: tmpEntities) {
12684 if (!valid(entity) || !has(entity, System))
12685 continue;
12686
12687 auto ss = acc_mut(entity);
12688 auto& sys = ss.smut<ecs::System_>();
12689 if (sys.jobHandle != (mt::JobHandle)mt::JobNull_t{}) {
12690 auto& tp = mt::ThreadPool::get();
12691 tp.del(sys.jobHandle);
12692 sys.jobHandle = mt::JobNull;
12693 }
12694 sys.on_each_func = {};
12695 sys.query = {};
12696 }
12697
12698 m_systemsQuery = {};
12699 tmpEntities.clear();
12700 }
12701
12702 inline SystemBuilder World::system() {
12703 // Create the system
12704 auto e = add();
12705 EntityBuilder(*this, e) //
12706 .add<System_>();
12707
12708 auto ss = acc_mut(e);
12709 auto& sys = ss.smut<System_>();
12710 {
12711 sys.entity = e;
12712 sys.query = query();
12713 }
12714 return SystemBuilder(*this, e);
12715 }
12716 } // namespace ecs
12717} // namespace gaia
12718#endif
12719
12720namespace gaia {
12721 namespace ecs {
12722 inline uint32_t world_version(const World& world) {
12723 return world.m_worldVersion;
12724 }
12725
12732 inline void
12733 world_for_each_target(const World& world, Entity entity, Entity relation, void* ctx, void (*func)(void*, Entity)) {
12734 world.targets(entity, relation, [ctx, func](Entity target) {
12735 func(ctx, target);
12736 });
12737 }
12738
12742 inline QueryMatchScratch& query_match_scratch_acquire(World& world) {
12743 if (world.m_queryMatchScratchDepth == world.m_queryMatchScratchStack.size())
12744 world.m_queryMatchScratchStack.push_back(new QueryMatchScratch());
12745
12746 auto& scratch = *world.m_queryMatchScratchStack[world.m_queryMatchScratchDepth++];
12747 scratch.clear_temporary_matches();
12748 return scratch;
12749 }
12750
12754 inline void query_match_scratch_release(World& world, bool keepStamps) {
12755 GAIA_ASSERT(world.m_queryMatchScratchDepth > 0);
12756 auto& scratch = *world.m_queryMatchScratchStack[--world.m_queryMatchScratchDepth];
12757 if (keepStamps)
12758 scratch.clear_temporary_matches_keep_stamps();
12759 else
12760 scratch.clear_temporary_matches();
12761 }
12762
12766 inline void world_invalidate_sorted_queries_for_entity(World& world, Entity entity) {
12767 world.invalidate_sorted_queries_for_entity(entity);
12768 }
12769
12772 inline void world_invalidate_sorted_queries(World& world) {
12773 world.invalidate_sorted_queries();
12774 }
12775
12781 inline bool world_has_entity_term(const World& world, Entity entity, Entity term) {
12782 if (term.pair() && term.id() == Is.id() && !is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
12783 const auto target = world.get(term.gen());
12784 return world.valid(target) && world.is(entity, target);
12785 }
12786
12787 return world.has(entity, term);
12788 }
12789
12795 inline bool world_has_entity_term_in(const World& world, Entity entity, Entity term) {
12796 if (term.pair() && term.id() == Is.id() && !is_wildcard(term.gen())) {
12797 const auto target = world.get(term.gen());
12798 return world.valid(target) && world.in(entity, target);
12799 }
12800
12801 return false;
12802 }
12803
12808 inline bool world_term_uses_inherit_policy(const World& world, Entity term) {
12809 return !is_wildcard(term) && world.valid(term) && world.target(term, OnInstantiate) == Inherit;
12810 }
12811
12817 inline bool world_has_entity_term_direct(const World& world, Entity entity, Entity term) {
12818 return world.has_direct(entity, term);
12819 }
12820
12825 inline bool world_is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(const World& world, Entity relation) {
12826 return world.is_exclusive_dont_fragment_relation(relation);
12827 }
12828
12833 inline bool world_is_out_of_line_component(const World& world, Entity component) {
12834 return world.is_out_of_line_component(component);
12835 }
12836
12841 inline bool world_is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(const World& world, Entity component) {
12842 return world.is_non_fragmenting_out_of_line_component(component);
12843 }
12844
12849 inline uint32_t world_count_direct_term_entities(const World& world, Entity term) {
12850 return world.count_direct_term_entities(term);
12851 }
12852
12857 inline uint32_t world_count_in_term_entities(const World& world, Entity term) {
12858 if (!term.pair() || term.id() != Is.id() || is_wildcard(term.gen()))
12859 return 0;
12860
12861 const auto target = world.get(term.gen());
12862 return world.valid(target) ? (uint32_t)world.as_relations_trav_cache(target).size() : 0U;
12863 }
12864
12869 inline uint32_t world_count_direct_term_entities_direct(const World& world, Entity term) {
12870 return world.count_direct_term_entities_direct(term);
12871 }
12872
12877 inline void world_collect_direct_term_entities(const World& world, Entity term, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) {
12878 world.collect_direct_term_entities(term, out);
12879 }
12880
12885 inline void world_collect_in_term_entities(const World& world, Entity term, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) {
12886 if (!term.pair() || term.id() != Is.id() || is_wildcard(term.gen()))
12887 return;
12888
12889 const auto target = world.get(term.gen());
12890 if (!world.valid(target))
12891 return;
12892
12893 const auto& relations = world.as_relations_trav_cache(target);
12894 out.reserve(out.size() + (uint32_t)relations.size());
12895 for (auto relation: relations)
12896 out.push_back(relation);
12897 }
12898
12903 inline void world_collect_direct_term_entities_direct(const World& world, Entity term, cnt::darray<Entity>& out) {
12904 world.collect_direct_term_entities_direct(term, out);
12905 }
12906
12913 inline bool
12914 world_for_each_direct_term_entity(const World& world, Entity term, void* ctx, bool (*func)(void*, Entity)) {
12915 return world.for_each_direct_term_entity(term, ctx, func);
12916 }
12917
12924 inline bool world_for_each_in_term_entity(const World& world, Entity term, void* ctx, bool (*func)(void*, Entity)) {
12925 if (!term.pair() || term.id() != Is.id() || is_wildcard(term.gen()))
12926 return true;
12927
12928 const auto target = world.get(term.gen());
12929 if (!world.valid(target))
12930 return true;
12931
12932 for (auto relation: world.as_relations_trav_cache(target)) {
12933 if (!func(ctx, relation))
12934 return false;
12935 }
12936
12937 return true;
12938 }
12939
12946 inline bool
12947 world_for_each_direct_term_entity_direct(const World& world, Entity term, void* ctx, bool (*func)(void*, Entity)) {
12948 return world.for_each_direct_term_entity_direct(term, ctx, func);
12949 }

12963 inline Entity world_pair_target_if_alive(const World& world, Entity pair) {
12964 return world.pair_target_if_alive(pair);

12972 inline bool world_entity_enabled_hierarchy(const World& world, Entity entity, Entity relation) {
12973 return world.enabled_hierarchy(entity, relation);

12979 inline uint32_t world_enabled_hierarchy_version(const World& world) {
12980 return world.enabled_hierarchy_version();

12987 inline bool world_is_hierarchy_relation(const World& world, Entity relation) {
12988 return world.is_hierarchy_relation(relation);

12990
12995 inline bool world_is_fragmenting_relation(const World& world, Entity relation) {
12996 return world.is_fragmenting_relation(relation);
12997 }

13003 inline bool world_is_fragmenting_hierarchy_relation(const World& world, Entity relation) {
13004 return world.is_fragmenting_hierarchy_relation(relation);

13011 inline bool world_supports_depth_order(const World& world, Entity relation) {
13012 return world.supports_depth_order(relation);

13019 inline bool world_depth_order_prunes_disabled_subtrees(const World& world, Entity relation) {
