13027 inline bool world_entity_prefab(const World& world, Entity entity) {
13028 const auto& ec = world.fetch(entity);
13029 return ec.pArchetype != nullptr && ec.pArchetype->has(Prefab);
13030 }
13031
13037 inline Entity world_query_first_inherited_owner(const World& world, const Archetype& archetype, Entity term) {
13038 const auto& chunks = archetype.chunks();
13039 const Chunk* pFirstChunk = nullptr;
13040 for (const auto* pChunk: chunks) {
13041 if (pChunk == nullptr || pChunk->size() == 0)
13042 continue;
13043 pFirstChunk = pChunk;
13044 break;
13045 }
13046
13047 if (pFirstChunk == nullptr)
13048 return EntityBad;
13049
13050 const auto firstEntity = pFirstChunk->entity_view()[0];
13051 for (const auto target: world.as_targets_trav_cache(firstEntity)) {
13052 if (!world.has_direct(target, term))
13053 continue;
13054 return target;
13055 }
13056
13057 return EntityBad;
13058 }
13059
13064 inline const Archetype* world_entity_archetype(const World& world, Entity entity) {
13065 return world.fetch(entity).pArchetype;
13066 }
13067
13072 inline uint32_t world_component_index_bucket_size(const World& world, Entity term) {
13073 const auto it = world.m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
13074 if (it == world.m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
13075 return 0;
13076
13077 return (uint32_t)it->second.size();
13078 }
13079
13085 inline uint32_t world_component_index_comp_idx(const World& world, const Archetype& archetype, Entity term) {
13086 if (is_wildcard(term))
13087 return BadIndex;
13088
13089 const auto it = world.m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
13090 if (it == world.m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
13091 return BadIndex;
13092
13093 const auto idx = core::get_index_if(it->second, [&](const auto& entry) {
13094 return entry.matches(&archetype);
13095 });
13096 if (idx == BadIndex)
13097 return BadIndex;
13098
13099 return it->second[idx].compIdx;
13100 }
13101
13107 inline uint32_t world_component_index_match_count(const World& world, const Archetype& archetype, Entity term) {
13108 const auto it = world.m_entityToArchetypeMap.find(EntityLookupKey(term));
13109 if (it == world.m_entityToArchetypeMap.end())
13110 return 0;
13111
13112 const auto idx = core::get_index_if(it->second, [&](const auto& entry) {
13113 return entry.matches(&archetype);
13114 });
13115 if (idx == BadIndex)
13116 return 0;
13117
13118 return it->second[idx].matchCount;
13119 }
13120
13127 template <typename T>
13128 inline const std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>*
13129 world_query_inherited_arg_data_const(World& world, Entity owner, Entity id) {
13130 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13131 return &world.template get<Arg>(owner, id);
13132 }
13133
13139 inline const void* world_query_inherited_arg_data_const_ptr(const World& world, Entity owner, Entity id) {
13140 const auto& ec = world.fetch(owner);
13141 const auto row = id.kind() == EntityKind::EK_Gen ? ec.row : 0;
13142 return ec.pChunk->comp_ptr(ec.pChunk->comp_idx(id), row);
13143 }
13144
13150 template <typename T>
13151 inline decltype(auto) world_direct_entity_arg(World& world, Entity entity) {
13152 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13153 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>)
13154 return entity;
13155 else if constexpr (std::is_lvalue_reference_v<T> && !std::is_const_v<std::remove_reference_t<T>>)
13156 return world.template mut_im<Arg>(entity);
13157 else
13158 return world.template get<Arg>(entity);
13159 }
13160
13166 template <typename T>
13167 inline decltype(auto) world_direct_entity_arg_raw(World& world, Entity entity) {
13168 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13169 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>)
13170 return entity;
13171 else if constexpr (std::is_lvalue_reference_v<T> && !std::is_const_v<std::remove_reference_t<T>>)
13172 return world.template mut<Arg>(entity);
13173 else
13174 return world.template get<Arg>(entity);
13175 }
13176
13181 template <typename T>
13182 inline Entity world_query_arg_id(World& world) {
13183 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13184 using FT = typename component_type_t<Arg>::TypeFull;
13185 if constexpr (is_pair<FT>::value) {
13186 const auto rel = comp_cache(world).template get<typename FT::rel>().entity;
13187 const auto tgt = comp_cache(world).template get<typename FT::tgt>().entity;
13188 return (Entity)Pair(rel, tgt);
13189 } else
13190 return comp_cache(world).template get<FT>().entity;
13191 }
13192
13198 template <typename T>
13199 inline decltype(auto) world_query_entity_arg(World& world, Entity entity) {
13200 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13201 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>)
13202 return entity;
13203 else {
13204 const auto id = world_query_arg_id<Arg>(world);
13205 return world_query_entity_arg_by_id<T>(world, entity, id);
13206 }
13207 }
13208
13216 template <typename T>
13217 inline decltype(auto) world_query_entity_arg_by_id(World& world, Entity entity, Entity id) {
13218 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13219 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>)
13220 return entity;
13221 const auto termId = id != EntityBad ? id : world_query_arg_id<Arg>(world);
13222 if constexpr (std::is_lvalue_reference_v<T> && !std::is_const_v<std::remove_reference_t<T>>) {
13223 if (!world.has_direct(entity, termId)) {
13224 if constexpr (is_pair<Arg>::value)
13225 (void)world.override(entity, termId);
13226 else
13227 (void)world.template override<Arg>(entity, termId);
13228 }
13229
13230 return world.template mut_im<Arg>(entity, termId);
13231 } else
13232 return world.template get<Arg>(entity, termId);
13233 }
13234
13242 template <typename T>
13243 inline decltype(auto) world_query_entity_arg_by_id_raw(World& world, Entity entity, Entity id) {
13244 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13245 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>)
13246 return entity;
13247
13248 const auto termId = id != EntityBad ? id : world_query_arg_id<Arg>(world);
13249 if constexpr (std::is_lvalue_reference_v<T> && !std::is_const_v<std::remove_reference_t<T>>) {
13250 if (!world.has_direct(entity, termId)) {
13251 if constexpr (is_pair<Arg>::value)
13252 (void)world.override(entity, termId);
13253 else
13254 (void)world.template override<Arg>(entity, termId);
13255 }
13256
13257 return world.template mut<Arg>(entity, termId);
13258 } else
13259 return world.template get<Arg>(entity, termId);
13260 }
13261
13271 template <typename T>
13272 inline void world_init_query_entity_arg_by_id_chunk_stable_const(
13273 World& world, const Chunk& chunk, const Entity* pEntities, Entity id, bool& direct, uint32_t& compIdx,
13274 const std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>*& pDataInherited) {
13275 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13276 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>) {
13277 direct = false;
13278 compIdx = BadIndex;
13279 pDataInherited = nullptr;
13280 return;
13281 }
13282
13283 const auto termId = id != EntityBad ? id : world_query_arg_id<Arg>(world);
13284 direct = chunk.has(termId);
13285 compIdx = BadIndex;
13286 pDataInherited = nullptr;
13287
13288 if (direct) {
13289 compIdx = chunk.comp_idx(termId);
13290 GAIA_ASSERT(compIdx != BadIndex);
13291 return;
13292 }
13293
13294 auto owner = EntityBad;
13295 const auto firstEntity = pEntities[0];
13296 for (const auto target: world.as_targets_trav_cache(firstEntity)) {
13297 if (!world.has_direct(target, termId))
13298 continue;
13299
13300 owner = target;
13301 break;
13302 }
13303
13304 GAIA_ASSERT(owner != EntityBad);
13305 pDataInherited = &world.template get<Arg>(owner, termId);
13306 }
13307
13317 template <typename T>
13318 inline decltype(auto) world_query_entity_arg_by_id_cached_const(
13319 World& world, Entity entity, Entity id, const Archetype*& pLastArchetype, Entity& cachedOwner,
13320 bool& cachedDirect) {
13321 using Arg = std::remove_cv_t<std::remove_reference_t<T>>;
13322 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<Arg, Entity>)
13323 return entity;
13324
13325 const auto termId = id != EntityBad ? id : world_query_arg_id<Arg>(world);
13326 const auto& ec = world.fetch(entity);
13327 if (ec.pArchetype != pLastArchetype) {
13328 pLastArchetype = ec.pArchetype;
13329 cachedDirect = ec.pArchetype->has(termId);
13330 cachedOwner = EntityBad;
13331
13332 if (!cachedDirect) {
13333 for (const auto target: world.as_targets_trav_cache(entity)) {
13334 if (!world.has_direct(target, termId))
13335 continue;
13336
13337 cachedOwner = target;
13338 break;
13339 }
13340
13341 GAIA_ASSERT(cachedOwner != EntityBad);
13342 }
13343 }
13344
13345 if (cachedDirect)
13346 return ComponentGetter{world, ec.pChunk, entity, ec.row}.template get<Arg>(termId);
13347
13348 return world.template get<Arg>(cachedOwner, termId);
13349 }
13350
13357 inline void world_notify_on_set(World& world, Entity term, Chunk& chunk, uint16_t from, uint16_t to) {
13358#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
13359 if (world.tearing_down())
13360 return;
13361 if (!world.observers().has_on_set_observers(term))
13362 return;
13363
13364 auto entities = chunk.entity_view();
13365 if (from >= entities.size())
13366 return;
13367 if (to > entities.size())
13368 to = (uint16_t)entities.size();
13369 if (from >= to)
13370 return;
13371
13372 world.observers().on_set(world, term, EntitySpan{entities.data() + from, uint32_t(to - from)});
13373#else
13374 (void)world;
13375 (void)term;
13376 (void)chunk;
13377 (void)from;
13378 (void)to;
13379#endif
13380 }
13381
13382 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
13383
13384 template <typename T>
13385 GAIA_NODISCARD decltype(auto) ComponentGetter::get(Entity type) const {
13386 GAIA_ASSERT(m_pWorld != nullptr);
13387 GAIA_ASSERT(m_entity != EntityBad);
13388
13389 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
13390 if constexpr (World::template supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
13391 if (m_pWorld->template can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(type)) {
13392 const auto* pStore = m_pWorld->template sparse_component_store<FT>(type);
13393 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore != nullptr);
13394 GAIA_ASSERT(pStore->has(m_entity));
13395 return pStore->get(m_entity);
13396 }
13397 }
13398
13399 return m_pChunk->template get<T>(m_row, type);
13400 }
13401
13402 template <typename T>
13403 decltype(auto) ComponentSetter::mut(Entity type) {
13404 return smut<T>(type);
13405 }
13406
13407 template <typename T>
13408 decltype(auto) ComponentSetter::smut(Entity type) {
13409 GAIA_ASSERT(m_pWorld != nullptr);
13410 GAIA_ASSERT(m_entity != EntityBad);
13411
13412 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
13413 if constexpr (World::template supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
13414 auto& world = *const_cast<World*>(m_pWorld);
13415 if (world.template can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(type))
13416 return world.template sparse_component_store_mut<FT>(type).mut(m_entity);
13417 }
13418
13419 return const_cast<Chunk*>(m_pChunk)->template sset<T>(m_row, type);
13420 }
13421
13422 template <typename T>
13423 ComponentSetter& ComponentSetter::sset(Entity type, T&& value) {
13424 smut<T>(type) = GAIA_FWD(value);
13425 return *this;
13426 }
13427
13428 template <typename T>
13429 ComponentSetter& ComponentSetter::set(Entity type, T&& value) {
13430 GAIA_ASSERT(m_pWorld != nullptr);
13431 GAIA_ASSERT(m_entity != EntityBad);
13432
13433 smut<T>(type) = GAIA_FWD(value);
13434 using FT = typename component_type_t<T>::TypeFull;
13435 auto& world = *const_cast<World*>(m_pWorld);
13436
13437 if constexpr (World::template supports_out_of_line_component<FT>()) {
13438 if (world.template can_use_out_of_line_component<FT>(type))
13439 ::gaia::ecs::update_version(world.m_worldVersion);
13440 }
13441
13442 world.finish_write(m_entity, type);
13443 return *this;
13444 }
13445
13446 //----------------------------------------------------------------------
13447
13452 inline void world_notify_on_set_entity(World& world, Entity term, Entity entity) {
13453#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
13454 if (world.tearing_down())
13455 return;
13456 if (!world.valid(entity))
13457 return;
13458 if (!world.observers().has_on_set_observers(term))
13459 return;
13460
13461 world.observers().on_set(world, term, EntitySpan{&entity, 1});
13462#else
13463 (void)world;
13464 (void)term;
13465 (void)entity;
13466#endif
13467 }
13468
13473 inline void world_finish_write(World& world, Entity term, Entity entity) {
13474 world.finish_write(entity, term);
13475 }
13476
13477 } // namespace ecs
13478} // namespace gaia
13479
13480#if GAIA_OBSERVERS_ENABLED
13481namespace gaia {
13482 namespace ecs {
13483 inline uint32_t world_rel_version(const World& world, Entity relation) {
13484 return world.rel_version(relation);
13485 }
13486
13490 inline uint32_t world_entity_archetype_version(const World& world, Entity entity) {
13491 if (!world.valid(entity))
13492 return 0;
13493
13494 const auto key = EntityLookupKey(entity);
13495 auto it = world.m_srcEntityVersions.find(key);
13496 if (it != world.m_srcEntityVersions.end())
13497 return it->second;
13498
13499 it = world.m_srcEntityVersions.try_emplace(key, 1).first;
13500 return it->second;
13501 }
13502
13503 inline ObserverBuilder World::observer() {
13504 // Create the observer
13505 auto e = add();
13506 EntityBuilder(*this, e) //
13507 .add<Observer_>();
13508
13509 auto ss = acc_mut(e);
13510 auto& hdr = ss.smut<Observer_>();
13511 auto& obs = observers().data_add(e);
13512 {
13513 hdr.entity = e;
13514 obs.entity = e;
13515 obs.query = query();
13516 }
13517 return ObserverBuilder(*this, e);
13518 }
13519 } // namespace ecs
13520} // namespace gaia
13521#endif
